name: LeadersWeDeserve.com
subject: “David Hogg Knows Why Democrats Lost Young Voters”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
David is making headlines with his vision for Democrats’ future.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250207-1&t=1&akid=1709%2E587540%2EHBBOUg)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250207-1?refcode=em20250207-1709&amount=5&refcode2=1709_587540_HBBOUg&akid=1709%2E587540%2EHBBOUg)
Peter, our co-founder, David Hogg, has been making headlines lately with his vision for how Democrats can win back young voters in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
There is _no singular issue or reason_ that caused Democrats’ losses. Like David explains, **young people do not believe that Democrats actually listen to them.**
They’ve lost faith in the Democratic Party’s desire and ability to deliver for them.
In 2024, the polls showed that young people were unhappy with the war in Gaza and skyrocketing housing costs. They thought President Biden was too old and out of touch to properly represent them. Young people were raising legitimate concerns – and it seemed like the Democratic establishment didn’t listen or care.
But just because Democrats failed to connect with and inspire young voters in the last election doesn’t mean that all hope is lost. We can win big with young people again – but we have to change the way we’re doing things if we want new results.
One major way we can show young voters that we are listening and speaking to them is by fielding younger candidates who understand the issues young people face in this country, leaders who aren’t afraid to stand up and fight for solutions.
Leaders We Deserve is fighting every day to elect the next generation of bold progressives. In 2024, we elected six young leaders to state legislatures and Congress. **We’ve had some big wins – and we’re just getting started, Peter.**
**[Can you help us win back young voters? Contribute $5 or more right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250207-1?refcode=em20250207-1709&amount=5&refcode2=1709_587540_HBBOUg&akid=1709%2E587540%2EHBBOUg)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250207-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250207-1709&refcode2=1709_587540_HBBOUg&akid=1709%2E587540%2EHBBOUg)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250207-1&t=2&refcode2=1709_587540_HBBOUg&akid=1709%2E587540%2EHBBOUg)**

name: Rob Bonta
subject: No one is above the law.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
I’m requesting the court to enforce its temporary restraining order, and asking for a preliminary injunction to ensure that ALL federal funds remain accessible while this case proceeds.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250207&t=1&akid=1627%2E1088799%2EYrGBl0)
It’s been one week since a federal judge ordered the Trump Administration to unfreeze $3 trillion in federal funding, yet there are still some frozen funds causing major problems for state programs, critical services, and the people who rely on them.
By refusing to unfreeze all federal funding, the Trump administration is not complying with the court order. That’s why today, **I’m requesting that the court enforce its temporary restraining order, and asking for a preliminary injunction to ensure that ALL federal funds are reinstated and remain accessible while this case proceeds.**
**[If I have your support, chip in $5 or more to my campaign while I keep up the fight against Trump’s federal funding freeze.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-1627&refcode2=1627_1088799_YrGBl0&akid=1627%2E1088799%2EYrGBl0)**
$107.5 billion of Medicaid funding and billions of additional dollars for infrastructure and climate funding are on the line in California alone — funding that supports healthcare services, childcare, education and food services for kids, support for the elderly, support for roads, bridges, and public transportation, and so much more.
Some of these funds, which were made possible through President Biden’s Inflation Reduction Act and Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, are needed for domestic energy security, transportation, and infrastructure.
I’m working to set the record straight: **No one is above the law — not even Trump.**
**[As I continue to advance this lawsuit to prevent Trump from violating the separation of powers and hurting our communities, can I count on you to make a grassroots contribution?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-1627&amount=5&refcode2=1627_1088799_YrGBl0&akid=1627%2E1088799%2EYrGBl0)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250207?refcode=em20250207-1627&amount=5&refcode2=1627_1088799_YrGBl0&akid=1627%2E1088799%2EYrGBl0)**
I’ll be in touch with updates on this case when we have them.
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250207&t=3&refcode2=1627_1088799_YrGBl0&akid=1627%2E1088799%2EYrGBl0)**

name: Jeff Younger
subject: Help me save my son James from “trans” abusers!
body:
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMluwjAURb_G2RHZz3HiLLxIoe6mlSgSRerOY2PhDGRC-fsKStlenffu0VVNH4NfBSpeEEAd7IgAEK0QwDzRL3U8fgzrhlZVu7lScLccwfaBLvCEW6PYpZkJOUg1vr-pOv_sXhfyxKe1d0_4UZq6RoV4S4tdYkUGiniTOEEKysuC8qxMalFqk1umPeWK5sqWhmjPC01dTgjLSpwEARgYBswxJiwjqTLecoq518R6RnOU4XtR6gfnpjq0ZzdYFeKamq5JoqinqR_vYhKB7KxO29lEN49_V6ZrEMiHMgK5IJAXedorvv8-bxGV99Hozp5OB8N0NSSDsP01xBjGvEAZ_vl_kywCfgMAAP__3_xulA)

| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcuOmzAUhp_G7ED2MRfPggWpQ6R2IrVMk5G6QcaXYJVbjWGUt69AKBtL_vRJ__nPEf3UWfPMUXZCAK1VMwJAtEAAi6d3cbtd3TOkRTGEXxT0xhF8O9QVXvIgRfKvXwipSjG_X0Sb_hrPK3np_jnpl3yERroXtttoxgOVxyCIkYHOSUbZW0ZZ_Ba0uWE0pVg3lDSZwI00TIAwjDRx-saMSgObA4YEA2YYkyQmkZBGMYqZaYgyCU1RjPegyDitfWuHv9opYbtnJMc-6PLW-2neBysRlJPwzo5-Djv9EF2otNHDrEOzDCpyel0jOSIoZ-8yQZVUggKDTCFaLr6vvXY9otx4RRCkG5nHxUmNKD_xS1id7wfutbLLpp6vB5Gin4R9DIjyo09Wn_il_vnOy5pfP77D_q3O9_rjd1GF24MgrYfOKkT5nZnpB8D19meH-yEpV5-flUyawgUuV9OX7To7pxmK8WNfyNZ_zeF_AAAA___d9J16)
---
My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again: “That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.” But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son **James** in the photo above. I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” **James** against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child. And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life. This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy **James** wanted to become a girl. I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy! But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME. The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me! I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son. I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes. My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons. And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him. And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture. I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee. And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills. But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with **James** to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California. A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son. I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda. I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges. In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process. Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly. Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal. But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist. I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery. This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family. These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped... They need to be held accountable... And **James** needs to be **saved** before he’s permanently butchered. That’s why I’m writing to you today. When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity. PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ. And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible. The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits. This is madness. And it’s got to stop. If you want to help save my son **James** from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... [I hope you’ll consider sending a one-time gift to PLDF today to help fund my battle against the California courts and judges who are trying to mutilate my son.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU2r4ywYhn-N2SXoY75cZNG-NoWXU5hp5_TAbIL1o5HJ16jJof9-SAjdCF5ecuv9iH7qrHlVqDgigNYqjwAQPSCAOdC7-Py8uFdMD4ch_qagV47gv11d4C0PUmR_-5mQay38x1m0-c_xtJC3Hl6Tfst7aKJ7YbuVFjxSVQqCGBnpihS0ZAUtUxa11QNrZhgwljHKmAAitX6YLDeFSbXEZWQrwJBhwCXGJEtJIqRRJcWleRBlMpqjFG9BiXFah9YOf7RTwnavRI591FVtCJPfHlYjqCcRnB2Djzv9FF2stNGD17GZB5U4vSyJHBHUPrhCUCWVoFBCoRCt59A3QbseUW6CIghy0Y_zEBDlBCPI13M_zk5qRPmRn-Pr6b7jXis7rxdPl51I0U_CPgdE-f67ojnyc_Pjg9cNv9z-h217Pd2b26_DNV4XBHkzdFYhyqX3jE6_s1u9wW2slKuvr6vMHgcXuUpN37brrM8LlOLnVs_axlLBvwAAAP__Yu6hxQ "https://patriots-legal-defense-fund.revv.co/str7a3dcda32827d?utm_term=ftd1&amount=10&utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250207_BDG_PLDF_DMSJ2_BDG_REV_STAR-STAR")

clean_body: | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again: “That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.” But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above. I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” James against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child. And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life. This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy James wanted to become a girl. I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy! But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME. The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me! I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son. I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes. My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons. And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him. And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture. I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee. And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills. But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California. A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son. I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda. I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges. In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process. Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly. Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal. But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist. I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery. This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family. These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped... They need to be held accountable... And James needs to be saved before he’s permanently butchered. That’s why I’m writing to you today. When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity. PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ. And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible. The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits. This is madness. And it’s got to stop. If you want to help save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... "" | | - | | | | | I was fired from my job in the tech industry after speaking out about this LGBTQ+ madness. I have been funding my fight from my own savings. But I can’t keep this up forever. And I’m running out of time to save James. "" I’ve met so many good Americans in this battle. It’s what keeps me going when I feel there’s no hope left. God bless you for reading my letter. With gratitude, P.S. After Tucker Carlson interviewed me on his podcast, I was fired from my job and blacklisted. These radical LGBTQ+ activists have the upper hand when it comes to money and power. But I’ll never stop fighting to save my son. By God, never. P.P.S. This is an old photo... I know I don’t look like that anymore. Sadly, I don’t know what my son looks like now. I haven’t seen him in years. Would you help me fight these corrupt judges and politicians? I’d love to send you a new photo once we’ve overturned these bogus rulings and I’m reunited with my boy. Thank you for reading my letter. "" Patriot's Legal Defense Fund 601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

For over a week now, the Trump-Elon administration has taken excessive measures to shut down USAID, the nation’s top humanitarian agency.

President Trump and Elon Musk want you to believe they’re tackling fraud and abuse of taxpayer dollars; all the while, they’ve unilaterally seized trillions in Treasury payments for Social Security and Medicare with _NO OVERSIGHT._

**_Elon isn’t finding waste; he’s finding spending he doesn’t agree with and breaking the law to do so._

USAID may be the first target, but Trump has already signaled that he plans to go after the Department of Education, the Department of Labor, the NOAA, the FDA, the NIH, J6 prosecutors, and countless others. Immigrants, refugees, and members of the LGBTQ community are also being targeted in the Trump administration’s authoritarian attempt to upend our democracy.

**_Let me be clear:_ The Trump administration chooses to stoke chaos and to go after critical infrastructure and the most marginalized groups in the country to disguise the fact that _they have no real plan to meaningfully address the economic issues harming millions of Americans._**

This unconstitutional power grab threatens our democracy and the lives of countless lives here and abroad, but I’m committed to defending it and standing up for Marylanders and Americans across the country.

**We’re stronger in numbers. I’m grateful to have you by my side as we fight back.**

Onward,

April

clean_body: Elon isn’t finding waste; he’s finding spending he doesn’t agree with and breaking the law to do so. | = | Peter, For over a week now, the Trump-Elon administration has taken excessive measures to shut down USAID, the nation’s top humanitarian agency. President Trump and Elon Musk want you to believe they’re tackling fraud and abuse of taxpayer dollars; all the while, they’ve unilaterally seized trillions in Treasury payments for Social Security and Medicare with NO OVERSIGHT. Elon isn’t finding waste; he’s finding spending he doesn’t agree with and breaking the law to do so. | USAID may be the first target, but Trump has already signaled that he plans to go after the Department of Education, the Department of Labor, the NOAA, the FDA, the NIH, J6 prosecutors, and countless others. Immigrants, refugees, and members of the LGBTQ community are also being targeted in the Trump administration’s authoritarian attempt to upend our democracy. Let me be clear: The Trump administration chooses to stoke chaos and to go after critical infrastructure and the most marginalized groups in the country to disguise the fact that they have no real plan to meaningfully address the economic issues harming millions of Americans. This unconstitutional power grab threatens our democracy and the lives of countless lives here and abroad, but I’m committed to defending it and standing up for Marylanders and Americans across the country. We’re stronger in numbers. I’m grateful to have you by my side as we fight back. clean_body: | Hi Peter, We are facing a critical moment in our nation’s future. = Donald Trump is planning tax cuts to line the pockets of his billionaire allies while pushing for tariffs on Canada, Mexico, and China — all at the expense of working people. Make no mistake, Peter. Donald Trump might have promised to cut costs for the American people on the campaign trail, but his actions in office will only drive up costs for working people trying to buy a house, a car, or even just groceries. This is the reality we face as Republicans continue to push their dangerous Project 2025 agenda — one that puts billionaires over the needs of hardworking families. We can’t afford to let them have their way. We need your help: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with Mazie, Team Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

Our newest free online course, "Totalitarian Novels," taught by Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, is available now.

In this course, Dr. Arnn explores the oppressive nature of totalitarian governments by looking at some of the best literature on the subject: George Orwell's _1984_ , Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , Arthur Koestler's _Darkness at Noon_ , and C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength_.

In the first lecture, Dr. Arnn examines the oppressive regime in George Orwell's _1984_.

Click the secure link below to start today:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/klAmZFcdpiShzeL3JHDpGe__IdzYMaNcwDXJV4acIIV2dfUe1BNBkrFeLEUDWW7EIZ3EFqZJyLb33cMLZ5YqQrZIQlovZZUlOChP_gnh1IX527odZVv5XAeKD-1w7sSR5OFqPNMHFELTsAUzktEOR-ykTXwO5SzIiWb5avlznm2OAp4Juuqsu5vFF7Igdii4lTh34_ZIZHS03p94DvK0uCl4daAvjoTQqWgJZS33N-yktOuZOBZvCpLknEjjmcFqY-keI8PFQW3uC_Fll7TYrOyo01pT5KTE9HuCWLDL4itf-NhbyCJ_02zGd9NH4xPc6WDMktpkGJo0njXtGrpGSQbuRD3kiq4L3TJvikW2YVrJgFE90xXk9smjUquyk6452bo7jBl99Pt8cuIT8gZmhZTJ--kInKez7_I7NH3GKMm63BCxdwhvMOb11kz9bNniRpeoyygkyb6Catw4idNqEnSm9NS2ag/aHaHEX1991sec5niNwl5mL9UeatpywY6/5)

Elon Musk—an unelected South African billionaire—is running an illegal data mining scheme across the federal government, and must be stopped.

What he is doing is not only illegal—it is dangerous, and _poses a grave threat to national security_.

And now, we are learning that Musk’s rogue “DOGE” operation not only has access to sensitive financial info about millions of U.S. citizens, **he and his team are attacking Medicare and Social Security, putting seniors everywhere at risk** :

I'm the Democratic nominee running in the special election for Florida's 6th Congressional District. My opponent is a MAGA puppet who will rubber stamp _anything and everything_ President Elon Musk wants to do.****

## **MESSAGE FROM JD VANCE**

It’s been less than a month since President Trump took office, and the Democrat lie machine has been firing on all cylinders.
They’re saying Elon Musk is running a _**“shadow government”**_ by shining light on rampant corruption.
They scream, “No one voted for Elon Musk!” at the top of their lungs even though President Trump said hundreds of times he’d task Elon to root out wasteful spending.
Then on trade, Democrats went ballistic and claimed the sky was falling because President Trump put maximum pressure on Canada & Mexico.
**Guess what happened next?** President Trump gained HISTORIC concessions to keep our country safe.
Democrats don’t have any policies. All they have is lies.
**_Nobody believes their crap. So on behalf of every American who is sick of their lies, I got one thing to say: Don’t pee on my boots & tell me it’s raining._**
Democrats can’t stand that we have a President who’s putting the working men & women of America first, AND NOW THEY’RE THREATENING TO IMPEACH TRUMP AGAIN!

[SUBMIT RESPONSE](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2SoywUhq8Gd6TwYAQXLvK1cfFNddf0zFSndxbhpyUFSCmayd1P6TjZvjzn8D4gfHTWPGrE_kMAvVUTAkD0hABO73D5-UufNcMf3-IVi7P-_209hZcdXeAJByn4J-3f-KP9Pfl7_vL9EvIlf-LpEfUT3i89aC-sW1PWZKoGyUHKTNc5o7xi7MiLrK8lEA5MK1LxsgQjKqUZcDgyITgxnGe2BgJHAoSTPK8KeuCFugpdlEYZBYIUqCB3Gw5qCMKpWxpnHw9y8Jmr-5TitFVqEbSTlvOoD3cbRq1WAkG70TiIZNdpLAfvbUpa45uRCFoXcW_wpoH_onFwDi95XuHlphBt5-Q7r5WdPaLN7luu4TTMo9SINi52Lna92XMpfBT2KyDa7F6sS0F22_rn9q433U0tIkjdufhvdAhJh4Ros7omjaDsgrMK0SacXt_j9OM8Vlu4_TNt4PohzCe7vGZjreLdOmenkqGCfK1Ft0daavgTAAD__xhlrY0)
**American citizens are finally being sent to the front of the line, and Democrats are going crazy.**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Victory For Women!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Principles Project](https://go
body:
President Trump just BANNED men from women’s sports.

| | | | |
---
Friend, I can not tell you how surreal these past few days have been for me. Everything we have fought for, and everything we have championed has come to fruition.
President Trump has just issued an order that **bans biological men from competing in women’s sports nationwide.**
That’s right, the nonsense is OVER.
_**No more stolen trophies. No more shattered records. No more silencing of women who dare to speak up.**_
As a former NCAA swimmer who had to stand on the podium and watch a biological male take my medal, **this is personal**.
They tried to erase women from sports, but today we fought back and we WON.
**__[But let me be clear: this fight is FAR from over](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y5c/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
The radical Left will stop at NOTHING to reverse this order. They're already calling us "bigots" and "transphobes."

[KEEP UP THE PRESSURE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y5c/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
They’re going to **_sue_** , **_lobby_** , and their **woke billionaires __** will _**pump**_** __**millions**_ _**into trying to undo this victory.
We need to codify these protections for women into law, and take the fight to the states to make sure that our daughters and wives are kept safe and protected no matter where they are.
We CANNOT let them win.
**We need to stay in this fight with everything we’ve got.**
We need to be absolutely certain that we have the resources for what is coming next...
Because now that President Trump issued his order, they’re going to get even nastier.
**__[The American Principles Project has been on the front lines of this fight, and now more than ever, we need your help to defend this victory](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y5c/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_._**
The woke mob has endless resources but we have the power of grassroots patriots like YOU. Every dollar you give will help us stop the Left from erasing women for good.__

[DEFEND OUR GIRLS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y5c/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I remember standing at that NCAA Championship podium, knowing that **what I had worked for my entire life had been stolen from me.** I will never forget that moment and I will never stop fighting until no other young woman has to endure what I did.****
**This is about fairness. It’s about truth. It’s about standing up to the insanity that says men can replace women.****__**
We’re winning, but this fight isn't over.
**__**
****Please, join me and help us protect the next generation of female athletes.**** Let’s make sure this victory sticks!

[DEFEND OUR GIRLS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y5c/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**__[Can our girls count on you](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y5c/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?_**

Yours Sincerely,

**Riley Gaines**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Y5c/?__vbtrk=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc0NjA1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

body:

In case you missed it, anti-choice extremist Judge Jefferson Griffin is demanding that the court _throw out some 60,000 valid ballots_ to overturn the election in his favor.

**That means he wants the outcome decided by justices whose _own spouses_ donated to his campaign!**

Pro-choice champion Justice Allison Riggs defeated Griffin by 734 votes in November's elections, and not one, but _two (!!)_ recounts have confirmed she is the winner.

Still, Griffin refuses to concede, and now, he's urging the Republican-majority state Supreme Court to change the results of the election in a blatantly corrupt partisan power grab. [**We're doing everything we can to help Justice Riggs fight back — but this legal fight is costly and we need your support. Will you split a donation between Justice Riggs and EMILYs List?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101756144/526999985/126959580?refcode=WUEFH212_20250207_RiggsSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1055686&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUyYWFmMS1jOGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OsQdTcD6qE0tk0CJGWUI0f3XfIFLMxqjDloA3KXgZI4=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101756145/526999986/126959580?refcode=WUEFH212_20250207_RiggsSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1055686&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDUyYWFmMS1jOGU1LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OsQdTcD6qE0tk0CJGWUI0f3XfIFLMxqjDloA3KXgZI4=)

We won't stand for anti-democracy extremists trying to seize office by circumventing the will of the people. North Carolinians voted to elect a pro-choice leader to the state's highest court. Our job is to make sure that leader has the resources to defend her win in that very court.

clean_body: Will you split a donation between Justice Allison Riggs and EMILYs List? | = Peter, In case you missed it, anti-choice extremist Judge Jefferson Griffin is demanding that the court throw out some 60,000 valid ballots to overturn the election in his favor. That means he wants the outcome decided by justices whose own spouses donated to his campaign! Pro-choice champion Justice Allison Riggs defeated Griffin by 734 votes in November's elections, and not one, but two (!!) recounts have confirmed she is the winner. Still, Griffin refuses to concede, and now, he's urging the Republican-majority state Supreme Court to change the results of the election in a blatantly corrupt partisan power grab. = | = We won't stand for anti-democracy extremists trying to seize office by circumventing the will of the people. North Carolinians voted to elect a pro-choice leader to the state's highest court. Our job is to make sure that leader has the resources to defend her win in that very court. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your help, the EMILYs List team = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Tom Fitton
subject: New Court Victory in Fani Willis Documents Case
body:
Woke Racism Before the Supreme Court!

[INSIDE JW]

VICTORY: Court Orders DOJ to Provide Info on Jack Smith’s
Communications with Fani Willis

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=34465&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1KdEZqcDhpM1dBNCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b1ca1f1e7af867cb095a610ff9ecba509136c4f47d9a1f07c28b7c577529f9f1]

A federal court ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=34433&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWZ1bHRvbi1jb3VudHktZGEtb3JkZXItMDMxMTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=19eca118040f61583c201eeb4b114dc6528032748f9381396350303d75addb8d]
the
Department of Justice to provide information on communications between
Special Counsel Jack Smith and District Attorney Fani Willis regarding
the prosecution of then-former President Donald Trump.

President Trump truly needs to overhaul the Justice Department from
top to bottom. It is a scandal that a federal court had to order the
Justice Department to admit the truth that their objections to
producing records about collusion with Fani Willis had no basis in
reality.

The Justice Department had continued to object to providing any
information even after its prosecutions against Trump were shut down.

Judge Dabney L. Friedrich of the U.S. District Court for the District
of Columbia ruled that because the cases against Trump were closed,
the Justice Department’s arguments against disclosure were no longer
applicable:

> Since DOJ filed its motion for summary judgment and supporting
> Declaration in March 2024, the Special Counsel’s criminal
> enforcement actions have been terminated.... The cases are
> “closed—not pending or contemplated—and therefore are not
> proceedings with which disclosure may interfere.” ... Thus, the
> agency’s sole justification for invoking the Glomar doctrine under
> Exemption 7(A) is no longer applicable.
>
> Accordingly, the Court will deny DOJ’s motion for summary judgment
> and grant the plaintiff’s cross motion. DOJ is directed to process
> the plaintiff’s FOIA [Freedom of Information Act] request and
> either “disclose any [responsive] records or establish both that
> their contents are exempt from disclosure and that such exemption
> has not also been waived.”

We sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=31611&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWZ1bHRvbi1jby1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMxMTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b8402c477e83198bea580e130f28cc68a2d972bd44e25c8c67f1161b695b4809]
in
October 2023 after the Department of Justice failed to comply with an
August 2023 FOIA request for records detailing the “Fulton County
District Attorney’s Office’s requesting or receiving federal funds
or other federal assistance ... regarding the investigation of former
President Donald Trump” and others (_Judicial Watch v U.S.
Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=31253&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvd3AtY29udGVudC91cGxvYWRzLzIwMjMvMTAvSlctdi4tRE9KLUZ1bHRvbi1Dby1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDMxMTAucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=285c95128addde2a7429a6a960de93429284999124f2991eac12241a3f84741a]
(No.
23-cv-03110).

On December 18, 2023, the Justice Department issued its final response
to this request, refusing to confirm or deny the existence of
responsive records. It argued that releasing the records could be
reasonably expected to interfere with enforcement proceedings. The
Justice Department refused to change its position or inform the court
in light of the “proceedings” against Trump that were shut down.

The court has now ordered Justice to meet with us on or before
February 21, 2025, and to report the status of the discussion to the
court.

We have several FOIA lawsuits related to the prosecutorial abuse
targeting Trump:

In January 2025, the Superior Court in Fulton County, GA, issued an
order
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=34234&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291cnQtYXdhcmRzLWp1ZGljaWFsLXdhdGNoLTIxNTc4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=8c0cc0a31cfb1128e6168b2ab7a6bdacbe0988c6a4be936c31fe061ec2808d2f]
granting
$21,578 “attorney’s fees and costs” in the open records lawsuit
for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the
House January 6 Committee. We recently received
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=34434&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9Ub21GaXR0b24vc3RhdHVzLzE4ODYxMzM4MDI1NzQ5NzUwNTk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=5e0371ce2aba7a07d9c26f05f9ac8daff655d2cd87e0c02881ebc40949cd58b5]
payment.

In February 2024, the U.S. Department of Justice asked
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=31981&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFtZXMtb2YtdG9wLXN0YWZmLWFudGktdHJ1bXAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f983bb930d170366a97627dca8c343257ec206b62fce008c7bee21f62e8ad904]
a
federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top
staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that is
targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans.

(Before his appointment to investigate and prosecute Trump, Special
Counsel Jack Smith previously was at the center of several
controversial issues, the IRS scandal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=28485&F=T&&hash=7d304403d871da9d079a66ed9ab4db4e2cf362db0486ad344a7df1a16d0ee34a]
among
them. In 2014, a Judicial Watch investigation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=28716&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctZ3VpZGUtdG8tY29uZ3Jlc3Npb25hbC1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3cb9ceabc2b051a3443b24c8ce0623fb5229f954135b4a914b33c6f71413008e]
revealed
that top IRS officials had been in communication with Jack Smith’s
then-Public Integrity Section about a plan to launch criminal
investigations into conservative tax-exempt groups. Read more here
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=28702&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWJjcy1pcnMtbWVzcy1qdXN0aWNlLWRlcHQtdGFpbnRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9ed8deea73b100efa959715399410668bbe1ab82033f763fc7deb8d74f0e300b].)

In January 2024, we filed a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=31256&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a177133761ceeb6142d7a7105a553c927c14ff9ff19081c7333752838044e9e1]
against Fulton County,
Georgia, for records regarding the hiring of Nathan Wade as a special
prosecutor by District Attorney Fani Willis. Wade was hired to pursue
unprecedented criminal investigations and prosecutions against former
President Trump and others over the 2020 election disputes.

Through the New York Freedom of Information Law, in July 2023, we
received the engagement letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=29822&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYnJhZ2ctcGFpZC10by1zaHV0LWRvd24taG91c2UtanVkaWNpYXJ5LW92ZXJzaWdodC1pbnRvLWluZGljdG1lbnQtb2YtdHJ1bXAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=84b544e6263a0f71f3f8f1b286d5c03d9bd00d835f6d312ede7bc8e320ffe224]
showing
New York County District Attorney Alvin L. Bragg paid $900 per hour
for partners and $500 per hour for associates to the Gibson, Dunn &

JUDICIAL WATCH ASKS SUPREME COURT TO END RACE-BASED CONGRESSIONAL
DISTRICTS

The Left, with the help of the courts, wants to keep using race as a
basis for creating congressional districts.

We filed an _amici curiae_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=34462&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xvdWlzaWFuYS12LWNhbGxhaXMtYW1pY2ktMTA5LTExMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=df59ae8b0eeaaacd78c96c11162d881c98d450ce757fe8069245f34b076b218a]
(friend
of the court) brief along with the Allied Educational Foundation
(AEF), asking the Supreme Court to eliminate this woke, race-based
congressional districting and ban the use of racial preferences in
drawing up “majority minority” districts.

Judicial Watch and AEF ask the court to affirm a lower court ruling
that would prevent specifically crowding minority voters into
congressional districts.

of a racially-drawn congressional map for future elections.

In our _amici_ brief, we and AEF argue:

> This Court has compared race-based districting to segregation of
> “public parks, . . . buses, . . . and schools,” and warned that
> we “should not be carving electorates into racial blocs.”
>
> There should be no question that race-based division of citizens for
> purposes of redistricting is a violation of the Equal Protection
> Clause, the “central purpose” of which “is to prevent the
> States from purposefully discriminating between individuals on the
> basis of race....” Racial gerrymandering, like all “[r]acial
> classifications of any sort” cause “lasting harm to our
> society” because “[t]hey reinforce the belief, held by too many
> for too much of our history, that individuals should be judged by
> the color of their skin.”

The Allied Educational Foundation is a charitable and educational

a number of projects, which include, but are not limited to,
educational and health conferences domestically and abroad. AEF has

corruption and to promote a return to ethics and morality in the

We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. We
assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who
stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls
in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=33927&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL2VsZWN0aW9uK2xhdz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=03a9e41170e615b9b89647833814b4689b78fdefa96f8deb87133aa58ad7082c].

Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads its election
law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil
Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting
rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements
in dozens of states.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=33940&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY291bnRpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=200db680ce3c703e447d311dde7b46d7b573ff10009ce8fd96a03975cfd9caab]

In May 2024, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=32338&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2FsaWZvcm5pYS1jbGVhbi11cC12b3Rpbmctcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=43118f5469b09d5a03dd6c0922ba3e0197ee76e0636575890f560ca9c7026755]

under the National Voter Registration Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b]

reasonable effort to remove the registrations of ineligible
registrants from the voter rolls” as required by federal law.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=31560&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaWxsaW5vaXMtdm90aW5nLXJvbGxzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b9d889574013d51b5bb2a699b8d7eb63339c216bd80c8fc0830a6ff6ae1bf019]

In December 2023, a notice letter was
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72285&L=30885&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGMtcmVtb3ZpbmctMTAzMDAwLWluZWxpZ2libGUtbmFtZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=e81fbc7d3f8c3674910717882ce9fea86877f982d87ca6a7e38997b95e9101a3]
sent
to election officials in the District of Columbia notifying them of
evident violations of the NVRA, based on their failure to remove
inactive voters from their registration rolls. The letter pointed out
that D.C. publicly reported removing few or no ineligible voter
registrations under a key provision of the NVRA. The letter threatened
a federal lawsuit unless the violations were corrected in a timely
fashion. In response to Judicial Watch’s inquiries, Washington, DC,
officials admitted that they had not complied with the NVRA, promptly
removed 65,544 outdated names from the voting rolls, promised to
remove 37,962 more, and designated another 73,522 registrations as
“inactive.”

clean_body: Woke Racism Before the Supreme Court! [INSIDE JW] VICTORY: Court Orders DOJ to Provide Info on Jack Smith’s Communications with Fani Willis [] A federal court ordered [] the Department of Justice to provide information on communications between Special Counsel Jack Smith and District Attorney Fani Willis regarding the prosecution of then-former President Donald Trump. President Trump truly needs to overhaul the Justice Department from top to bottom. It is a scandal that a federal court had to order the Justice Department to admit the truth that their objections to producing records about collusion with Fani Willis had no basis in reality. The Justice Department had continued to object to providing any information even after its prosecutions against Trump were shut down. Judge Dabney L. Friedrich of the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia ruled that because the cases against Trump were closed, the Justice Department’s arguments against disclosure were no longer applicable: Since DOJ filed its motion for summary judgment and supporting Declaration in March 2024, the Special Counsel’s criminal enforcement actions have been terminated.... The cases are “closed—not pending or contemplated—and therefore are not proceedings with which disclosure may interfere.” ... Thus, the agency’s sole justification for invoking the Glomar doctrine under Exemption 7(A) is no longer applicable. Accordingly, the Court will deny DOJ’s motion for summary judgment and grant the plaintiff’s cross motion. DOJ is directed to process the plaintiff’s FOIA [Freedom of Information Act] request and either “disclose any [responsive] records or establish both that their contents are exempt from disclosure and that such exemption has not also been waived.” We sued [] in October 2023 after the Department of Justice failed to comply with an August 2023 FOIA request for records detailing the “Fulton County District Attorney’s Office’s requesting or receiving federal funds or other federal assistance ... regarding the investigation of former President Donald Trump” and others (Judicial Watch v U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 23-cv-03110). On December 18, 2023, the Justice Department issued its final response to this request, refusing to confirm or deny the existence of responsive records. It argued that releasing the records could be reasonably expected to interfere with enforcement proceedings. The Justice Department refused to change its position or inform the court in light of the “proceedings” against Trump that were shut down. The court has now ordered Justice to meet with us on or before February 21, 2025, and to report the status of the discussion to the court. We have several FOIA lawsuits related to the prosecutorial abuse targeting Trump: In January 2025, the Superior Court in Fulton County, GA, issued an order [] granting $21,578 “attorney’s fees and costs” in the open records lawsuit for communications Willis had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. We recently received [] payment. In February 2024, the U.S. Department of Justice asked [] a federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that is targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans. (Before his appointment to investigate and prosecute Trump, Special Counsel Jack Smith previously was at the center of several controversial issues, the IRS scandal [] among them. In 2014, a Judicial Watch investigation [] revealed that top IRS officials had been in communication with Jack Smith’s then-Public Integrity Section about a plan to launch criminal investigations into conservative tax-exempt groups. Read more here [].) In January 2024, we filed a lawsuit [] against Fulton County, Georgia, for records regarding the hiring of Nathan Wade as a special prosecutor by District Attorney Fani Willis. Wade was hired to pursue unprecedented criminal investigations and prosecutions against former President Trump and others over the 2020 election disputes. Through the New York Freedom of Information Law, in July 2023, we received the engagement letter [] showing New York County District Attorney Alvin L. Bragg paid $900 per hour for partners and $500 per hour for associates to the Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher law firm for the purpose of suing Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) in an effort to shut down the House Judiciary Committee’s oversight investigation into Bragg’s unprecedented indictment of former President Donald Trump. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR RECORDS ON KAMALA HARRIS TRAVEL COSTS It seems rather obvious that, in order to help Kamala Harris’s campaign, Biden agencies hid details of her international jaunts. That’s my conclusion, as Judicial Watch was forced to file a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security and the Department of Defense for former Vice President Kamala Harris’ VIP travel records (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:25-cv-00233)). We sued after the Secret Service and the Air Force failed to respond to August 2024 requests for: “All records concerning use of U.S Government funds to provide security and/or other services to Vice President Kamala Harris and any companions while traveling.” The Biden White House website reports [] that during her term as vice president, Kamala Harris made “17 foreign trips, traveling to 21 countries and meeting with over 150 world leaders ...” There are no publicly available flight logs or other records that provide details about who accompanied her on these trips. Just before her last official trip in early January 2025, AP [] reported [] that her husband, Doug Emhoff, was expected to accompany her to Singapore, Bahrain and Germany. However, this is the only non-governmental person specifically mentioned as accompanying her on any official trip. Our investigations into government travel records are extensive. In 2021, we uncovered White House travel records [] from the Secret Service in response to FOIA requests for all records concerning the use of U.S. government funds to provide security and/or any other services to President Biden and any companions. These records detailed Secret Service travel costs of $2,252,600.50 for President Joe Biden through August 8, 2021, for travel to Delaware and other domestic locations. In June 2020, we received records [] from the U.S. Secret Service showing that during the first five-and-a-half years of the Obama administration, Hunter Biden traveled extensively while receiving a Secret Service protective detail. During the time period of the records provided, Hunter Biden took 411 separate domestic and international flights, including to 29 different foreign countries. He visited China five times. (During the last year and a half of the Obama administration, Hunter Biden [] served on the board of Ukrainian energy firm Burisma Holdings while his father was heading up Ukraine policy.) In September 2018, we sued [] for information on the travel expenses of President Trump. From a separate lawsuit [], Secret Service produced expense records totaling $3,024,036.50, which brought the known total for presidential travel expenses at that time to $17,224,938.46 and included the operation of Air Force One. In September 2017, we obtained travel records [] from the Secret Service in response to a FOIA lawsuit [], which brought the known total of travel expenses for former President Barack Obama and his family to $105,662,975.27. To date, Judicial Watch has uncovered total travel expenses [] of the Obamas amounting to $114,691,322.17. In 2016, we sued [] for records concerning travel costs for members of Congress. In 2011, we reported on records [] detailing a massive Pelosi-led bipartisan congressional junket to the Detroit Auto Show, as well as records [] showing Michelle Obama’s family trip to Africa cost taxpayers at least $424,142. We uncovered that the Obama’s 2009 “date night [ trip to New York for dinner and a Broadway show cost taxpayers over $11,000 in Secret Service costs alone. Beginning in 2009 [], after the media failed to follow up on concerns raised about Nancy Pelosi’s use of luxury Air Force jets to travel between her congressional district and DC, our FOIA requests exposed [] her abuse of this travel perk. We uncovered [] that Pelosi’s military travel to Italy and Ukraine in 2015 cost the taxpayers $184,587.81, as well as $2,100,744.59 over one two-year period [] — $101,429.14 of which was for in-flight expenses, including food and alcohol. JUDICIAL WATCH ASKS SUPREME COURT TO END RACE-BASED CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS The Left, with the help of the courts, wants to keep using race as a basis for creating congressional districts. We filed an amici curiae [] (friend of the court) brief along with the Allied Educational Foundation (AEF), asking the Supreme Court to eliminate this woke, race-based congressional districting and ban the use of racial preferences in drawing up “majority minority” districts. Judicial Watch and AEF ask the court to affirm a lower court ruling that would prevent specifically crowding minority voters into congressional districts. This amici brief comes in the case Louisiana v. [ [] Callais [ et al [ [] (No. 24-109), which is on appeal from the U.S. District Court Western District of Louisiana where the lower court ruled 2-1 to stop the use of a racially-drawn congressional map for future elections. In our amici brief, we and AEF argue: This Court has compared race-based districting to segregation of “public parks, . . . buses, . . . and schools,” and warned that we “should not be carving electorates into racial blocs.” There should be no question that race-based division of citizens for purposes of redistricting is a violation of the Equal Protection Clause, the “central purpose” of which “is to prevent the States from purposefully discriminating between individuals on the basis of race....” Racial gerrymandering, like all “[r]acial classifications of any sort” cause “lasting harm to our society” because “[t]hey reinforce the belief, held by too many for too much of our history, that individuals should be judged by the color of their skin.” In March 2022, a Maryland court ruled in favor [] of our challenge to the Democratic state legislature’s “extreme” congressional-districts gerrymander. The Biden administration jumped into this case at the last minute, seeking to maintain the race-based status quo requiring separating and segregating voters by race for congressional elections. The Trump Justice Department should urge the court to restore non-discrimination as the foundation of voting rights once again. The Allied Educational Foundation is a charitable and educational foundation dedicated to improving the quality of life through education. In furtherance of that goal, the foundation has engaged in a number of projects, which include, but are not limited to, educational and health conferences domestically and abroad. AEF has partnered frequently with us to fight government and judicial corruption and to promote a return to ethics and morality in the nation’s public life. We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. We assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements []. Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads its election law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements in dozens of states. In November last year we filed a petition for a writ of certiorari [] to the United States Supreme Court challenging the decision by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in the case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors from Illinois to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law (Rep. Michael J. Bost et al. v. Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews [] (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644)). In May 2024, we sued [] California under the National Voter Registration Act [] of 1993 (NVRA) to force it to clean up its voter rolls. The lawsuit, filed on behalf of Judicial Watch and the Libertarian Party of California, asks the court to compel California to make “a reasonable effort to remove the registrations of ineligible registrants from the voter rolls” as required by federal law. In March 2024, Judicial Watch, Breakthrough Ideas, Illinois Family Action, and Carol J. Davis sued [] Illinois officials under the NVRA to force them to clean the State’s voter rolls. In December 2023, a notice letter was [] sent to election officials in the District of Columbia notifying them of evident violations of the NVRA, based on their failure to remove inactive voters from their registration rolls. The letter pointed out that D.C. publicly reported removing few or no ineligible voter registrations under a key provision of the NVRA. The letter threatened a federal lawsuit unless the violations were corrected in a timely fashion. In response to Judicial Watch’s inquiries, Washington, DC, officials admitted that they had not complied with the NVRA, promptly removed 65,544 outdated names from the voting rolls, promised to remove 37,962 more, and designated another 73,522 registrations as “inactive.” In July 2023 Judicial Watch filed [] an amicus curiae (friend of the court) brief [], supporting the decision [] of the U.S. District Court for the District of Maine, which struck down Maine’s policy restricting the use and distribution of the state’s voter registration list. We have had other election law victories in Illinois [], Pennsylvania [], Colorado [], Los Angeles County [], New York City [], and Kentucky [], as well as North Carolina []. JUDICIAL WATCH’S COVID COMMUNITY CORPS CASE ILLUSTRATES NEED TO CUT WASTE We’ve been exposing government waste for years, and we’re delighted with President Trump’s efforts through his Department of Government Efficiency. Our Corruption Chronicles_ blog has one example [] of our independent work exposing waste, fraud, and abuse: President Trump’s temporary funding freeze to reign in Biden’s spending binge has ignited outrage among the left, and an ongoing Judicial Watch case that has already exposed $505 million dollars (and counting) in government waste helps illustrate why the new order is vital to protect American taxpayers. It involves awarding billions of dollars to a “grassroots network of community leaders people know and trust [ to propagandize and politicize the controversial Covid vaccine by, among other things, increasing vaccine uptake in vulnerable and minority communities. It was part of a $3 billion program to support outreach efforts in states by using a specially createdCovid-19 Community Corps [] operated by leftists. Judicial Watch requested records from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) and was forced to sue [] in federal court because the government failed to provide the documents, which are still trickling in under the terms of the lawsuit. It is likely that the scandal-plagued program, which was only exposed because Judicial Watch litigated to obtain records, would receive scrutiny under the new Trump rules aimed at cutting government waste. The policy has caused outrage among many Democrats as well as liberal groups that benefited financially from Biden’s government cash giveaway. The brouhaha was triggered by a memorandum [] issued by the Office of Management and Budget (OMB), which oversees the performance of federal agencies and administers the federal budget, to the heads of executive departments and agencies calling for a temporary pause of grants, loans and other financial assistance programs. “Financial assistance should be dedicated to advancing Administration priorities, focusing taxpayer dollars to advance a stronger and safer America, eliminating the financial burden of inflation for citizens, unleashing American energy and manufacturing, ending ‘wokeness’ and the weaponization of government, promoting efficiency in government, and Making America Healthy Again,” the memo reads. It also says that the use of federal resources to advance Marxist equity, transgenderism, and green new deal social engineering policies is a waste of taxpayer dollars that fails to improve the lives of those they serve. To implement the new policy each agency is asked to complete a comprehensive analysis of programs to identify those that may be implicated by any of Trump’s executive orders. “In the interim, to the extent permissible under applicable law, Federal agencies must temporarily pause all activities related to obligation or disbursement of all Federal financial assistance, and other relevant agency activities that may be implicated by the executive orders, including, but not limited to, financial assistance for foreign aid, nongovernmental organizations, DEI [Diversity, Equity and Inclusion], woke gender ideology, and the green new deal,” the OMB memo states. “This temporary pause will provide the Administration time to review agency programs and determine the best uses of the funding for those programs consistent with the law and the President’s priorities.” Federal agencies are also directed to pause all activities associated with open federal funding announcements officially known as Notice of Funding Opportunity (NOFO). The funding pause is necessary because the administration must review federal programs to ensure that they are being executed in accordance with the law and the new president’s policies, a White House statement [] explains. One mainstream newspaper reported [] that the move to crack down on waste “caused mass chaos and confusion across Washington.” Another major paper referred [] to it as an “explosive Trump administrative order that froze trillions of dollars of federal grants and loans” and received “widespread condemnation and confusion.” White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt clarified to a hostile mainstream media that specializes in trashing all things Trump that efforts to “end the egregious waste of federal funding” will continue. Judicial Watch’s Covid-19 Community Corps case is one of many that can be used to demonstrate why the new Trump order is essential to evaluate future expenditures. The records we obtained reveal that one notable recipient of taxpayer dollars to promote vaccines under Biden’s multi-billion-dollar plan is the Washington, D.C., Episcopal Diocese, whose leftist bishop, Mariann Edgar Budde, politicized her recent presidential inauguration sermon at the National Cathedral by urging Trump to show mercy to illegal immigrants as well as LGBTQ+ individuals. name: Kyle Rittenhouse
subject: It’s time to go on the offensive.
body:
I never asked to be thrown into national politics. I wanted to be a paramedic or a cop and live a normal life.

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zao40ql6cvon64knm1d90hrv7abcliufk1tidsr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

I never asked to be thrown into national politics. I wanted to be a paramedic or a cop and live a normal life.

However, all that changed when I lawfully defended myself during a BLM riot.

My life was thrown upside down. I had Biden using my image in his ads, saying I was a white supremacist. I had the national media lying about me. I had strangers online cursing at me and even sending me death threats.

This is all detailed in my new book, _Acquitted_.

**_I’ve accepted my life is different now. But I will not accept leaving the fate of our country to radical leftists who want to destroy American values of liberty_.**

This is personal for me.

We must take back our universities and go on the offensive against the woke mobs who control them.

My friend JP Kirby started a youth organization called Student Rights Inc. They have a strategy to battle woke campus administrators, defend the freedom of speech of students, and promote Constitutional rights at colleges.

Students Rights Inc. incorporates the Freedom Method strategy to defend student rights on campus. More on that below. But first, here’s how you can help them lead the students who are fighting back on campus. [I gave JP my word that I would help him raise $38,000 online. As a personal favor to me, can you donate $10, $35, or even $100 today to Student Rights Inc.?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrg3u5e2fv46psansmpcecfoqrtkvh80m1436fr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp54iiuibu0d22jl2iuob7v1v032qm20kbg93g6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk7tiaai58pocht338g49m0479vnlgir8h9uaeqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zimqpb7sf5n1oo3v1lrhi3a4r4chcqlr99fkegdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztpusk0o2emv4si9pboggkrdlmjfla4h8io3ju7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6pj6273cuvp5fej0gujut6m5k0ujk54mge37q08_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Other Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl79v6e5sdh87utr03ffkinj4kmocemfc5j5c9h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)
**How to defend student rights on campus: the Freedom Method.**

**STEP 1:** Student Rights Inc. identifies campus policies that violate students’ constitutional rights.

These can be anything from speech codes restricting what students can say and where they can say it. Or it can even be gun policies that prohibit self-defense on campus. Or, lately, it can be medical policies like forced COVID vaccine requirements.

**STEP 2:** Student Rights Inc. gives the freedom-loving students on campus the training to build an opposition movement.

Through the Freedom Method curriculum developed during JP’s years of policy change work as well as personalized coaching, Student Rights Inc. teaches students to win over their classmates, build coalitions with campus groups, and spread the movement on their campuses.

**STEP 3:** This one is the fun part. Student Rights Inc. activists go after the campus administrators!

SRInc activists unleash the coalition of student activists they’ve built on the campus bureaucrats who are restricting their rights. SRInc guides its activists through using the tools of political change such as phone banking, organized protests, media pressure, and much more until the administration removes the restrictions on their rights.

Students desperately need our help on college campuses.

Let’s not leave them to defend themselves against the woke mobs.

[Please send your urgent support today to help us raise $38,000 before the end of the month to defend student rights on college campuses.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhv1tb1jgqugauhuf5rhoeum3orr13ivajpfakl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zntsntns6q339pv93n2g2qqq3cvl5eui36afh328_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkepjiov9sf35mmbikda0v58ee0gcdtlliecrip0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze2eraqv6tqtfbo898r07k8bppoe5ska35r8n24g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3qt28tgkdbc27545kprj2f55q6gvvhg5fghu78_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

With Harvard’s president resigning in disgrace, this is a year where conservatives can go on the offense. We have the opportunity to reclaim our institutions from the radical left.

Student Rights Inc. doesn’t have George Soros billionaires funding them. They don’t have the media on their side. They rely on your support, which is why I am asking you to chip in any amount you can generously spare.

Thank you,

Kyle Rittenhouse

P.S. Students need help on campus defending their constitutional rights. I am looking to raise $38,000 for Student Rights Inc. to help them sue and remove unconstitutional policies at universities. **Turning Point USA is the ONLY organization on the Right that can go TOE-TO-TOE with the mainstream media - and WIN.** Last year, we reached 4 BILLION views of our game-changing reporting and digital content ... inspired MILLIONS of kids to LOVE AMERICA again through our high school and college programs ... and smashed every record from our previous campus tours, with THOUSANDS of students joining us at every stop. Now - thanks to the INCREDIBLE milestone of joining the WHITE HOUSE press briefings - Turning Point USA has our BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY EVER to shatter the Left's lies and inspire young people with the TRUTH about AMERICAN GREATNESS._But I 'm counting on grassroots patriots like YOU to help us today, friend._ _[_**Will you make your gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to help Turning Point USA reach MILLIONS MORE young people with our reporting**** _straight from the White House_****?**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zivr3nubn4schf8pgiud3mo6b1c89sajum0qpjmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob7chh2bs)_

Let me explain the MASSIVE IMPACT your support will have on Turning Point USA's work to hold the media accountable and report the truth. When the mainstream media tries to craft their false narratives, we'll be there to record the facts. When they dodge the real issues, we'll be there to ask the questions that YOU want answered. And when they try to indoctrinate America's young people to hate our freedoms or our country, we'll be ready to set the record straight for the next generation! Friend, you can count on Turning Point USA to serve as a BOLD and UNAPOLOGETIC voice for FACTS and ACCURACY - not Leftist ideology - from classrooms and campuses to the White House press briefing room. _**[_**Please make your gift of $25, $50, $100, or more to help us complete this NEW and EXCITING mission to reach MILLIONS MORE young people in 2025.**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zikkj28ii2c9333k31fma0q2hfrvifa35sniel5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob7chh2bs)**_ Thank you for your patriotism and your support. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zau2td24ao130gqni5s60dvh48kct6kuhmh9pg8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob2cth2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zelad8eb38ag6jihsf2hmagvbfksqbg8i3in2h18_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob2cth2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z21upo94tlb9j2tq74tal2en1pbahn3qtqfrjl10_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob2cth2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support.
