name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zggvugseko5og79fuk1cvbk1vnd39eapmtr95dl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1cth2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziak0f4e77v7m9tkprc0f5f5e00d2ega8q3b5750_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1cth2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb041cghrcuhn13nd0ja77rjufjbqfm28nmnboog_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1cth2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmu3ibvhp9jg4nnc132049617b7ghnjeir13cg9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1cth2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlm2218kvnu3cv32tttbpgt8dfl1rfdujp58gj08_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1cth2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm64m6s4tq9mus42s2p16jmvr1dtsahe6tdkrn50_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0c1nd94io0qsu0o0616ukucpden8bl78c91fp2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zirit7cl60mi6l2futlv4hek1utoc7g9p8ga35c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36cjgeapb5c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztfon1s6ar8omghe8t2a4eojrsu4t3tqavopopa8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6d2ergc1squl6g1304kimul6c5tulm178jv4joo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i64ob1c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:

Meet the fearless Turning Point USA reporter who’s now sitting in the White House briefing room.

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zkvo2di2f97g3q69n8n9bcto4kldp0jb0hj0aa3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i6cpj6cdh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf3abn00j75gngob5jj5nm420b4qbdbjmtpc4nb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i62oj2cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zre7pito37ajuafnub1sonuvur1boifoek37r1mo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i62oj2cjh2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0kjq2ogffe46osejs7s34m2dcu9aqas9df33bh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i62oj2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4s3im6o724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr4brtapu0pgdrm9e2o88fj0q0n9q1evv0c4ish8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i62oj2cjh2bs)_

name: Kyle Rittenhouse
subject: It’s time to go on the offensive.
body:
I never asked to be thrown into national politics. I wanted to be a paramedic or a cop and live a normal life.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj4jsu7fnfom2ufc6vivua97m4obgi1039o2vf60_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

I never asked to be thrown into national politics. I wanted to be a paramedic or a cop and live a normal life.

However, all that changed when I lawfully defended myself during a BLM riot.

My life was thrown upside down. I had Biden using my image in his ads, saying I was a white supremacist. I had the national media lying about me. I had strangers online cursing at me and even sending me death threats.

This is all detailed in my new book, _Acquitted_.

**_I’ve accepted my life is different now. But I will not accept leaving the fate of our country to radical leftists who want to destroy American values of liberty_.**

This is personal for me.

We must take back our universities and go on the offensive against the woke mobs who control them.

My friend JP Kirby started a youth organization called Student Rights Inc. They have a strategy to battle woke campus administrators, defend the freedom of speech of students, and promote Constitutional rights at colleges.

Students Rights Inc. incorporates the Freedom Method strategy to defend student rights on campus. More on that below. But first, here’s how you can help them lead the students who are fighting back on campus. [I gave JP my word that I would help him raise $38,000 online. As a personal favor to me, can you donate $10, $35, or even $100 today to Student Rights Inc.?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlqakm6enhnau23c31uf5l9p0u74p7hq86kurmug_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8aan3iog0avj6aaigj8bm9surmtgqr6g75aqaeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh71sc9fc4hoaheegpmopbtbg2pljpcubt774lv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc8hmbhpsqgclr3q6slelhfg82sn90a8drouqtr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdfn42g22bd82solo71gfm4d8vmcpe2sd40bd8h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z96ss7en9o0q1rj8j4cur73aj54hr379ec9k8u70_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Other Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9l8jt2s06o8g5cd4lmfc0vta9lpoeooh124csdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)
**How to defend student rights on campus: the Freedom Method.**

**STEP 1:** Student Rights Inc. identifies campus policies that violate students’ constitutional rights.

These can be anything from speech codes restricting what students can say and where they can say it. Or it can even be gun policies that prohibit self-defense on campus. Or, lately, it can be medical policies like forced COVID vaccine requirements.

**STEP 2:** Student Rights Inc. gives the freedom-loving students on campus the training to build an opposition movement.

Through the Freedom Method curriculum developed during JP’s years of policy change work as well as personalized coaching, Student Rights Inc. teaches students to win over their classmates, build coalitions with campus groups, and spread the movement on their campuses.

**STEP 3:** This one is the fun part. Student Rights Inc. activists go after the campus administrators!

SRInc activists unleash the coalition of student activists they’ve built on the campus bureaucrats who are restricting their rights. SRInc guides its activists through using the tools of political change such as phone banking, organized protests, media pressure, and much more until the administration removes the restrictions on their rights.

Students desperately need our help on college campuses.

Let’s not leave them to defend themselves against the woke mobs.

[Please send your urgent support today to help us raise $38,000 before the end of the month to defend student rights on college campuses.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjcvtchh345shodisf7f5t7ekfmmadn4q0ijojlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh2lf7hgdupj8c8qu21t3b7euh8ni1qrj03jdlko_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3gjcm1k6cskfcfpgj49mc0hj47j5r5k93f93hh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1p9ac94ntsovi25n3hua397e3p57qji6rp3ripg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2f36kfi1dcdog6mbjj1krls7h3t2bvuebapij68_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl6oj77315kulhooi6mah0lamu7939m9f29a4cg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

[Other Amount](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbmhun0nih5i915i9q31d1gps8vkbkjbai7h9icg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)
With Harvard’s president resigning in disgrace, this is a year where conservatives can go on the offense. We have the opportunity to reclaim our institutions from the radical left.

Student Rights Inc. doesn’t have George Soros billionaires funding them. They don’t have the media on their side. They rely on your support, which is why I am asking you to chip in any amount you can generously spare.

Thank you,

Kyle Rittenhouse

P.S. Students need help on campus defending their constitutional rights. I am looking to raise $38,000 for Student Rights Inc. to help them sue and remove unconstitutional policies at universities. [Can you chip in $10 or more to go on the offense against the radical left this year? Click here to donate.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ltufitclopbe9qo8jpfrl4d70ltu4gdsh284no_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o32chh2bs)

_Student Rights Incorporated is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to SRInc are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

clean_body: I never asked to be thrown into national politics. I wanted to be a paramedic or a cop and live a normal life. | | | "Tuttle Twins" Friend, I never asked to be thrown into national politics. I wanted to be a paramedic or a cop and live a normal life. However, all that changed when I lawfully defended myself during a BLM riot. My life was thrown upside down. I had Biden using my image in his ads, saying I was a white supremacist. I had the national media lying about me. I had strangers online cursing at me and even sending me death threats. This is all detailed in my new book, Acquitted. I’ve accepted my life is different now. But I will not accept leaving the fate of our country to radical leftists who want to destroy American values of liberty. This is personal for me. We must take back our universities and go on the offensive against the woke mobs who control them. My friend JP Kirby started a youth organization called Student Rights Inc. They have a strategy to battle woke campus administrators, defend the freedom of speech of students, and promote Constitutional rights at colleges. Students Rights Inc. incorporates the Freedom Method strategy to defend student rights on campus. More on that below. But first, here’s how you can help them lead the students who are fighting back on campus. How to defend student rights on campus: the Freedom Method. STEP 1: Student Rights Inc. identifies campus policies that violate students’ constitutional rights. These can be anything from speech codes restricting what students can say and where they can say it. Or it can even be gun policies that prohibit self-defense on campus. Or, lately, it can be medical policies like forced COVID vaccine requirements. STEP 2: Student Rights Inc. gives the freedom-loving students on campus the training to build an opposition movement. Through the Freedom Method curriculum developed during JP’s years of policy change work as well as personalized coaching, Student Rights Inc. teaches students to win over their classmates, build coalitions with campus groups, and spread the movement on their campuses. STEP 3: This one is the fun part. Student Rights Inc. activists go after the campus administrators! SRInc activists unleash the coalition of student activists they’ve built on the campus bureaucrats who are restricting their rights. SRInc guides its activists through using the tools of political change such as phone banking, organized protests, media pressure, and much more until the administration removes the restrictions on their rights. Students desperately need our help on college campuses. Let’s not leave them to defend themselves against the woke mobs. With Harvard’s president resigning in disgrace, this is a year where conservatives can go on the offense. We have the opportunity to reclaim our institutions from the radical left. Student Rights Inc. doesn’t have George Soros billionaires funding them. They don’t have the media on their side. They rely on your support, which is why I am asking you to chip in any amount you can generously spare. Thank you, Kyle Rittenhouse P.S. Students need help on campus defending their constitutional rights. I am looking to raise $38,000 for Student Rights Inc. to help them sue and remove unconstitutional policies at universities. Student Rights Incorporated is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to SRInc are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law. GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp7ol75apfhv1nr1knh449e1ncmknom3gdc9ht4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfr7pnj4ev9mrbk6tu748h5odo5i7h7cjaafju0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34clh2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3cpbv5or64p7vbinpgikbcatr2l36kkl2jeno7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpie1pb7c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdhvj9mvaqrhjblrqics9q9342125k1s9bm1m6i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34clh2bs)_

name: Senate GOP Alerts
subject: Here’s what President Trump needs to deliver his agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
**[Friend, for President Trump to deliver his agenda, he needs a FOUR-YEAR Senate Majority.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ZBwOKWIwXHBjrgjADVNRhg~~/AAVLBhA~/cu7y-a84J2E67EFWwck1XR1UkNgHaG_ISmiYq6wfsA8U9VbC2AawOqXs_7_ke3AjgL_jdjrAukMtz6BfOjOvFePzj2JZ34cq3csUyHkzKbX2qhKpl1KJa7O3pJeDCWJ9Ao2HCG_auX92TrN8xVkUP37GmhNspOQ2Ip6yrZqn3Ms_qP8zVFBnHfCpanCaI3P8QYVL1hkgG87QKXvaoj_rupSx3x2JO2bIS61HjBllkNB3Q_Fng4J1016GW4AJlHRvia4OPnn5HPwr3-LTJCTl-39xGD-cp7jIkvNd8tHja568TKaGCpJrc6q1N2UWa_iKOufOsPgNXvhUUf_MtkqmwqiDh1U61-MY-9GasKVw1Bo1Ue2yu3N9-djCo3MNazmL)**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: In honor of the President-elect…
body:
What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh13jprrp1kp3v0mt14er9siombr1859vond5f6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34cjh2bs)
---
Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn444mk8jkip8hjvl71beaio7rtifv358k45ipv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34cjh2bs)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z287r55asu4d721v8fp5l1f431fpogqug0fm3pto_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1bg5bkrnbidn4ge7mr4d9lt8ga404859n7d126g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34cjh2bs)

---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! _**[Please, Fellow American, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I'll send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4lrg344as4b5d1bse1qq80032kghb3ogiogdtu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za86l7um235gm4l9d3tbvpg7t55f92r6b0qjf3ko_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34cjh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqgobao7piiqm3jogrld7clmb4fmqcktppbmk3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i66o34cjh2bs)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Brand-new prophecy resources
body:
Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdpddggani8b3uc1j44a20aee7egf6iha08gjc00_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i6eo74cdh2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd1ro0mbb5lae2b89f6nbcu0hqd18fkg3blpdhp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i6eo74cdh2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z60pao7mt6n7upkfqirveus35qnd58ohbmm9jg4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i6eo74cdh2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za8u0n2mkls6siqnf0rsrbrb9d84kjir4pap6apo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i6eo74cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4s3im1pb24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdgb5g8aajdjmgcqg3t8ti85li150bg2qd95piq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i6eo74cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp77t3e5trht8m0o7925p7amnvm6jfir9aip8jfo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cjg68pr0shhm49fg)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Coach Tuberville Won’t Back Down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter.

| | |
---
|
---
Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter. Since arriving in Washington, he has been one of the most determined conservatives standing up to Joe Biden’s disastrous policies. **Now, as he prepares for re-election, it’s up to us to make sure he has the support he needs to keep battling for America.**

Before politics, Coach Tuberville built championship teams on the football field. He knows what it takes to win, and he’s brought that same leadership to the Senate. When it comes to standing up for our conservative values, he never backs down from a fight.
---
---
He proved that when he took on the Pentagon’s outrageous policy of funding abortion travel with taxpayer dollars. While others stayed silent, Coach Tuberville stood firm. His pressure ultimately forced the Pentagon to reverse course — a major victory for life and for American taxpayers. Now Coach Tuberville is leading the charge to protect women’s sports from being undermined by radical gender ideology. His bill to enshrine President Trump's executive action into law is common sense, but Democrats refuse to accept reality. Thankfully, Coach isn’t afraid to call them out and fight for policies that promote truth and fairness. **Sadly, the Left is already gearing up to take him down. They know how effective he is, and they’ll do everything they can to defeat him in 2026. We can’t let that happen.** **[**Will you step up with a contribution to help Coach Tuberville?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr7h9i9rh0b2n4bpqj78f6h2csudabjlhkjtagno_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i69or1cph2bs)** _The Senate Conservatives Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. It's the best way to support him because we don't use gimmicks that secretly redirect huge chunks of your contribution to other committees and digital vendors._ Coach Tuberville has never wavered in his commitment to our values. _**Now, it’s time for us to have his back.**_ [**Support Coach Tuberville today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5sm8fh0tie48gkcr0aelja7h25rs9a7qb75nn70_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s1i69or1cph2bs) Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.
---
|
---
---

---
---

---

**Hello Patriots,**

As the chill of winter sets in, it’s time to upgrade your cold-weather gear—and we’ve got just the thing.

Introducing the **[Roam Tec Heated Scarf](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20220/6374453/192d89a7ef19d91ae0c6d4db0fb07497d715e0bd/2f56cbbf4429224269f7333d4dd5aca2cb7e1576) **: your new best friend for staying warm and stylish, no matter how low the temperatures drop.

**Why You’ll Love It:**

* **Instant Warmth** : The Roam Tec Heated Scarf features advanced heating technology, providing cozy warmth with just the press of a button.
* **Long-Lasting Comfort** : With adjustable heat settings, you can customize the warmth to suit your needs and enjoy hours of comfort on the go.
* **Sleek & Stylish**: Designed with both function and fashion in mind, this scarf complements any winter outfit while keeping you snug all day long.
* **Perfect for Outdoor Adventures** : Whether you’re hiking, skiing, or just strolling through the snow, the Roam Tec Heated Scarf keeps you toasty in the harshest of winter conditions.

**Limited Time Offer!**

For a limited time, get **up to 40% off** your Roam Tec Heated Scarf! Don’t miss your chance to experience comfort like never before.

**[Shop Now and stay warm in style this season!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20220/6374453/192d89a7ef19d91ae0c6d4db0fb07497d715e0bd/2f56cbbf4429224269f7333d4dd5aca2cb7e1576)**

| | |

| |
# _Weekly Update_
The halfway point of the 124th General Assembly is quickly approaching with next week being the last full week for Senate bills to be heard in Senate committees. After this, bills that have made it out of committee will have to make it through second reading and further amendments. _**[Click here for more information about second reading amendments and more updates from my office](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd541df83b4dcb43a005c107190c58e94636593036c090530e43bde098798e1c95412518a9faf5af2566e34dce5c1be00b "Click here for more information about second reading amendments and more updates from my office")**_ In anticipation of upcoming deadlines, my colleagues and I had an eventful week of committees, hearing **26 bills** across the following committees I serve on:
* [Tax and Fiscal Policy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bdadb5a80fe3fc02fc0b7148a012b4ed47c83034f9ec81871bc491420a1b7196b84212b85375e41f8cd3d5f2030df35315)
* [Pensions and Labor](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd530572f99d8989aad17709b40aae0af9386ec2a7410d4dad4c11a9c6f56084b588a2b7ab383b8441c293d714f27e066e)
* [Education and Career Development](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd5bb3a861fb70c5f58250d1d387545c1472c06fdeb6a6d106072973cde772f4c7d1ce11afdfeb1359f43a09c5b649b772)
* [Utilities](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd0de237b0eef821d3ea8318ad2a216a6685187c201bf39ba94b6759525d77bf9d1995e0f9e9aedbf6f8b061735245a665)
* [Commerce and Technology](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bdcebb4e1a1a47b03daf1754b34f66c921180ef422dcc2a6d77a7d1cbe22718f5d3cde35169f931c0a6e1b1a3534952907)

As we look towards the next couple of weeks, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream session, and more on [iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd2e4b3e555e1ff77b2845e140b643276b494848f7ec4313b9189e5d6abae76e703ff0924056cfc74902c1a7176dbf598f). Additionally, make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community.
---
#
* * *
---
|
---
| | | As a mother and lifelong educator, keeping our kiddos safe at school is always front of mind. This is but one reason why I am steadfast in my advocacy for safer roads and an emphasis on pedestrian safety, especially around our schools. **Unfortunately, we are in a crisis.** In 2024, I[ndianapolis averaged 2.4 incidents (injuries and deaths caused by vehicle crashes involving bicyclists and pedestrians) a day, and there were 40 fatalities and 873 total incidents just in Indianapolis.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd09499b6fb4b60759b662042e905e5dd12ceaa0a158326440f131224c9b6b6255b6334c36bc3d2a3199b138c718e9f366 "ndianapolis averaged 2.4 incidents \(injuries and deaths caused by vehicle crashes involving bicyclists and pedestrians\) a day, and there were 40 fatalities and 873 total incidents just in Indianapolis.") There have been steps in the last few years. From the expansion of public transit to dedicated lanes for public transit, there is a movement to make Indiana a safer place to call home. Despite these efforts we have made as a city, and as a state, to address the safety of all of the vulnerable road users in our state, there is still a big step we can take to protect our most vulnerable- implementing automatic speed cameras in school zones. My bill, [Senate Bill 225](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd61758817c9184b75c24a3cdc427727c9b7fb92746298721b6c9c330c2e7db54fe1d3d65a090cc4c560f6263c7d861ed9 "Senate Bill 225"), allows municipalities to adopt speed cameras for school zones and report the data to the General Assembly. Studies show that these cameras are effective at reducing motorist speed violations and also achieve a significant reduction in mean motorist speed; this means safer roads for our kids can be achieved when we support common-sense legislation like SB 225.
---
#
* * *
---
## **Memorializing Senator Jean Breaux**
---
|
---
This past week, the Indiana State Senate took time to recognize the life and legacy of Senator Jean Breaux.

We were so fortunate to be joined by her friends and loved ones, including her mother, former Senator Billie Breaux.

I am thankful for Senate Resolution 3, which memorializes the life of Senator Jean Breaux. Our state is truly better because of her commitment to every Hoosier.

Though no words can do justice to such a life lived, my extended remarks on the incomparable Senator Jean Breaux can be found **[here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd8f115515ce7e228cb5fe95803e9913272337d93bbdd804f1e4c8537436f1832b80f80a52f3cdb593dda56b074fc9ea2b "here")**.

The friendship and mentorship she provided me leaves me with an endless sense of gratitude, and I miss her dearly every day.
---
#
* * *
---
| | | | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd4915221a12f684819b4544897a96562a39468a203ab776f6fade8468634f5b56284c5c59c29a2a50a9cd75227d9b5257)
---
|
# 2025 Pre-Session Survey Results
Thank you to all of you who took the time to share your hopes, concerns and ideas for our community.

This feedback helps me best represent District 46. We are better when we use our collective voices to effect change. Thank you for your help in creating a better Indiana.

Results can be found _[here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd2a09f5f0619d468285dab05d8d07a9230f388f8b9a06f48a13bb8878c31aebafea5cdb55c22897267817b1cab7f18666 "here")._

---

|

# _In the News_
[Indiana Senate OKs anti-DEI bill that takes aim at state agencies, schools |](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd8fe4df3228efb985339528b6b859dae9b22f88eb7fd42d6fdbb715413b565e34215bd36cc73777047a336540b0eb45d1 "Indiana Senate OKs anti-DEI bill that takes aim at state agencies, schools |") _['I can say what I want to say' | Indiana lieutenant governor's posts draw outcry during DEI debate](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bdd49f5e4688e32e7e47adb182a184410e5f7378263fae473fe1df9aebb1ceaffcc62c83686f11178d3e91cdadfb848825 "'I can say what I want to say' | Indiana lieutenant governor's posts draw outcry during DEI debate")_ _[Committee revives measure to allow chaplains to volunteer in schools](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd9172287e3fbe5bf53664070e7e346c71e0d00b344fc7280b7800193f130ea5bf387a35d234b283902efafa52821a7f00 "Committee revives measure to allow chaplains to volunteer in schools")_

To view my community resources guide, [_click here_.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=8b00817ea42fa5bd38a91a463032482fb6903abb1d0f6e836ea4060a5c5f9088eb6a246bb3a2873d6b180b195d43d7ee9146118cccf55ded "click here. ")

name: Troy Downing
subject: I want you to know my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’d be honored to have your support

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Peter, it's Troy Downing. I’ve spent my entire life fighting for America - from overseas in Afghanistan to at home as Montana State Auditor and now a Congressman.

I’ve always had a strong sense of public service, which led me to join the Air Force after 9/11 and inspired me to run for office. _**But being in Congress is a new challenge I can’t take on alone. **_

[**Peter, will you take a moment to read my story and chip in to help me in my first months in Congress?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._NveZA)
---
[ READ TROY'S STORY](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Thank you for your support,
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Troy Downing
---
---
|

name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Why chemistry?
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkT2L3DAQhn-N3NmM9eG1CxcHPkMgdwlskdJoNSPvgGwJS96Qfx8W7i51ypkHnvl4f70tb5YD7-u73WjknJcjL7td7hxC7e60cS7HnxofuEiQpgZZQ7-0FY5Gtr3vKxrbixqgNdpAdR9bHKxF703fem1U35mL6fzl4gd_A9BDxePTAxL6FvQAsgFAwt4afcObJY9Cw5nQFmp4z4yUXYwpxcCFXW7isVZhvJeSslAvQs5CzpnceRA2z50z2kAN4Snk_FULOaeDd8cpUK6j_3eYUHN2Qk0Ane7eQWr5vTXTj-n19Spkd5ZtyfE8HAk1pSPmRK7wvn6gjZDPTaiJNsvho-nsliyvu1DT15QFH_iJ415oL0JNP1_qb9dr_fmN6hgx_eYQOHcXoWF9OhsXt6r8RyyPUf4NAAD__yaQmI0)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkT2L3DAQhn-N3NmM9eG1CxcHPkMgdwlskdJoNSPvgGwJS96Qfx8W7i51ypkHnvl4f70tb5YD7-u73WjknJcjL7td7hxC7e60cS7HnxofuEiQpgZZQ7-0FY5Gtr3vKxrbixqgNdpAdR9bHKxF703fem1U35mL6fzl4gd_A9BDxePTAxL6FvQAsgFAwt4afcObJY9Cw5nQFmp4z4yUXYwpxcCFXW7isVZhvJeSslAvQs5CzpnceRA2z50z2kAN4Snk_FULOaeDd8cpUK6j_3eYUHN2Qk0Ane7eQWr5vTXTj-n19Spkd5ZtyfE8HAk1pSPmRK7wvn6gjZDPTaiJNsvho-nsliyvu1DT15QFH_iJ415oL0JNP1_qb9dr_fmN6hgx_eYQOHcXoWF9OhsXt6r8RyyPUf4NAAD__yaQmI0)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Inside Scoop Politics
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4z-HBwnRdcqLPFHXrc7pzA~~/AARclBA~/49VrBFiB8pWC6hFHXCdHqX9yS4MlOJQRt0y2ym8XyaEALUHXnM6KDr9x-V_8AMpUsUWuJErLrGzix5HICk1VP4g9jm3koWZXlgt1X_IzfPhJPS5MzTl1Bky690sjBJykWk1C1wZ7dAFF4_WJaZHxeq62wr4mlO40dyi9WIA8ufbGPQ-a676Q8aeKPKEhYi_c3_xA0qmdsgbN1q5VMcgDuyatzqTakNzOcEvsY4yewZjZHFOUOqbMdSDUQgTCYE0Y5vvzl7rZgn-uyWSwnV1rtLo3zl-ej-lIGMUQBtWOtdWp_qJhIsZnmm_FL2_8wVQnnqG1frQ8POiHlnB1bIJEgA~~)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4z-HBwnRdcqLPFHXrc7pzA~~/AARclBA~/49VrBFiB8pWC6hFHXCdHqX9yS4MlOJQRt0y2ym8XyaEALUHXnM6KDr9x-V_8AMpUsUWuJErLrGzix5HICk1VP4g9jm3koWZXlgt1X_IzfPhJPS5MzTl1Bky690sjBJykWk1C1wZ7dAFF4_WJaZHxeq62wr4mlO40dyi9WIA8ufbGPQ-a676Q8aeKPKEhYi_c3_xA0qmdsgbN1q5VMcgDuyatzqTakNzOcEvsY4yewZjZHFOUOqbMdSDUQgTCYE0Y5vvzl7rZgn-uyWSwnV1rtLo3zl-ej-lIGMUQBtWOtdWp_qJhIsZnmm_FL2_8wVQnnqG1frQ8POiHlnB1bIJEgA~~)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4z-HBwnRdcqLPFHXrc7pzA~~/AARclBA~/49VrBFiB8pWC6hFHXCdHqX9yS4MlOJQRt0y2ym8XyaEALUHXnM6KDr9x-V_8AMpUsUWuJErLrGzix5HICk1VP4g9jm3koWZXlgt1X_IzfPhJPS5MzTl1Bky690sjBJykWk1C1wZ7dAFF4_WJaZHxeq62wr4mlO40dyi9WIA8ufbGPQ-a676Q8aeKPKEhYi_c3_xA0qmdsgbN1q5VMcgDuyatzqTakNzOcEvsY4yewZjZHFOUOqbMdSDUQgTCYE0Y5vvzl7rZgn-uyWSwnV1rtLo3zl-ej-lIGMUQBtWOtdWp_qJhIsZnmm_FL2_8wVQnnqG1frQ8POiHlnB1bIJEgA~~)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: ~~ Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, __ | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Why chemistry?
body:
There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2a1330a4002c44578a59fc782d368579&_e=Dp75nRyPe_TgBOQQmO70PJQ41uRWxOPATqpajGWcnfvft_WdBPWDW2Cl3xcvqPyox3XNtmiPXLYG0KZWT3GigAg1NZeuoat7lyxF_wSOumfuO3Q2pVKoThryEVUIMaDgNDf2waHi6AXlGrQ_rk3CBGkPReqI9GQYYl60perruv5eDz8xDx8ovyE81OYVxvuG_Sf3EkFDcNNxksd7IYMz01MYRqOrItQeoGIxoRdVV7l_S5ddu2RFQ_R76vPB5dRFQg1MiioHIoiTwkfo3b5V5S64mYXdJ5e-uncP90c3Oca05PVTAF6iY0nr2T1xtWixW4FtnMeDf4iQrtcoNfRfFcEmydROx8-G3QP6s9s_WDe8StA9iguNLGBvlTCQd3fxisatDgRKVDX-A2uQnbHyzMhrt7brZLMxtSW-jOVSYYk%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2a1330a4002c44578a59fc782d368579&_e=Dp75nRyPe_TgBOQQmO70PJQ41uRWxOPATqpajGWcnfvft_WdBPWDW2Cl3xcvqPyox3XNtmiPXLYG0KZWT3GigAg1NZeuoat7lyxF_wSOumfuO3Q2pVKoThryEVUIMaDgNDf2waHi6AXlGrQ_rk3CBGkPReqI9GQYYl60perruv5eDz8xDx8ovyE81OYVxvuG_Sf3EkFDcNNxksd7IYMz01MYRqOrItQeoGIxoRdVV7l_S5ddu2RFQ_R76vPB5dRFMC1f7ZKvvS41bX3KokzlUgdyKTqCTl_fjeqKe2n7CLVJkskD5w55KekGuqGpzmpwd6137e8YR8fv4uhyEJ0hdC3UD-mkYVkvPSaS9Pj_HPLFV5EU24KZT5bvmCjyAfScCnjhE9LYPXVWWnbsdcUYbUypHUgC3CJq_9g2zzQF3-I%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=2a1330a4002c44578a59fc782d368579&_t=jZVVw6mAOK44VqcxodyTYko2q4480EzFWYsNhkn7cbck4g1e9Oj8A3pfMlj4CsTrqTYK8t98oWs1ulAUjgHcNCn4mvGZePJYzznb4zwwHwFcCmGMA0DsZmR6TlZbUuHb)

subject: Missing Plane Found, Tiger Woods Returns, a Golden Pager
body:
A plane matching the description of a missing Bering Air Caravan flight, which had 10 people on board, was [located 34 miles southeast of Nome](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3ogu1xjwwNAlW7p2tK7hEtPiHwFKlLev0r3jp086Ojpft_lGKaf9_kkbuxaPGQFHASjAzoFSfs2qDy4yIw89O2mGCSQqbfvVSTOpxWsK46LJwEKoSccpKml4AZJ9cm8aIFgpQYK-mCWGqDGqoNUAfuoUcEjtKJfvI-1t5Zhfx4PLxR9bn93a2lm74aPDa4dXOnd-1vf1HqUln7nD65ZqTftdUCq-UGyCMtUfEpWp-FVIECcfZ2bBi5q0tBbtyGFUfqIRTdSjDSpGA9QXF85nyjlVbToF941S_jNp_5V5OPwNAAD__3y9ZF4), Alaska, on Friday.

# Saturday, February 8, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1918, General John J. Pershing established the _[Stars and Stripes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFuwyAUgOHT4A0LnokxA0MXb-na0cLwSF5FAAFKlNtX7d4L_L_0fV2Pq6NE-fbpHmhHLAcIuHABXGxHcJTeh5qCjYiAy4RW6sUICWrdprsNYfNa4QKwyNPJU53-orzRZvPOrFpPZH9rAsQmpZBinfUZQ1whqrCqRXjDlMBAo7T5u1Aed4zpXZ7YZl8eU7L3MWpnyweDncGO2b99KhUDuVkaqbg0cuMlJ8o4ZxwMdtcG-YQM9j5c69zlwPtoVLHzjK9eXcXGYJ-aDfVFKVFfNVPi9nCU_q7jP4WnhZ8AAAD__5qhXsY)_ , a military newspaper written by and for servicemen, to boost troop morale overseas. Australia is known for its deadly wildlife, but even animal experts were stunned when a Sydney family discovered over 100 venomous snakes in their backyard. [See the story and the slithering snakes below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL8Gd1jrheC4oLjGXa690gKzxFwwRIYE5e9PSX_daEaaJ72fy3IxIYZ0_TY76erzgoAnDsjhvDgT4muRndOeCEl0pIdRTDCgVOdu00o5K6xfQciJxvVENFo5SBy9Nd6JqQv6_QYI52GAAVQ_Wu-8Qi-dkgLWiUkgF2o--t8cUt3Ix1d-0tGvee-i3mq9Fya-GM4M59Zav9qSqJX3znB-R4bzk1Le86PwksyNCvf5kRwPiW95p9wSHYVbs95e5vjU5lHqYWIwDOfu0O7eQoyhqJFJuO4mxA--_qfjqfEvAAD__3Y-ZJs). This weekend, we're sponsored by [Timeplast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAQQL8Gb7bgwNgMDJWibOna0SJwxFeBjWySKn9fOa26db33dHd6H5fp4ijRcnt3GW2N6wQc-pZDy8cpOErPSTXBRkRA2aAVgzRcgNJjM1uPUlxHEY0RvVYmuhi1Fr3yEDwI0A3ZYxsHPgrBBdfdcI0haogqaCW5N0xxDFTXrftcaakzxvRcH7h1fs1NsnOtZWfyjcGZwZmWB-61q5SxJLfXQzqIPN9rnvb1vnlk8oTZUWKgj2HGQPfM5Kk4Cm1xW11w22cqv9y7XBzdlpfxB8XIW9nL6acCcGGGYVDGjM1mQ_milGjXA1P8dpx6_Vr_a_ew8B0AAP___XhwNw), offering an investment opportunity in groundbreaking plastic technology.
|
---
## Missing Plane Found in Alaska
A plane matching the description of a missing Bering Air Caravan flight, which had 10 people on board, was [located 34 miles southeast of Nome](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3ogu1xjwwNAlW7p2tK7hEtPiHwFKlLev0r3jp086Ojpft_lGKaf9_kkbuxaPGQFHASjAzoFSfs2qDy4yIw89O2mGCSQqbfvVSTOpxWsK46LJwEKoSccpKml4AZJ9cm8aIFgpQYK-mCWGqDGqoNUAfuoUcEjtKJfvI-1t5Zhfx4PLxR9bn93a2lm74aPDa4dXOnd-1vf1HqUln7nD65ZqTftdUCq-UGyCMtUfEpWp-FVIECcfZ2bBi5q0tBbtyGFUfqIRTdSjDSpGA9QXF85nyjlVbToF941S_jNp_5V5OPwNAAD__3y9ZF4), Alaska, on Friday. Three deceased individuals were found inside. Authorities were searching Alaska’s Norton Sound area Friday for the missing commuter plane, which suddenly lost elevation and speed before disappearing. The flight was [en route from Unalakleet to Nome](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbjwTFx4eI1dHntlmiwh-BdB5DtBOXvV6y23e5IVzpXOh-38UYxxfX-nx7s6ryNCHiRgBKuY6CY3qNugpuZkbuGneo7Cwq1uTaL08QqdJ7AAlpvwtQHNN6C5x4ummwT3WkDhKtSoMC0_TSH2eCsg9EdeCs0cIh1y-3nFte68Jze24tz67dHk9xS615E90_gIHA4jqNdJ7_yUc5d4HCiwOFZ5C8VpuwXeSrCk-WeaGWpQE4b5SApUfkimf1KyirV9U12YT9iSrGYXmi4Pyimn-_6V4uXw-8AAAD__zNyYOQ) when it was reported overdue at 4 p.m. on Thursday. Radar analysis indicated that around 3:20 p.m., the airplane experienced an event that caused a loss of altitude and speed. Officials said the aircraft was 12 miles offshore at the time of the incident and was in a holding pattern waiting for its assigned runway to be cleared.
## Hiring Slows, Unemployment Falls
According to Labor Department officials, the U.S. economy [added 143,000 jobs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2upCAcBfCnwQ7Dl6gFhZuN3Uy1yZYGBfQ_i2AAx_j2m7ndLW73S05ycnL-PqaHBg9hferdquLixAhrMGGYdJPR4O9JVEY5a5nllVW05T2hTMiu2pRmQsjGuKXh3WKoZETYXnLaSz232rUVqE8bYaSjlFAi63Z2xknmhJGCk6VHglgDJab6FSGUzTp_x7dN9RL3yqutlCMjPiA2IjZe11XvOXwyxEYb8JkRG1cbbNL-m86MtTEZU8H_4VecM4aAXzqcOt0fbpAgrDj7eJl4BXwGux8-3rsNBZsUj4xLxAKxUSc8DPT-1cAT8TEuYBD__SfOQyqweFslZY4LvIcsWyTIumvwX-PLT2e-FfsfAAD__8q-d34) in January, while the unemployment rate fell to 4%, indicating a slowing labor market that remains on solid footing. Hiring was [impacted by the Los Angeles wildfires](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAUhZ8Gb1gXjH8yMCSqPDVVp3a0sLkkpBgswLH89pWbudOV7vl0pPN9X4erss7624eaUWYTBg68psApdINW1u2DKLQ0iByrAiVrqxMwLpquuEsxatFBU2uG5sR5w9qpHuuuBaWhNl1dWHm0AYeOMWDQlO1otGm4EboRFUwnIgC1zSGWj2B9vqNxe3hiLKcwF07ec14Sqc6E94T327aVc_JHRniPnq6J8H4OHvfjqviD-fisiT7CmGjEJcRMc9BqpzgvLuwYE1Vao6ZMVADwAq2nD-VXFXe6-hc4o880qoxUZSoI71Wk5zPbL937J6n6MFlNqrfLIQ639IVxKaLUy2ads6lpiYDbrKz725H_8_qU_DcAAP__8396_w), frigid weather nationwide, and uncertainty surrounding President Donald Trump’s trade and immigration policies. Despite missing job growth expectations, the unemployment rate hit an eight-month low. Job growth was [mainly concentrated](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GOhCAYhJ8GOs3PDyJbUFxjt9deaUBgxaAY5Nb49hev32aamXyT7-c5Pk1McXt9m9XrGvKIgF0D2IAanYnpGgV1OniPnlOvWc8fwFBIRWetuDHALcjQuV7ZYKwInepASeaDMYJGfdMAQTEGDGTb2-CCxCCcFBymBxHgXay5tEuOW519SFd--9JOeaVJz7XuB-FfBAeCw3me7bTZ6S4JDjea4AB4R09wWLI9muL3XGqzmO3XlKu5R-1c10SLdvsZU4qH7ImA12pi-r-pn7TfGv8CAAD__5oeV5Y) in the healthcare, retail, and government industries. Wages also exceeded expectations, with average hourly earnings rising 0.5% for the month and 4.1% year-over-year, surpassing projections. Overall, [economists see no cause](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb_G7oiGgRgoKF6TLq_d0sIwkxBhY2E2Uf5-le23vLrS0dH5us7XkEvebv_DSr5znRHwLAAF2DmFXN6zHpNnIiQ1kpdGOZCoJzvevdSYwDhgZFBqii7RogyaYG04A7kx-w8NEKyUIGE6mYUTT8g6TVpBdIMGSrnXdnrUvPU7cXnXJ7VTrOtY_L33_RjUvwEvA17CvtHr-Fyf0XqOhQa8POpyCIp1q-tb5I1L6LlugilRC0U0Oqg9SfT2ve6ih5aZD7HoZM-WrA4cMZAz7CJISRa1clqGsfm0v3Ip-ZjMoOG2hlx-rfpflZ4efwIAAP__YLppSw) for concern about the economy, suggesting the Fed is unlikely to cut interest rates anytime soon.
## List: Five Unusual Ways to Boost Heart Health
Wiggling your toes, maintaining proper posture, and laughing are some fun and lesser-known ways to [boost cardiovascular health](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OwyAQBp8Gd0TLgv8Kimvocu2VFjZg9kSMZUgiv_3J6a-ZZlejT_Nzn-6WEm3rt314XUOeELDlgByGyVlK56Qap4P36GXjtejlCAJVNzRR92FwIzi5qG4YQ2hD662wopcSZzHP2JC-bIAwCAECuls_Bxc6DMp1SsIyMgXeUc3H7TfTVqMP6cwvf9yW_GiSjrXuhckvhoah2c49l3qdGJpLzNAAXugZmuhtqpGhaXl5HvtBhbaVv-1ZeM18zrlUHr09Pkw1ctqW9HSfJ1rXqwGv2ReGpjm029-UEpWuZwrWh6X0mVT_S_TS-BcAAP__usZocg), according to healthcare officials. February marks American Heart Month, emphasizing that heart disease has been the leading cause of death in the U.S. An estimated 61% of American adults could develop cardiovascular disease in the next 30 years due to increasing rates of high blood pressure, diabetes, and obesity. Wiggling your toes can improve circulation, while maintaining good posture and laughing can increase oxygen intake, reducing the effort your heart needs to exert to supply oxygen to your body. Other unconventional methods that promote heart health include expressing gratitude and practicing pursed lip breathing. Practicing gratitude can help lower stress levels, and, like laughter, pursed lip breathing enhances oxygen intake. [You can find details on all five methods here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OwyAQBp8Gd0TLgv8Kimvocu2VFjZg9kSMZUgiv_3J6a-ZZlejT_Nzn-6WEm3rt314XUOeELDlgByGyVlK56Qap4P36GXjtejlCAJVNzRR92FwIzi5qG4YQ2hD662wopcSZzHP2JC-bIAwCAECuls_Bxc6DMp1SsIyMgXeUc3H7TfTVqMP6cwvf9yW_GiSjrXuhckvhoah2c49l3qdGJpLzNAAXugZmuhtqpGhaXl5HvtBhbaVv-1ZeM18zrlUHr09Pkw1ctqW9HSfJ1rXqwGv2ReGpjm029-UEpWuZwrWh6X0mVT_S_TS-BcAAP__usZocg).

**➤ Senate Republicans **released a 61-page budget resolution Friday, despite House GOP objections, proposing funding for White House priorities on border security, fossil fuel energy, and national defense. clean_body: A plane matching the description of a missing Bering Air Caravan flight, which had 10 people on board, was , Alaska, on Friday. | | | | | | Saturday, February 8, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1918, General John J. Pershing established the , a military newspaper written by and for servicemen, to boost troop morale overseas. Australia is known for its deadly wildlife, but even animal experts were stunned when a Sydney family discovered over 100 venomous snakes in their backyard. . This weekend, we're sponsored by , offering an investment opportunity in groundbreaking plastic technology. | Missing Plane Found in Alaska A plane matching the description of a missing Bering Air Caravan flight, which had 10 people on board, was , Alaska, on Friday. Three deceased individuals were found inside. Authorities were searching Alaska’s Norton Sound area Friday for the missing commuter plane, which suddenly lost elevation and speed before disappearing. The flight was when it was reported overdue at 4 p.m. on Thursday. Radar analysis indicated that around 3:20 p.m., the airplane experienced an event that caused a loss of altitude and speed. Officials said the aircraft was 12 miles offshore at the time of the incident and was in a holding pattern waiting for its assigned runway to be cleared. Hiring Slows, Unemployment Falls According to Labor Department officials, the U.S. economy in January, while the unemployment rate fell to 4%, indicating a slowing labor market that remains on solid footing. Hiring was , frigid weather nationwide, and uncertainty surrounding President Donald Trump’s trade and immigration policies. Despite missing job growth expectations, the unemployment rate hit an eight-month low. Job growth was in the healthcare, retail, and government industries. Wages also exceeded expectations, with average hourly earnings rising 0.5% for the month and 4.1% year-over-year, surpassing projections. Overall, for concern about the economy, suggesting the Fed is unlikely to cut interest rates anytime soon. List: Five Unusual Ways to Boost Heart Health Wiggling your toes, maintaining proper posture, and laughing are some fun and lesser-known ways to , according to healthcare officials. February marks American Heart Month, emphasizing that heart disease has been the leading cause of death in the U.S. An estimated 61% of American adults could develop cardiovascular disease in the next 30 years due to increasing rates of high blood pressure, diabetes, and obesity. Wiggling your toes can improve circulation, while maintaining good posture and laughing can increase oxygen intake, reducing the effort your heart needs to exert to supply oxygen to your body. Other unconventional methods that promote heart health include expressing gratitude and practicing pursed lip breathing. Practicing gratitude can help lower stress levels, and, like laughter, pursed lip breathing enhances oxygen intake. . **Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/ZhUApzXKg3QlNpQIwTuVHjgXtaBbhFMX05Myb4EbhjoQK_5hakL4Swf8qjlA36XjWefvncLp0G8SrgT68tkoltpr18v-h4-odH8S6db9XG8WV-Bcgo4oNcRBqC64dLkGtHPG1uml_hHgFNlaa8LrB1Tx4-QfasoXeK5br1ouY73e3bz88DNTuom_G8PzBP8N4x_UBe5Y3D01cr64WHwJPb2kzO3TrZ0naS1bQ8oVLx_hA0-Ru0LAy_TUkwS21qZTshdP74-vhGCWxs0eatPNHgWGDbCEHzWKZzd6GgPoitOaK_bKg67QEiHwh5DyQGjUYZUhCiomK9MdSBMH-YsUqqLj2C27NpHETy607HPebxRAJh6fE4iSIBGYY1KPEk5AOGl-36GCm5f5uNe1tT2r24iYRjdkhiexpLS9TdwXzuIjQXltwgJo5Iu1owNRCICvCit-ymhBdK7qRuq8OHXEGvkMIW1L1T8mhcPMuOQoOvlTHHGrsZxJMweo2J7unQINJp0LRI1ahhOsyxPwhqsiszjk13T_Tw/YshdlegQ_cRgXC15XsRtPAllXq1CIiL_/5) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/qn3M__w1JK8RVj40f8Zimddt7OMztCYb_jHKhbqfDY4hbNZXq2qbrrOB7OHP-46dDj6dvFh8Si6aFL7Puz11CLqn_tVx9_j9VbuV2jT0LFawxacE1pIy7cwCItFW_LWiAJJFjOnsrCsmLDOVavmlyPyj3QYGHz2xHNRsqjOFyoCK25WYWtA4a52OIAHMTUQs7SGV0plKrNOZ96AUk3RoBoMYQ4tHH5KFSNspRORBx_RxB4KCoKgS-JOlvNc7sqR1g1attlslKcD9BUJdvRfnQ7gd3-LkXleIq2tIqlZsWblTQJKnG1SGfTy_h9Yv1VjUnhqTRkXKbCeYBGM9Zzy443nhWPw7WOFSORglFugWQZaazHE2fbKcdziXPPq9Jw4GyeLPtCgZrNTeGGa0zUfmMaZoOuYJLPJzjVEU0-jNc66-94Gzw06Vx9knkPp-_n46sjpQSftjEA-U5RAtU0lwzS3wWWnkbFQ5BOIkpgHsBbDj1D_YJXZ-gCloPH8B1Ib2QHE8tNrhhUFiMXEb6huI_gsgtsjsDw/jY6JCxYa3qJllfxuxIkRIQ6rfhM7KOD-/5) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/eNXNfnNy93vUqfy697_OYmSFzTW_Ug-tKWTXk49tBy6zYN54gvYmycBtZzM0g8orE37bVKeJ0mXnSiJfojW-4ZF9nyRFaUqNHZsq22K_LgnSamQ2n3Yk_u2x89PdZEuoCWuiOP2kx3DlC3u0_336gAPgc5b1rozZoENbnxGnx_lJlJ-UM7kZU0x1suOJpjCoOgu1dJWi9cePgIvwbl2I-U4XzCDLHBO-hZtarjvPkytk46Wr0mtlpBfOZAbCW48ZDBGhY_9f4KBgFYJgr51FDEaPyanbJlsmPaSbofSTbstwCANoLsGjwq0Q567oOLQtpm5NhbVblrzhNdMy7cI7CoUbg5NgWdldN0dafxrXOsxmcAUxwQOSW1d-DB8hPuyq2lTkqMhB2ydgfE-IcmyrwbikYGtWtAL_BpVBLucHpGiYT10kIOKuYUsWl3s965JQMK5pceNOTEKgr5ayRGuIAHgUDomHZhk_ICwHqVdLyHAREYfgGdJlzaTWVFCvBRDi2lRi12qnnl8cRe61ZRJo21yi6v8WqA/WTFmLEMH0KE5VMbzvH7QyYUXwtJW6VP_/5)

What makes [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/uVWpXFp3F4YLiRWUSsF7mZqnG1Mm0ffExCEGU1P5ZviLGHE9WlRPkg4Nxax1DhSXiZuVMm6qxy0BYa8BXb3jZlccX0_jebo7E8mZA_yFgS7-Q_TkEt_rxiQtWpu-0rQ7t6DMf6yjcuOAsTCqx6JaXg9a1MUFoJxgjbWukzBwtY58qgAVyRdsgfFxxxakXblbx4n6zO5Gz5XXfis3f4Ob8hyQvD4GIt1XaIqft-G6twkCK83GzTHwnMXxk731lqPQC2LhcFZZlvJnyk8766M_U4Tfgs9JDmPyztSfJnhNy2cCA3Z6Jg7j2XaVNReWQPGBl4Ic0MyP57dOI4NuGjxh1pqWHOFnqopD6aUCJTSji1S3kU31fgKbquxyaHLM59hEJf_XJd22_eqsD0zla4xdN8VJZbRlqmoNPklWqEdnU3GzA0T8vOSQVvSPR7bpbZC94Og3Dpht8Qx1a2VAS3GAlFqKx4wyIQVxn5uwkFP71yoVzCbQrZtdYR3d7kDFYVY2O62BDULiOGNun6BIGaTnKtCloEvJ6w/foEJLsoqBOmJ6W1ZWqoNVgAm5hXi8tUD/5) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/2SUXhIR2Y6QF-9PidTdJrOvyNp-uDqk81vN7SaKfYAbiEwMa0A5UUjTY05jfliYiYFZivJD3JR5kuIf-SXUIVcjkRgdYmk91AyLomzI7PuY7o23y5CzKwP9yIxyZjdq65upL2J8vhv18qPsH_7cypV3zmpT9-_2RysnCufl1nTY23nNZ8qX0R0VF5FK36Ktvbro28OgAyYio76DJnHfjQ-daIsdEQIDTOSzaWnxgwMF_l55rPB8yr0mZbuioAcmpnc97SWjeIPZjZSwhXzqEyzuB4vrUQ2-RO_rNohwRofMWpYCC8xROGnBlCyY22JsNZTgU9cwH4dV1XyB8p1KreZPqvA6TEORSnNav1HqC5hcg2rrrVw3WbqJbislL-Pp19npJYhqUMaFp7yCelXbNDWV79ZsI1GeJ9zPnJoPp9ieL4DRPvUXP6PhImeKleAbroA5jGy7zLxUJCLpnpRadrL2mJJ1a5in4WGU4I9xCMa8aw76D2hzdFX--q7xZjfI-e3sw7QclZwozxc2zDBGyN3tDkxJLGQ/Z3sxwyxkFVZfphgw5CkdcnU-hMo5MnsX/5) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/0YCL5gLJWUUbomrDIbf76Lsktv1eZTi8Gju0Dp8QSDgcE76Z8oAXLIJp_hBXwzYpJB_LJ0GLX8cyMR-7MYgZUvrAyy5kIzdchRSL8kwfbjHmPQImfm1N0mdmFvYqbAVDH09kMpdK3M6bZ92Wd0-m8KzYvgYGc4zBAysE6_fsnH5WVD0cTnrW8XjSFlao3JSCUI7eY3PDcz32LAztPWirZ-_zJyRgO-x3bXj4m22i-w10bZ4CFRlM8W7zppzwXPvuBbqz5W4Nta4M9BMfDXHDBzv4rpryH70N6DCV5Yr7MrUuLpNkWysh84v9wuAAi5xks-zCbJ5T0-BXua6sIXtajpkNYUxAExZurOcAM4rcXyqimiOmfHb2yJQSkAahpKmt7jg3PP0yUqAQKVAlICI_D4tSZJh4bAZhK9-krFU3rsOt085uy_tIve_RraSwx1tnnTlRIPiJPWmU33M2EFvhD_nwdnrUbmGUGzOU7zEqHYR8MCGRAJdiDei_pdQ5BadiBzdMwWamyTM6A3vYlTamC1RTlgANoA/vQFFKevScEYevi3ducaMHSUWDJ4KsZ5s/5) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter.

| | |
---
|
---
Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter. Since arriving in Washington, he has been one of the most determined conservatives standing up to Joe Biden’s disastrous policies. **Now, as he prepares for re-election, it’s up to us to make sure he has the support he needs to keep battling for America.**

Before politics, Coach Tuberville built championship teams on the football field. He knows what it takes to win, and he’s brought that same leadership to the Senate. When it comes to standing up for our conservative values, he never backs down from a fight.
---
---
He proved that when he took on the Pentagon’s outrageous policy of funding abortion travel with taxpayer dollars. While others stayed silent, Coach Tuberville stood firm. His pressure ultimately forced the Pentagon to reverse course — a major victory for life and for American taxpayers. Now Coach Tuberville is leading the charge to protect women’s sports from being undermined by radical gender ideology. His bill to enshrine President Trump's executive action into law is common sense, but Democrats refuse to accept reality. Thankfully, Coach isn’t afraid to call them out and fight for policies that promote truth and fairness. **Sadly, the Left is already gearing up to take him down. They know how effective he is, and they’ll do everything they can to defeat him in 2026. We can’t let that happen.** **[**Will you step up with a contribution to help Coach Tuberville?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/jsLVIUQkmUfk9nmapFXHlwB3nIX_wKNT_PMGtWSGL1RUZou74n6zP27uWXeWEjOgF-u26cO_F3ZwV4j0_T0VEUNCjquOJSkXuanv8Lt2t253NBPXN6ulFt_d0oJmbyMivhbuqof83_c3KAAC_C_L7Tt9PP4HMnWiga4RsSH3Coek0Nj9vBikKJ6_wtnOov6UzkcZ7rzMu1-A-pIPgmGebHS8GOhslc0Ynn57uZcDuX4MB5pfrYWIzPooWs7voEy7TF5RubN6LDqMmlN3ew1b8RuyRL_-BgThJBTfKfx8cOZEz6Ojzu2ZAP0TEA/PxNDT5vLDgjOVVIsg0BH5ODoKV9k7M7H/5)** _The Senate Conservatives Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. It's the best way to support him because we don't use gimmicks that secretly redirect huge chunks of your contribution to other committees and digital vendors._ Coach Tuberville has never wavered in his commitment to our values. _**Now, it’s time for us to have his back.**_ [**Support Coach Tuberville today!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/zoT-9AlNQV751wTnEg60mKhYLjT3Ze-a8wbfEVLAZK8XKLmhOfworQ7V84g7ZP24r-3F78_4MDjx7JoiWXzbk36KPqHM_W2vD0Q5RN8MU7Yv9zyaUhBpyAx6ZNnSK4zWs4m1gpvxBUzEH8EzeVm5AjvDXFzNNGU16Dt_MYhSJCIxrBW2D7oMHHsyiF5UevxdffKARRGFblUp9Ll0SAk-_cCJruIR1tk2RxW2d_tJhQteSisZwgvsZUDW0ZkHwa7rqIjuk61JkJzLl9NuICWSOsXEagAqe3fNdVz78BRJCMFri0y3NRjGTCSjkA/lchYkb3HUQQYTv4atZONk_wQHlkTJg1Z/5) Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.
