The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gUzJvYPqRpYwkbY9dtWu5Q~~/AARclBA~/6fgTxT81cxEE_9Pg1exUInDobCxXZIF0M6sMBzaKd39Ptf_rd0O8AiiL8xBsRIRQAbVD6aWS3Xbwzyv6YfX3CqHR4jnxRzZjTJdQ-PpyR5UVgwWvoCShmbgruDUeRI8bGOFd86deJp6NZEPUH4bZ-QMm8S6S9CaZ2MRLJIkmjQ8lzjFPy2HOZC3Lck_BATDYP8qts_4xK0I4AFMlIqPnQ9tGi_pnCnpFm8S455lvF87GRbH_5TCSqSbItAiUZ7a61_98p9_mk5J9sb8ZLsipec4xXy0eYytLCxN3rI5drCprYsfr1YeAcjaz7xT-wIlGaO2OYvPSR5rbts34-AJ8OHYWOrWKMUXGgW_KU8EM3lyMZBJ6qoB7IpHBVmAkuxvuRF9gxRLDDGMu31FNC8_tKA~~) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gUzJvYPqRpYwkbY9dtWu5Q~~/AARclBA~/6fgTxT81cxEE_9Pg1exUInDobCxXZIF0M6sMBzaKd39Ptf_rd0O8AiiL8xBsRIRQAbVD6aWS3Xbwzyv6YfX3CqHR4jnxRzZjTJdQ-PpyR5UVgwWvoCShmbgruDUeRI8bGOFd86deJp6NZEPUH4bZ-QMm8S6S9CaZ2MRLJIkmjQ8lzjFPy2HOZC3Lck_BATDYP8qts_4xK0I4AFMlIqPnQ9tGi_pnCnpFm8S455lvF87GRbH_5TCSqSbItAiUZ7a61_98p9_mk5J9sb8ZLsipec4xXy0eYytLCxN3rI5drCprYsfr1YeAcjaz7xT-wIlGaO2OYvPSR5rbts34-AJ8OHYWOrWKMUXGgW_KU8EM3lyMZBJ6qoB7IpHBVmAkuxvuRF9gxRLDDGMu31FNC8_tKA~~) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gUzJvYPqRpYwkbY9dtWu5Q~~/AARclBA~/6fgTxT81cxEE_9Pg1exUInDobCxXZIF0M6sMBzaKd39Ptf_rd0O8AiiL8xBsRIRQAbVD6aWS3Xbwzyv6YfX3CqHR4jnxRzZjTJdQ-PpyR5UVgwWvoCShmbgruDUeRI8bGOFd86deJp6NZEPUH4bZ-QMm8S6S9CaZ2MRLJIkmjQ8lzjFPy2HOZC3Lck_BATDYP8qts_4xK0I4AFMlIqPnQ9tGi_pnCnpFm8S455lvF87GRbH_5TCSqSbItAiUZ7a61_98p9_mk5J9sb8ZLsipec4xXy0eYytLCxN3rI5drCprYsfr1YeAcjaz7xT-wIlGaO2OYvPSR5rbts34-AJ8OHYWOrWKMUXGgW_KU8EM3lyMZBJ6qoB7IpHBVmAkuxvuRF9gxRLDDGMu31FNC8_tKA~~)

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Get “The Great Principles of Chemistry” on DVD
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/HHlV63a7-1FDfcUsAb0He6XyYbWqZl6uBrQiXQ1ndpwCLhd3-cN-9SM3vwZgRGEQZOJJHjjN34i9Avx6-_9pN5VcjbhsQd16cb1fTf9W4s9Rw-EvhxL_GzF-gG-q6gG8UgGFplThHyFwcKSBe7jIXouM-LFPil0BNUUvj12bkJxLrsL6bsMjn89iAXwF4RNC75GkFUIYOum-FAyEYveLfmGil3f08HncGZBH8Mm3i2t_AD-GoxlvxYtSUbcuhSURkwVc2RiUmhOcGPkBIREdqVbZF5O8O26HSNk1lHsqi-l4YGRRkuRVTfq2_8di6yazm5g0B9mGW5AKg5cMv3tNOuo59yvYZMHN0Ecvzojh12b0o8au3ml0aJsqO4F40-_ITpEtKS4X7NQ6H51_rAY5a93jX1Hdl6uasaZZXcoCG-Jd5EZO1czm0fy5XtV_F9QEAJ1_8D4vNr0QJa4vH0SS9w/Lo70Qbpf1tHx_PTunx4r1XW8WvJOypO3/5)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/XRGU8j2gK9x1qTq7BlwsUq_G-5u6BnmkdYj3x5yuwJqdyn0i5LovRuZSt-geXRtc7VyJNwUOgRx9A5FUPLAMTAxo-N69rSLoKotYyB0n61y9PPoECCjVPvoUfLLl1SNnzvzhfD7r-3YX3iXdTUKll81AIz20Uo5NFT1skLgatV_rN5oNSfEhoyE7lOSHNdvowRWEY30eEhm-9SZfhoJ5tHuKDbnh6F_Vnpg8M_qFrc5O2wMMwUNACRrTrBhf0-gD3u0Jn1FdkLLRRcmw9Mfs2Z5BWXuM4Fc1tKIQUmzn9_36QPSGqoNi2DMeErBW5OFgry2EifEu8s_cVv6hWJHheKpXcdqXrjLxxm_Ng1kTVZxIyXxbrzg5jbsP8TnELRFTNQEzIICKbORuwIQ6bqBHjJzjophx32jSM4Awz4hLmsF9BE6vN1MQcpjWTE92f7MAqryJUPHIfdQZl7YdHWiAww/Tw-u24MolANBOEjKPv_qYKl8XWvSXM1Q/5)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Full Mag News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/u/4kkq5L4lsOJzCPQIP2FfUCAhB5YDS962MV2lloolieEqS-qao8UDSt78HKpKwI057U7ec_bw38rW2tlE0TwxVlxyINGjg0Cv0BRfBeCbpsJwRqKjppiGvDZreFDaQCHu9uAMsu5x1eB1E_FEBrRMZuUAt9-SggLpH0MMv3immeT910JBT_xUltC7r7h3JhG5PW5V_1ksxEYa5KReGY7TlnQ56BwuMqVMqg/U01f4tHcn39Mk5Rz0pPQUms9rAwTXO5J/5)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/vScVwK9puhKkGS1QRhbVp1eESzQcCPDrSFFbsinj_lfUJlw3IxUYLC1LEyPWS-Tuth1dkXSMii3mc8PiFNJ-mX0nNMegQHvyfrLkWbaBqiGyWjLgw2p00Ard-qYi05hqRmsoTGYa87wptUhqS5N46mbzJD6_NtLqAeRgeTTeNn6PtR80DCpOyghIVWC48LMBp2SG5BE64MJwcUnXAQSm7qYhHzjbs4Zctvn7SLLuZIaiH9qJYD9XeoKi3jSwak3lE3X7cdrFCRJxhFs2UxdSOn_1cUDpy96Q79gbaE-FL9ORfVeY2k4Ww5oBhSqLMMQN9In6r8dEaqn8bPmIPBfF9OdZkDRzBJOvD441M5L6svOXrmvQN0nwt8HuRdhqQfcJdrJCykealmNiOYx36YaQvbt72WKV0KJCexvYBrelsfrAz_wc8NgBLzeIMDuYJK1RPyqBJKoW4e4r0d22N_2WWLwEmvGbNNrHUHKSvDo4dcey/q-krGV4DMCP8R2A85BNuMhLyOPaIcTG2/5)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/TsAbIyvlHEU72x8YCEuDbfanToOA81Fi5EK32c0PkNssdDj6l2rxC3B5OXqJdzA1gBLvNBLxUl1w_KhAhicEdTmLFjDfpU-KAQVifQtirfqRuiiSVs0iN-thqWC6g4Klh2LrtiAvkiuWFCRAQV9WnFSSKFpiw0sFOZYfYi-i0E1MVAK-D88kBadSCTOk0U8zPapgr6i_n1GVVpQ_aBn6zz4UQDosOxUDsMAbwgS3FN09yhneiIGoWR9p-_LThFi3-eLUHMNKY-vfqQPscPzf7IcPcmodHxEICVCT0wWgxSNybosxJFlSqyaQeYDSpBYdXSaER0sxuYPAl_gFyeGG6ebP0e8obhnjSFQhKQC9NEXDHWw62NAf2cWRvW-3AXIuTBhzt8JwdGeEbzXNhy1KRRIfzO-5lQAfDZ7GvaYJzw5qV0WGnyq0Q3qyVqiaevLhHxGOPkSH1z4LWx-Q_KrvNHTSjLp-d_ygmffxIB5sEafT/1pIvAv3eM5sXM4Ax0qIlcUOyRuoeJsQT/5)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

clean_body: It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Just think of it... ...Tish James will wake up one morning to find out that a 600% MATCH was unlocked to FIRE HER – all thanks to patriots who were sick and tired of her legal warfare and chose to donate $1, $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, even $250 to stop her once and for all! Friend, and it could be your grassroots contribution that helps us unlock this match. ~ ~ Thank you, ~ Michael Henry Republican for New York Attorney General PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Winter Blast Coming, Teacher Cert Investigation Expands, and Flying Super Bowl Snacks
body:
Temperatures across Texas are set to plummet this weekend, with most cities seeing a [20-30 degree](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAUBOBfg50GHrhIQXGN3V57pUHfYyVBMEjW3fv1F7e_eibzJfNzn-4uxJAe324jW18-T8Chbzm0fJjQhfieVIN25mhEQ1Zoabi4CWGa1Uo1970GIi0B5Q0WIRUYMD2g9IC6CfYa48AHIfpBqA6RnFbKSy_MvMzIFCcMNZeurlTp5Q4f3_lJpVvy1kS71rofTH4xGBmM53l22_twyaWaU8hXicGY6DyulFxdqTAYXalhicRgXHLE1pecausL0S-1H6QFLtSguez2dW-Kxf0MMYbjppnij82F-PHrv4c8LfwFAAD__0kjYx4) drop overnight tonight.

# Saturday, February 8, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1830, José Antonio Díaz de León surrendered the last remaining Franciscan missions in Texas to Mexican authorities, secularizing the missions and opening the land to colonization. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GurCAQxvGngU4zMyJKQXEbu73tKQ3IuJKgbJSs69ufuP2p_tX3S76fx_hwMcXt-d-tbMtnziMBtRVQBf0YXEzXqGSwHoJByRa7xgBqRCMXi_OkTMd6oh4dG9aN77RG8KB8y9DKaG8MCHrEtkdVh8CuU2puZjR-8kEo4BBL3uuycOGPO-Z05Tfv9ZRXmexSyusQzT9Bg6DhPM-6HIvLW4ob13l_Chq-qyq4q_LXHUEDb2W_i4Ryt-F1xpTioTuh4Lm6mL54-fPt29JvAAAA__-dRlcx)) Speaking of missions, San Antonio is one of this year’s [top 10 cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72O6jAQRp_G6RzZQ_5cuLhNOm67ZWR7JmQkByM8EHj7FfTbfp90js7PeTkHzny9_A87eXmtZQEDvTagzbRg4PxeugZ9NOhsQ96OJ2fsYK1rNj-FNIwmDdhPCBTX4IzBFFzsA6TJjQ37D8yAmaztJ9u1iBTGrltPq3UxRVSdIWQp91Y2EnqFuuZ3edK9TWVvst9EblWd_imYFczHcbTCO5WHfH4F86MGBbNsfL1ULUVjUTBHqqITC9N3e3Jl0XzVspF-1Obu8XZwzlyHUXXmsgfOX5382f_08BsAAP__8xRfKw) to visit in the U.S., partially because of the many missions you can take in there. See what other Texas cities made the list in the roundup below. We're sponsored today by [Sundays](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zz9vszAQgPFPY29Bd4cBM3jIEKY3b6W26p8JGc4GSyaOwE3Dt6_Svfujn_S8n_uzDTFcpv92cSbffeoJqDoAHUD3bEPceyXZDMAtSmewKVvAGrGVsxn1oJG0a0khcK2HEsqxskAeyVaukcE8MCDQiJVGVTA72yjlS4_tMA4sFDgOOa1Fnl12d7v5uKebW4sxLTKaOeerKI-COkHd9nVhu28-rZym7VEI6l5PH8eX7t_n09vpWa6Gr98hxrDVjVAwLTbEXyn_uXYz9BMAAP__ALZQVQ), the human-grade dog food that your pup is sure to love.

## Cold Front to Slash Temps
Temperatures across Texas are set to plummet this weekend, with most cities seeing a [20-30 degree](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAUBOBfg50GHrhIQXGN3V57pUHfYyVBMEjW3fv1F7e_eibzJfNzn-4uxJAe324jW18-T8Chbzm0fJjQhfieVIN25mhEQ1Zoabi4CWGa1Uo1970GIi0B5Q0WIRUYMD2g9IC6CfYa48AHIfpBqA6RnFbKSy_MvMzIFCcMNZeurlTp5Q4f3_lJpVvy1kS71rofTH4xGBmM53l22_twyaWaU8hXicGY6DyulFxdqTAYXalhicRgXHLE1pecausL0S-1H6QFLtSguez2dW-Kxf0MMYbjppnij82F-PHrv4c8LfwFAAD__0kjYx4) drop overnight tonight. Super Bowl Sunday should bring a reprieve from the [record highs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO8yAQBOCnwR3W7prEuKD4G7r87ZUWNkuMjpwjQCZ5-5PTX7PSaqT5pPm6zTcXU_y5_3cPNvUV9pmALhJIgp69i-k9q86bBfyEHRschwnwijh1m1lxWC4-uEUhB6X8qoG0pglBDxp16KI5y4BAI140qt57dqNSYQg4LevihQL2se65rxtXfrkS0ns_OPfr_uiS2Wp9FjH8E2QF2dZa_11cPcPzZVc3zoLsqQiyQOcZBdnM65693NhV2dzBsjTmZ5EfQpDtsvHPFlOK5ToKBfeHi-lj1j9HOAz9BgAA__80nl17) seen across the state earlier in the week, as some areas reached the 80s and 90s. The cold front could [bring snow](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L-utCAUBPCnwU5zzhH8U1B8jd1-7S0NCCwkKAbJsvv2N25_y8kkv0nm57E-VIjheP5Xu5Xl7dJKQKIFamFajQrxs_LGSA1mxsZKHPsZcECcGy9BGISxHzVM_SAGZwQ6Gh0h14r0NDVB3hgQTIhiQt4ZY9XIuesdznrThnGwJpSUu-JtsW91ufhJL5u7Le1NlL6U82L9P0YLo6XW2m0-p-Nu72xV8TYzWlQuYYuW0fJF2hqOYnN7lZT39jpSbQlQoEDqTn82WZqzhhjDNYyMw3NXIX4Xy58XvCT9BgAA___asF4o) to North Texas next week, following Winter Storm Enzo dropping snow on the state in January, as the National Weather Service warns residents of a freeze threat. A snowfall would be almost right in line with the [Farmer’s Almanac](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGutCAUBOCnwU5zOIpCQfE3dvu3tzQoh5UEwQhZdt_-xu1vPZNvkvl5LA_jg4_P_-YgXd4uLQgoWsAW5GKND59laKxewSrekOZTr4CPnKtm1yM4hH4TgowT0krpVsuF2pQSK0xubLy-MUCQnAvJh85aMtMwuN5xtW6rZQOQ9SVdXdmp0NtkFz7pRVe3paMJei_lzKz_x3BmONdau-OTTTSxpOjTXWI4R6r5TsmUnS6Gs7mK3wIxnHNMtf26LQIXveyhO_ezubQ9qw_B53FiAzwP48N3svz5wUvjbwAAAP__3J9fDg), which predicted at least 6 inches of snow falling on Texas by yesterday, Feb. 7.
## 60 More Teachers Named in Cheating Scandal
The Texas Education Agency is investigating an additional 60 people who allegedly [paid for](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn8NbEY-YwIePHTJlq4d0eE7g1UDEXZx0l9fJXv373tPel-38YYhhm3-xJVtfvh9VFJ1Qiohh5EwxOeoa7KTJAM1W-hbI-ECYOrFuskAetJOaod-mszgoWsRLm4w3pCrg33BpJIDQDeAbogYe61968FMbqJKS6aQ96PJC2d-YPLxuZ98NG5f62iXnO-paj8qda3UtZTSbFxSYf5-DSp1pf2XtyTeV5EZ3cJHEg5_5iWLFVMKJwu3MOawzSI53AijUFL1fafqw9K9hBhDuvSVlvOKIb7N-d8Up1V_AQAA___WaGO1) their teacher certifications, bringing the total to more than 200 unqualified teachers who may have participated in the $1 million cheating scandal. Individuals now under investigation include 24 teachers in the Houston area, where the [cheating ring](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuwzAMRb9G3mToFT8GDV28pWtHg5Zom6gsBZYSJ39fOO3ahcMByYN7v67jFShQXD5hQ1uecxqVUBcuFBfd6IHCazSVt5PwvazQylb3QjZS9tVq29ZpKSfAzrhJ93rScyONcQpAd1JBRfZ8JpTopLx00tTeI7TGzHqW_eQmz4xATyXtdVmx4BPyHF7pgXvt0lYFu5Zyy0x_MDUwNRzHUbtA7lut6Z5LiucWU0PEIzM1hOQgMDWcTqYGoc7RnMDwvwMOOwIvCG7FPXPYUlx4I3jEg0fYMPN79Lhzig_MhRYolCKnyB3uhWZyv8CtCIXiwrOD6N_Sarf-dlAIlJuWGbFsQOGdovxb68OqnwAAAP__ELl7zw) was based, as well as [dozens](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHO4yAQBOCnwR0WC8TYBcU17v5rr7QwLPFK2ERmFSdvf0r6vxyN9Gk0_36Wn0CFjvvfsKPnV66LVvomlZZqXFKg8l5sl_yq0gQdenBmUjAATN3mncqjcXFFl9waox7NeAMEh1MyQ56wI__BlFYjwG0E26eEwVmbTYZpjWsSVmEirmfPGzK-QsvlXZ949rHuXfEb86MJ80foWej5uq7-WGPK16cWej7wakLPpcZQPrGevMkvIxlD3PBsko4nNqZ7YEwy4smUKQamesgWN9xR6Nm4wQI4oefu9OlxUSnUBiesuu-ByncM__rO0-v_AQAA__-haWjm) in North Texas cities, including Dallas and Fort Worth. Each school district is handling the charges against its teachers differently, with at least one [special education](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSozAMhp_GdGZsQ2IoXFxDl2uvZAQWoDljZ7ASkn36He9ssc02Kn59-jTSv9t4AwoU17-wo-PXkkajzEUqI1U3eqDwHtvKu0n5XlfotG16pa9a99XmlgVV5_vGNnayMGnlJwPWt_11wq7BriJXZMqoTutLp9vaewTbtkuz6H6aJy9ahZ44HTVvyPiCvIR3euJRz2mvgtuY71k0f4QZhBnO86z_Z-DSFGaIeGZhhpJIik_MTCswlqysFWZQphQrzJAhSoicIiWZ7zgTBIn-MQNTipIR5g0PCXuKq_TpA2OWj-jx-CEuIBX2BVnOeDAt9D0_bwhMcZUHxVWYoTqcv58UAuWrFa1ad6DwdRL_-uOnM58BAAD__zB4gsg) teacher placed on leave in San Antonio. The news comes after Attorney General Ken Paxton ordered an investigation of two school districts whose employees gave advice to parents for circumventing state laws on transgender athletes playing girls’ sports.
## List: 3 Texas Cities the Best to Visit in 2025
Three Texas cities made the cut on Time Out’s list of the [10 best cities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72O6jAQRp_G6RzZQ_5cuLhNOm67ZWR7JmQkByM8EHj7FfTbfp90js7PeTkHzny9_A87eXmtZQEDvTagzbRg4PxeugZ9NOhsQ96OJ2fsYK1rNj-FNIwmDdhPCBTX4IzBFFzsA6TJjQ37D8yAmaztJ9u1iBTGrltPq3UxRVSdIWQp91Y2EnqFuuZ3edK9TWVvst9EblWd_imYFczHcbTCO5WHfH4F86MGBbNsfL1ULUVjUTBHqqITC9N3e3Jl0XzVspF-1Obu8XZwzlyHUXXmsgfOX5382f_08BsAAP__8xRfKw) to visit in the U.S. in 2025. At number seven, Austin was the highest-ranked Texas city, boasting great barbeque, nationally-recognized events like South by Southwest, and of course, being weird. Dallas and San Antonio close out the list at nine and ten, respectively, with “Big D” leveraging its cultural diversity for great cuisine and San Antonio showcasing multiple must-see Spanish missions, including the Alamo. The Big Apple took top spot on the list, which you can see in full [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72O6jAQRp_G6RzZQ_5cuLhNOm67ZWR7JmQkByM8EHj7FfTbfp90js7PeTkHzny9_A87eXmtZQEDvTagzbRg4PxeugZ9NOhsQ96OJ2fsYK1rNj-FNIwmDdhPCBTX4IzBFFzsA6TJjQ37D8yAmaztJ9u1iBTGrltPq3UxRVSdIWQp91Y2EnqFuuZ3edK9TWVvst9EblWd_imYFczHcbTCO5WHfH4F86MGBbNsfL1ULUVjUTBHqqITC9N3e3Jl0XzVspF-1Obu8XZwzlyHUXXmsgfOX5382f_08BsAAP__8xRfKw).
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zz9vszAQgPFPY29Bd4cBM3jIEKY3b6W26p8JGc4GSyaOwE3Dt6_Svfujn_S8n_uzDTFcpv92cSbffeoJqDoAHUD3bEPceyXZDMAtSmewKVvAGrGVsxn1oJG0a0khcK2HEsqxskAeyVaukcE8MCDQiJVGVTA72yjlS4_tMA4sFDgOOa1Fnl12d7v5uKebW4sxLTKaOeerKI-COkHd9nVhu28-rZym7VEI6l5PH8eX7t_n09vpWa6Gr98hxrDVjVAwLTbEXyn_uXYz9BMAAP__ALZQVQ) [**For All the Good Boys and Girls**](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zz9vszAQgPFPY29Bd4cBM3jIEKY3b6W26p8JGc4GSyaOwE3Dt6_Svfujn_S8n_uzDTFcpv92cSbffeoJqDoAHUD3bEPceyXZDMAtSmewKVvAGrGVsxn1oJG0a0khcK2HEsqxskAeyVaukcE8MCDQiJVGVTA72yjlS4_tMA4sFDgOOa1Fnl12d7v5uKebW4sxLTKaOeerKI-COkHd9nVhu28-rZym7VEI6l5PH8eX7t_n09vpWa6Gr98hxrDVjVAwLTbEXyn_uXYz9BMAAP__ALZQVQ) This brand of dog food beats traditional kibbles 39-0 in a third-party taste test. [Sundays is no regular dog food.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zz9vszAQgPFPY29Bd4cBM3jIEKY3b6W26p8JGc4GSyaOwE3Dt6_Svfujn_S8n_uzDTFcpv92cSbffeoJqDoAHUD3bEPceyXZDMAtSmewKVvAGrGVsxn1oJG0a0khcK2HEsqxskAeyVaukcE8MCDQiJVGVTA72yjlS4_tMA4sFDgOOa1Fnl12d7v5uKebW4sxLTKaOeerKI-COkHd9nVhu28-rZym7VEI6l5PH8eX7t_n09vpWa6Gr98hxrDVjVAwLTbEXyn_uXYz9BMAAP__ALZQVQ) Their recipes stick to a short list of human-grade meats, fruits, and vegetables to ensure dogs are fed to a higher standard. Because every batch is made and air-dried in the US for over 11 hours, these tasty jerky-style pieces retain maximum nutrition to help your dog look and feel its best (while loving what they are eating). ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuozAQRb_GdEb2YIJduNiGLttuiYw9xCMNARkTkr9f5fWvvVc6Ojr_7tM9ENPz8Tes6Ot72SZQ0EsFUtkpBeLPZJrkZ5WcbtDroXNK37R2TfYqGms1dEN0XWeCU8k410cHDm-ztX1D_gtToKzWvdWmTQnDYMzSLdrNcU7CKExUt9LWjBXf4Vj4s72wtHFbG_a51v0Q3R8Bo4Dxuq425rI9v6-AMZ5cz4ICxoJMD9qeAsZQKkX-jpwOGfNZYpYV151RLoHKi_CSHK7jpCpBadMr27d73pvi034RMx23QRj1WAPxj0f9NczLw_8AAAD__2yhZho)) **➤ 1.7 million Texans** were unenrolled from COVID-era healthcare programs from March 2023 to October 2024, topping all states, according to new data. clean_body: Temperatures across Texas are set to plummet this weekend, with most cities seeing a drop overnight tonight. | | | | | | Saturday, February 8, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1830, José Antonio Díaz de León surrendered the last remaining Franciscan missions in Texas to Mexican authorities, secularizing the missions and opening the land to colonization. () Speaking of missions, San Antonio is one of this year’s to visit in the U.S., partially because of the many missions you can take in there. See what other Texas cities made the list in the roundup below. We're sponsored today by , the human-grade dog food that your pup is sure to love. Abilene ☀️ 85/36° | Amarillo ⛅ 51/23° | Austin ⛅ 87/63° | Brownsville ⛅ 83/69° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 82/66° | DFW 🌥️ 79/44° | El Paso ☀️ 83/46° | Houston ⛅ 83/69° | Laredo ⛅ 93/66° | Lubbock ☀️ 78/29° | Midland ☀️ 88/37° | San Antonio ⛅ 88/65° | Tyler ⛅ 83/54° | Waco 🌥️ 84/50° | Cold Front to Slash Temps Temperatures across Texas are set to plummet this weekend, with most cities seeing a drop overnight tonight. Super Bowl Sunday should bring a reprieve from the seen across the state earlier in the week, as some areas reached the 80s and 90s. The cold front could to North Texas next week, following Winter Storm Enzo dropping snow on the state in January, as the National Weather Service warns residents of a freeze threat. A snowfall would be almost right in line with the , which predicted at least 6 inches of snow falling on Texas by yesterday, Feb. 7. 60 More Teachers Named in Cheating Scandal The Texas Education Agency is investigating an additional 60 people who allegedly their teacher certifications, bringing the total to more than 200 unqualified teachers who may have participated in the $1 million cheating scandal. Individuals now under investigation include 24 teachers in the Houston area, where the was based, as well as in North Texas cities, including Dallas and Fort Worth. Each school district is handling the charges against its teachers differently, with at least one teacher placed on leave in San Antonio. The news comes after Attorney General Ken Paxton ordered an investigation of two school districts whose employees gave advice to parents for circumventing state laws on transgender athletes playing girls’ sports. List: 3 Texas Cities the Best to Visit in 2025 Three Texas cities made the cut on Time Out’s list of the to visit in the U.S. in 2025. At number seven, Austin was the highest-ranked Texas city, boasting great barbeque, nationally-recognized events like South by Southwest, and of course, being weird. Dallas and San Antonio close out the list at nine and ten, respectively, with “Big D” leveraging its cultural diversity for great cuisine and San Antonio showcasing multiple must-see Spanish missions, including the Alamo. The Big Apple took top spot on the list, which you can see in full . | Flying together with our sponsor This brand of dog food beats traditional kibbles 39-0 in a third-party taste test. What's your pup waiting for? Their recipes stick to a short list of human-grade meats, fruits, and vegetables to ensure dogs are fed to a higher standard. And unlike other human-grade dog foods, Sundays needs no fridge, no prep, no cleanup, and no hassle. Just pour into a bowl and watch your pup devour it. Because every batch is made and air-dried in the US for over 11 hours, these tasty jerky-style pieces retain maximum nutrition to help your dog look and feel its best (while loving what they are eating). It's time to try the Sundays challenge: let your pup decide between Sundays and your current dog food. We’re pretty sure we know who’s going to win. | ➤ Dallas: A judge has ordered that the former Tri-City Hospital be demolished “within a year,” saying the abandoned facility has become a “horrible blight” since its closure in 2002. () ➤ Fairview: The Town Council of Fairview is bracing for a lawsuit from the the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints (LDS) amid a months long dispute over the height and size of a proposed LDS temple. () ➤ 1.7 million Texans were unenrolled from COVID-era healthcare programs from March 2023 to October 2024, topping all states, according to new data. () ➤ Austin: Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller is warning residents about unsolicited seed packages received in the mail from China, saying, “ Folks, please take this matter seriously.” () ➤ Houston resident Andrew Taake, a Jan. 6 rioter pardoned by President Donald Trump, has been arrested—less than three weeks after his release—for soliciting a minor online in 2016. () ➤ Hundreds of Mexican troops have been deployed to the U.S. border to restrict drug trafficking as part of a negotiation to halt tariffs proposed by President Donald Trump. [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/qhWw2wDtpwNzBh8qldMAA6z-X1Q8rQZWh3JyDP26cQFqfgenQh7uuSwFn44yqb82b19TY1RQt2rw36cfjYr8HTKAHWZNLsLGd-MZa1fw3gZia4b1Oxm5SwiIAReQOUIbneyGM4nIRXQdMLVs9LfCf-EayqBTBX_X9RTpu3Eziop4WS1UVqGoQRJe--jTHJ6408qBx_QRxXhda1Tb1m2j77RLEE2lQaPy_fCJKrYEFi-4qvvMcj5iYRqxqEcrL-OpS3cKmbQV20cIwQwm6ndf3fc3WUWMkIN1CThOMy3_Ibbm16uNFquZu1hSwLJEtFMe7dhcBckFDeIetH4s6LFvftpnQ_jilN1T8wEWhTx2e8r9mYNX6iAW0mzpzHeI6jSeOr0xca-04F641Mjhpq0xHeignK1X6CJkbheEkLPEKVJ6BREYscc9t_jLiPMkB7ajhMhBJZgGi3-lK3box3s82h_Wgc4VetbjOZXad-xq3zSaEuz5YvVKgJpfmQ2seONjYSGKUBejnvZjtlXejeHU84ijXwoOEQ/alkW43ZlZ7jjJ1D2siUM-tD1PEyvxu4J/5)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/_xEb2XTUJgi4VEA1NEPp9CCAKjRM0VZOwMsImWdbnaH8tnsQgHOdk62NsCGVY1HPsoajPFhtX3AeUiWkhh7l7xfVeP5Lnpp2qQIvi5nnwzLdlM9JOub2XcmYJKlE3SaJ4XczNRgGvKYopxjTAgbSc6xU-I89hAVIMXcbryidlPBT1EPvTFD-fUT8lyQYZ4DQvgqimyL3E2QKtE9pWXIImvgvA4tkH7OIzp9h5-KBT8N0DnHIKDtlWjHm4w-g-MtVasrU14m1rNXdlRsq9Oij3EIfjJCzrG16bvxGMv1KTcTL1UwpE7FdtEWytISGRhvKlWdfQjZUo6JgsgvqMRwKiXvhOunD-AADLZNVoInM0v4VaPKnvT_L17ami_5dOF0wZZKs5t0UGAF37picSd9zTdEl5DqgnJTGSVAncZwhL1kHiya9OYcmCAPFvxOn0B-vgr3rmmb_L8Bb2NhaxYQcSy40WbB_tIKdyjJyjuE7i2aUhwZXjRqgRcT8llYnPYJ0ih-FASOvkOxLc19IrDI5wgvZ1sTmzQ/qGlNQLOJ58V54YJjiGKBI0WDoBDnarZ5/5) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/yOvt1D9VNJtVjRTzmck27IHY7FxQ_V9lUnhTXj4gX0EMcafr2rCyi7ikGGRCEENKG_vDpHZKR_SrCNZitnJEhADAyzL1e5cERryb9PZF63BGqz8MLqW8NruX0y8MfFuTceOkPPJKNEfb29yIHz-L3kMCiRggj6UtkuNYkAKSV44ifohAllC5j9ng72fHIcfCu4kJOthcg6jk_J4O-MEQyCG7-m-539KbV4koi5fzA-OkLcsoZbAa__yUvA_qn8ehkn2_2b0PWUDvVAE_3zIzayT9_I78msaDtp_I9Lkp-LaVeI3wQxqxPEr8g3qpS8xqHYIv7kj91JgygP_k0rMkaNoDeRlQAAQI1h9_CCljCDvyKrZui4DP7F6l4YrDXN0e70-Fd9FHgiG9moh6hhWL3fjoXgzgARdeO-846TNrnvdnzEQZWTAE08rVMM6S7_WiTfGhTHCvroIs1Qf9_wqtzg/Y70SaiPh0VtiX-G66j4zdxHgRArwJNym/5)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/dH0zQ-21BtrkO3z1AfPLQO_dYCG-j5nckuzLRWRtIJb39QYxtnJW-XtfUlYBCeiLKtPJlf79WiZnfSaSNPQIYwjU9ME1NqFU2sptGVBdXQqnaTvLCKFKjzlPqdrgRrCM0eC9w9Qi8aSxea2U_cw8qW9yr70bRNGONc1mzsHaFDR44h5wYAO7gSf_evc3fpJSdR_wmqZxFraXXlS474euGHZ7YWJqFd_MLRfuc5qmyuBJs3RXk1M2amDSEAt_tz0jvrtIvixILT5y_apu1vLWIEQcrKgJYy9qtKKSmRlk4itF31sm6UppxuK1bP5yk0pcGQ7DijYOOYHJU567hopENiAG6G1Si0Ke9l65a7YmXCY-0XLJqMSMBhb7jiXRv2kUbOeZmlCwuHmPhFnUZmZoHxZRgjSB5d3UiItYZQ2rnpdEUep9bzxtAZwub5tn0yPVL6PHvN1f2BF04fzHNflK4A/kiR52mOCh-ePtV2GURPmkzsJAT1kUiAY/5)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservative Liberty Wire

_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: History Facts
subject: The NYSE bell wasn't always a bell...
body:
In the 1870s, a new era emerged at the world’s largest stock market with the arrival of continuous trading. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dnksrfg9gqvbikj2f2u49vrysa3g0xvzg99msxgls1d0bo45ppr5m37vs3mz63p8vde01s7e75u579xcueaaqoacmkf5ufqv3te7e6jn9f8zznge34o6m48aphlsah9ugvq3ixwdk85ulj5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srd5nj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Before 1903, the New York Stock Exchange used a Chinese gong.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srd5nj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srd5nj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srd5nj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n the 1870s, a new era emerged at the world’s largest stock market with the arrival of continuous trading. This resulted in a need for a daily signal to open and close the market. The chosen signal was loud and distinct so as to be heard by everyone on the trading floor: a Chinese [gong](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srd5nj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). From the 1870s until 1903, the thunderous disk was ceremoniously struck with a padded hammer to signal the beginning and end of the trading day. However, this particular tradition soon came to an end. In 1903, the NYSE underwent a few major changes, including moving to its current location at 18 Broad Street and discontinuing the gong, which was replaced by an electrically operated brass bell. However, not all stock markets have modernized their bells — the Euronext Amsterdam stock exchange (the oldest exchange in the world) has opened and closed with a gong since the 17th century.
---
Today, the NYSE bells sound twice daily, once to open trading at 9:30 a.m. and once to close at 4:00 p.m. (Eastern time). Ringing these bells is a celebrated tradition, and celebrities, politicians, and business professionals are often invited to partake in the decades-old custom. In 1956, the first-ever guest bell ringer was 10-year-old Leonard Ross, who earned his spot by answering stock market trivia on a TV game show.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srd5nj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srd5nj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The idiom “saved by the bell” comes from boxing.
The expression “saved by the bell” first [appeared](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srd5nj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in American English around 1902, originating from prizefighting (professional boxing). The phrase was used in the literal sense to describe a situation in which a fallen boxer must rise before the referee can count to 10. If the bell rings to signal the end of the round before the referee can finish counting, the boxer is “saved by the bell” and continues on to the next round. By 1912, the saying evolved beyond its boxing roots and made its way into the education lexicon; students claimed they were “saved by the bell” when the sound marked the end of class and it was time to leave. The phrase is still used in this context today, as referenced in the title of the 1990s high school sitcom _Saved by the Bell_.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/MOYOrCB-qOrm4xooB7vTK-dcqCovYPd1Ois77i0GGmWXCS6eaQLNPk-v03SBqYZ3W7p-UzWxaXdCUef9Qc9pJQxYAqGZX9vAcFq7hIQ0wy92PNU60ZFbdPk-NW7UMaVnYoWdOpCzZkjJ5JE5ysoXneIFteytf4F94wI-XbkmhP9UjqJwa-2yCYbIYvzluSd872dHl84x-epweNuu808YFZRSfmh95kI0XyIvswsrKWBeOpHjlqZBogJlu2qOsxMA2AX9Ix75FYjubrGKU7sRMNsMp9MM4FC-Zi1Ia1UcSwC4HVxXW8tLzzuuA13AuXtXxhBGyAri36TB0bRi05p5yRnzdqw5kGQY8kDCxrqbi8G5jwOoba8XSz9bY4COIn5s7HC-yUQLprDikIZPTJGyuJxI9aj-FGzjvgFtfmg2aTWuwTHr3MlmqIuuV40IwbjLYZq6er_Ofcqq_ISbT8eTsKjwfNovD1Owlq5I45q0bBM/rXgvHQPlAt0JBWLqfLSc58qCUTi_V3KN/5)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.

subject: In honor of the President-elect…
body:
...and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=de7ea22503db413ab71940e19df5c5e5&_e=p_XqX9R5hMH4n7Wbr7X4moIlWpTb7hIW0lVtobs18IijL_r6-I3ZimjAbUdEvGzMZ7taFVAWr4rKeL_QI89hA2Zbmsgg2tbjmNV4Fb5TZ4q8wPN6IdnDWxorKTlJZUWoPfG_2eAcM4FxOemcLRrYoGM0IWdHfDzCih2tpQjgeyo_aB5AfYqDuLXvGXv3-tfGESGYgU4LWMFIFmOuQKifv_zNCDLGW_FZEyNqver2MHaxhRvy5FX45QJ0HL0vYwSMnLu5UN5ORovtQmGQPMdJvIkH3WTlcCKyO38PsEAvvpmrOvDNSsDEuHmkE0gQv4bV)

Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=de7ea22503db413ab71940e19df5c5e5&_e=p_XqX9R5hMH4n7Wbr7X4moIlWpTb7hIW0lVtobs18IijL_r6-I3ZimjAbUdEvGzMZ7taFVAWr4rKeL_QI89hA2Zbmsgg2tbjmNV4Fb5TZ4q8wPN6IdnDWxorKTlJZUWoPfG_2eAcM4FxOemcLRrYoH_QNTIyRyJv-ZeTXiFNPGfqGnVlGtuA0V73I5qYlGfH794usaqWh1qTRdKdnIvyAdTBFPGUf6TjUpPOHEaF_jAWh5cSitDc0Fn3ODhIUpeS6rZSPPZNy1_zJDhzWiA-ByNBmuphSnExHtY9gJmj_k7y37LibDHrDbTMp1fRlPyL)

Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! _**[Please, Fellow American, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I'll send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=de7ea22503db413ab71940e19df5c5e5&_e=p_XqX9R5hMH4n7Wbr7X4moIlWpTb7hIW0lVtobs18IijL_r6-I3ZimjAbUdEvGzMZ7taFVAWr4rKeL_QI89hA2Zbmsgg2tbjmNV4Fb5TZ4q8wPN6IdnDWxorKTlJZUWoPfG_2eAcM4FxOemcLRrYoJ_p3oe7T2SiwdXKkt0_a6DqGjkRLAavL1Sb9o4xvUbpT_38J457T-wBYPyt93GnnaGdLMY1E3oKoDKuYKeR1oWIPrcKNludn5EZ5nvmrPV8FQWny3ocUdgOeYba6rzvPuPx-XvsKfmLrbzuAnvZFRL20rBJXOg3y_BNzsTasYSx)**_

body:

| | | Did you take the new 2025 Team Cruz Poll below? Ted Cruz is counting on all active members of the team to input their responses. **We are closing the poll today.** If you have already responded, thank you. If not, you can use this link to take the poll >>> **[https://secure.winred.com/ted-cruz/fwd-2025-team-cruz-poll](http://trk.tedcruz.)** \- Team Cruz

| | |

From: **Ted Cruz **Date: February 6, 2025Subject: 2025 Team Cruz Poll
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._9_S8g)
---
Fellow Conservative, Things have been moving fast in Washington - there's been a whirlwind of executive and legislative action since our GOP majorities and President Trump were sworn in - and we're not letting up for a moment.

_We are saving America from the anti-American Left and the corrupt DC Establishment!_

**We 're reversing the destructive radical-left policies forced on our Nation by the corrupt Biden-Harris administration and Democrats in Congress, **_**and we 're fighting day in and day out to ensure our country's BEST days are ahead of us**_!

I'm eager to review your feedback. I'd love to hear from you today.

Please take a minute or two now to ****[****complete our 2025 Team Cruz Poll****](http://trk.tedcruz.)****.
---
[ **RESPOND NOW >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.-U1Hw8tl34_DBugs2Rw)
---
_Do you support President Trump 's decision to deploy troops to our southern border?_

_Do you think the U.S. Senate should investigate the actions of Joe Biden and his business associates, such as Hunter Biden? _ _Do you support Senator Cruz 's legislation to ban foreign governments from buying land near U.S. Military bases? _ _Do you support the nomination of Kash Patel for FBI Director? _ _Do you support the nomination of Tulsi Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence? _ _Do you support the nomination of Robert F. Kennedy, Jr to head HHS?_

_Do you believe our Trump-Republican economic agenda will help drive robust job and wage growth and drive down consumer costs for the American people?_
---
Take a moment to let me know your opinion on these crucial questions as soon as you can. My team will close this poll down in 48 hours.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
[ **RESPOND NOW >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)

subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
Watch the trailer

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6f24c5c9d3674298a44e334059f46ca8&_e=2M10oDd099UZIagjKgkXoD6izXhwGE78rptRWJ742moPz9Ft4h2gjJkZcCyBDaBTom-KN-u3mkb5YeKp3kIrs-gMuuYPyRih3rBIqjk-EW-0zHRbqH-xszPSuGPns57kZ6aWtIlxdVwB22HIkkBAnHYfVr2fpSNMm4xIazL3sA9SwmX_1PXJYfYCWXv7e2Be3FT1sLSNIsu4GiMVUeFs2DKh89mz1EdWXh4RShhXFwXB7DdkAm6TQgSY9Y-pNnesPF6zC8m-hXac80EQK1-JG6FecSBDGRU3xBhVSE8V2NN54uBDuh-st7PEkWiSDX7hufmzYd9BHr6d1PbnLgg8h2FQd-A1nB2iu0M44YYWDv6bGkV-NPFtWAezitcF1qZgKJNvuYrF_NwiV_UK7yRuw6bgrwnMIFF3yKYs_ylHpYnW-0QpykRgCmWNuIFmQAku)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6f24c5c9d3674298a44e334059f46ca8&_e=2M10oDd099UZIagjKgkXoD6izXhwGE78rptRWJ742moPz9Ft4h2gjJkZcCyBDaBTom-KN-u3mkb5YeKp3kIrs-gMuuYPyRih3rBIqjk-EW-0zHRbqH-xszPSuGPns57kZ6aWtIlxdVwB22HIkkBAnHYfVr2fpSNMm4xIazL3sA9SwmX_1PXJYfYCWXv7e2Be3FT1sLSNIsu4GiMVUeFs2DKh89mz1EdWXh4RShhXFwXB7DdkAm6TQgSY9Y-pNnesPF6zC8m-hXac80EQK1-JG6FecSBDGRU3xBhVSE8V2NO6OOTxIExoH8iMdKabv9jcAfNv6IpubR5M-vYvAfpjBPeYaeHBTUIznVQAGFXt52BrZQZIjVNpc_zutsjVUkkx8ETLCaXo118izOpYlHiY1J3zSgJ3G9TsTkWu4OEMyPOxq2EyNAvySG2zjkVseQtn)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6f24c5c9d3674298a44e334059f46ca8&_e=2M10oDd099UZIagjKgkXoD6izXhwGE78rptRWJ742moPz9Ft4h2gjJkZcCyBDaBTom-KN-u3mkb5YeKp3kIrs-gMuuYPyRih3rBIqjk-EW-0zHRbqH-xszPSuGPns57kZ6aWtIlxdVwB22HIkkBAnHYfVr2fpSNMm4xIazL3sA9SwmX_1PXJYfYCWXv7e2Be3FT1sLSNIsu4GiMVUeFs2DKh89mz1EdWXh4RShhXFwXB7DdkAm6TQgSY9Y-pNnesPF6zC8m-hXac80EQK1-JG6FecSBDGRU3xBhVSE8V2NN-adE6PzrNPW89GohyYO-PuxF2ZIZVz2cpLTofiWas1Xet852cV8UZGNit4Dy5CC2Xjbbpwgj3FrxUZ12EcXynDoynvJtRBhmqqTv3hHPdmB5CLLvnmQoZmbM-W_1k5eWANCxYTgvSYDwfUU7ZHbGA)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6f24c5c9d3674298a44e334059f46ca8&_e=2M10oDd099UZIagjKgkXoD6izXhwGE78rptRWJ742moPz9Ft4h2gjJkZcCyBDaBTom-KN-u3mkb5YeKp3kIrs-gMuuYPyRih3rBIqjk-EW-0zHRbqH-xszPSuGPns57kZ6aWtIlxdVwB22HIkkBAnHYfVr2fpSNMm4xIazL3sA9SwmX_1PXJYfYCWXv7e2Be3FT1sLSNIsu4GiMVUeFs2DKh89mz1EdWXh4RShhXFwXB7DdkAm6TQgSY9Y-pNnes6I9RAh-zuiiDIhQWegzFwpBk3LXoj-HH4M4S5g195GzOurosVqC0AKVzYWD9HBVrM6pc0ooaZ8OciUu62C9ChSLueMGTqoMqoCsfC8IwBayXEio0ENXfwtveOwgFsgf3ueWYawVGIIFD2OkbGhlxqAEHded0dIicTOHWQygr2OKK_i63HLrOSjg4NIbPUhGV)**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6f24c5c9d3674298a44e334059f46ca8&_e=2M10oDd099UZIagjKgkXoD6izXhwGE78rptRWJ742moPz9Ft4h2gjJkZcCyBDaBTom-KN-u3mkb5YeKp3kIrs-gMuuYPyRih3rBIqjk-EW-0zHRbqH-xszPSuGPns57kZ6aWtIlxdVwB22HIkkBAnHYfVr2fpSNMm4xIazL3sA9SwmX_1PXJYfYCWXv7e2Be3FT1sLSNIsu4GiMVUeFs2DKh89mz1EdWXh4RShhXFwXB7DdkAm6TQgSY9Y-pNnes6I9RAh-zuiiDIhQWegzFwpBk3LXoj-HH4M4S5g195GxbP6-NvGrA6_hVXn8p9dpaswIQapmAN3lrIu3RUJMfP5KF3x9e8Gx5t8x2ENUlTsc6zz9PJGit2FpO_EZZJ1guii4damoVE7YPjcmHMkjUPcyef3lzeWIjTewFOHyTDKtt0x4PXSZ82THpPUiLl-Lr)

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.

subject: Coach Tuberville Won’t Back Down

body:
Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter.

| | |
---
|
---
Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter. Since arriving in Washington, he has been one of the most determined conservatives standing up to Joe Biden’s disastrous policies. **Now, as he prepares for re-election, it’s up to us to make sure he has the support he needs to keep battling for America.**

Before politics, Coach Tuberville built championship teams on the football field. He knows what it takes to win, and he’s brought that same leadership to the Senate. When it comes to standing up for our conservative values, he never backs down from a fight.
---
---
He proved that when he took on the Pentagon’s outrageous policy of funding abortion travel with taxpayer dollars. While others stayed silent, Coach Tuberville stood firm. His pressure ultimately forced the Pentagon to reverse course — a major victory for life and for American taxpayers. Now Coach Tuberville is leading the charge to protect women’s sports from being undermined by radical gender ideology. His bill to enshrine President Trump's executive action into law is common sense, but Democrats refuse to accept reality. Thankfully, Coach isn’t afraid to call them out and fight for policies that promote truth and fairness. **Sadly, the Left is already gearing up to take him down. They know how effective he is, and they’ll do everything they can to defeat him in 2026. We can’t let that happen.** **[**Will you step up with a contribution to help Coach Tuberville?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/JPYgR-msesisFn_lkz2OBkXK4PCBKN7SIDKRkrNDLxr8JE7c5Yzlo6KSmlGGswzUd3F2udKgZtTRKKHf0CB90ISjD-Bk1ZxQvB-IVATr9_Y5jlO7C-kdEVaSdHNhEaWdGkxvHKWGZ_TiouEWo-Vtx3fh3lQvZjHk3YKvd28rgddNpYHU75q3om-Og5kfDta7R9MS26a-bLMNXWAp5HUSl7ci7siknuDYuoYRkEuPv0aI4CqzanbUGvg-9zfEE40yQyBfJez7bFv10EJrORNb6TgC_FDJAA92zx6n2n-uHq6UYiDz8i4gxpXGxw/sNpgchPKPGy6zNgeq03mhLnoes0kDzuF/5)** _The Senate Conservatives Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. It's the best way to support him because we don't use gimmicks that secretly redirect huge chunks of your contribution to other committees and digital vendors._ Coach Tuberville has never wavered in his commitment to our values. _**Now, it’s time for us to have his back.**_ [**Support Coach Tuberville today!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/TykGQP12dUlwMlDTjilvY5opr6Ak8Tws9XTAso9Log-JwVeIoXpkwYLHcrgA84bW4CB8qJzd6o3CEeoXGFcNt1-ytdTrG_VVIcfuSZGNeN5VFyAl4YXnopLlqrlnESEKP8qudN7RcEioyHmOlQNTNaXgnefXwMeFMIpTCINJ6Oxoj8rh-qoKh0iTsRGV_zwl9X42Qafp_JNAdTzAVvoGI2IZxg4NiHwLMrCWRmUN29PEQajKVP2ZYlIfT8E312WdUGYiM-JCqNukCFEa1sMlbrB3TJzhcvNRV2GOZ3p1ZYP2zLJEvX3o2Nacfw/aKeAPtlCLbpidNkFU1r8kGBEW38rrsl2/5) Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: REPORT: $20 million hit job to bury me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Elon Musk’s DOGE exposed an alleged hit job against me.
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=687ecebf3d2c46d6a80141b959fae439&_e=_ChDpfW3K6jL4W1YLhFmfLxBfPlhoycXno7ymuonKVHqMcNKLAHhJA2VBBNh30Zr22E4lgojGcro_3numdpBJy1nl1p7hbZEcGdgkGqry6p9kdNRBeWEUV3VbBrx2z0VyCsZKgLVGS8uqYlwr3o8OASJOtRqzPvuIIEorYeeQSuCg6P5DjRmOws90fwW6qhIpnpfRrP4vmN4CvzFyig4ApvNfng3h_LjhmAdz1Jn_PAhhrmSsLAgw4coYpyJz-JJp0bOE_CDe_Ydr7l4uQ738YM1soP11LVyZXvvfeMNssIAjE-tWUsokpTA24Vmy1_tTeN09WWfPt9YNSYO-df6Xr8gmdl0IezSf1vJUMqt8C7Iafci-ECj07KCh7Obyc1v)
---
ATTN: Fellow Patriot,
---
Now that Elon Musk is running an audit of the federal government, the Deep State’s corruption is finally being EXPOSED...
---
**A report reveals that in 2019 – while I was serving as President Trump’s attorney – the USAID allegedly spent _$20 MILLION_ on a Soros-backed operation to dig up dirt on me and bury me alive.**
---
This is just a glimpse of what the Deep State has tried to do to destroy me _and_ President Trump.
---
And unfortunately, the fight isn’t over.
---
_I am facing bogus CRIMINAL CHARGES in the state of Arizona – where President Trump is PROHIBITED from saving me with a PARDON!_
---
And if fighting the Mafia taught me anything, it’s that when villains get exposed, they don’t run – they dig their heels in _deeper_!
---
It’s honestly a miracle that after everything done to me and President Trump, not even an assassin’s bullet could end our movement.
---
I have to believe that miracle comes from God. But it also comes from the generous support given by kind souls like YOU, who’ve helped me prevail time and time again.
---
_Now, I’m asking for your support once again to win this pardon-proof criminal case so that I can FINALLY live as a FREE MAN!_

clean_body: Elon Musk’s DOGE exposed an alleged hit job against me. | ATTN: Fellow Patriot, Now that Elon Musk is running an audit of the federal government, the Deep State’s corruption is finally being EXPOSED... A report reveals that in 2019 – while I was serving as President Trump’s attorney – the USAID allegedly spent $20 MILLION on a Soros-backed operation to dig up dirt on me and bury me alive. This is just a glimpse of what the Deep State has tried to do to destroy me and President Trump. And unfortunately, the fight isn’t over. I am facing bogus CRIMINAL CHARGES in the state of Arizona – where President Trump is PROHIBITED from saving me with a PARDON! And if fighting the Mafia taught me anything, it’s that when villains get exposed, they don’t run – they dig their heels in deeper! It’s honestly a miracle that after everything done to me and President Trump, not even an assassin’s bullet could end our movement. I have to believe that miracle comes from God. But it also comes from the generous support given by kind souls like YOU, who’ve helped me prevail time and time again. Now, I’m asking for your support once again to win this pardon-proof criminal case so that I can FINALLY live as a FREE MAN! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Ryan Brown via Justice Democrats
subject: Amazon’s lawless union-busting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I’m the president of the union at the Amazon warehouse just outside
Raleigh, NC. Our union election is from February 10 to February 15th. If
we win, we’ll become the first unionized Amazon facility in the south.

Coming off the historic holiday strikes around the country and the first
Whole Foods union victory since Amazon bought it, we have the momentum.

But Jeff Bezos doesn’t want to let us win. His new buddy Donald Trump just
illegally fired a member of the National Labor Relations Board, which
means the Board won’t have a quorum to rule on lawbreaking during this
election period.

And Amazon is taking advantage of the lack of oversight. They’re
installing new TVs all over the warehouse, which play anti-union
propaganda on a loop. They’re blacking out the windows so that you can’t
look at anything else on your breaks. And they’ve installed metal
detectors in new, odd, places. It’s downright Orwellian. We can’t do our
jobs to get people their packages without being distracted by a barrage of
propaganda.

Amazon is also trying to use captive audience meetings (the kind that was
ruled unlawful in November) to divide us by race. For example, they’ll
pick out a group of Hispanic workers and tell them that the Black union
members just don’t want to work as hard, and that’s why they want a union.
This union busting is disgusting.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250208-cause-tlf?refcode=em20250208-36409&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36409_1203867_OGRcX5&akid=36409%2E1203867%2EOGRcX5 ]We just have days to fight back against Amazon’s lawless union busting.
But we have a plan to win! We’re planning a gigantic rally for all 4,500
workers at RDU1 the weekend before the election―and we need your help to
make sure we can accommodate everybody. Can you chip in and help us win
this election?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250208-cause-tlf?refcode=em20250208-36409&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36409_1203867_OGRcX5&akid=36409%2E1203867%2EOGRcX5 ]Photo of a table with food and CAUSE organizers

Amazon is pulling out all the stops because they are scared. They saw us
in the streets before Christmas. They saw our comrades at Whole Foods pull
off a win last month. Amazon knows that if we can win a union in North
Carolina, we can win anywhere. That’s why they’re going overboard to try
to stop us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250208-cause-tlf?refcode=em20250208-36409&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36409_1203867_OGRcX5&akid=36409%2E1203867%2EOGRcX5 ]With your help, and with the support of partners like Justice
Democrats, we will become the first Amazon union in the South. Split a
donation today!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250208-cause-tlf?refcode=em20250208-36409&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&refcode2=36409_1203867_OGRcX5&akid=36409%2E1203867%2EOGRcX5 ]Contribute $3

Thank you,

Ryan Brown
President, Carolina Amazonians United for Solidarity and Empowerment

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250208-36409-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36409_1203867_OGRcX5&akid=36409%2E1203867%2EOGRcX5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36409%2E1203867%2EOGRcX5

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
P.O. Box 910 Knoxville, TN 37901
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Kyle Rittenhouse
subject: It’s time to go on the offensive.
body:
I never asked to be thrown into national politics. I wanted to be a paramedic or a cop and live a normal life.

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/PVfHTWIC7XmU6Hww-g0V1mJoH7xy0SKO0rY5W4qBdos9PbZeO2869Adwwv43MmidXNGdwQPIfRWuMtY5md42tuzmQLDa_2p4EFtz91wXnRvXcdnN2I0asSHtGWfXDNN2TMX_JZKzZsWKG8SkPQMGFMtVek_GZUDPoAN9awkL4edX3cWotXulCGvBUMrfcw3sikkqgKIkbBn8i8I-QTV5L-YdAMNO2dvLg1n-wRXnN6Mk_OUP2tEKMOmSgLpSLQcX8-FsZIT5ioxZG-T2lhCgyBP_a_59Ocgws9Kv6PBK5GqxU6LeNPO_gr6QFQP1PGz8SanC4y8F2APCpSbqb4AuXZrQSr0w5q8RYAClkVpSzDk/QW2Tys7qyOcUX0j_ocyo_slGBvMlI0Tg/5 "Tuttle Twins")
Friend,

I never asked to be thrown into national politics. I wanted to be a paramedic or a cop and live a normal life.

However, all that changed when I lawfully defended myself during a BLM riot.

My life was thrown upside down. I had Biden using my image in his ads, saying I was a white supremacist. I had the national media lying about me. I had strangers online cursing at me and even sending me death threats.

This is all detailed in my new book, _Acquitted_.

**_I’ve accepted my life is different now. But I will not accept leaving the fate of our country to radical leftists who want to destroy American values of liberty_.**

This is personal for me.

We must take back our universities and go on the offensive against the woke mobs who control them.

My friend JP Kirby started a youth organization called Student Rights Inc. They have a strategy to battle woke campus administrators, defend the freedom of speech of students, and promote Constitutional rights at colleges.

Students Rights Inc. incorporates the Freedom Method strategy to defend student rights on campus. More on that below. But first, here’s how you can help them lead the students who are fighting back on campus. [I gave JP my word that I would help him raise $38,000 online. As a personal favor to me, can you donate $10, $35, or even $100 today to Student Rights Inc.?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/Rqmb1Z4pTLNgQUwXQh-L8UA3uNiyUbRKBWaksZxi0HPgtXFkMve5iqAHwb0fWbCwGEtb_fH-7YhYNIMyPqOxPvZfEbVhGJQqS1yZ2qFSaWLV83pLQVIIoj4MCdh0o0mqcLrwghFaA-R1uGAt0J5wF1N7vkG4mXCtrHnRoFblqaFo1WJsQFjPzasJPC2h9oXUjQUBSxzXwx913hlF_PU5DMM-UTR1VhLb4RfnNoNJBO0wRHjEuQnhxBaVA6fUii3rFpOUeu5D-YPJt-pYm43VDVgIEteJC80agMmOcgnFo4PcIxEEinSxJnrm0qtmqyoXGKbsN12R6xyWw7n3KIizW6hhRNt1C8EFkXxaOeAMhuk/j_zDE8mS-mFc5WulcW79oQLT0fn5iBXa/5)

**How to defend student rights on campus: the Freedom Method.**

**STEP 1:** Student Rights Inc. identifies campus policies that violate students’ constitutional rights.

These can be anything from speech codes restricting what students can say and where they can say it. Or it can even be gun policies that prohibit self-defense on campus. Or, lately, it can be medical policies like forced COVID vaccine requirements.

**STEP 2:** Student Rights Inc. gives the freedom-loving students on campus the training to build an opposition movement.

Through the Freedom Method curriculum developed during JP’s years of policy change work as well as personalized coaching, Student Rights Inc. teaches students to win over their classmates, build coalitions with campus groups, and spread the movement on their campuses.

**STEP 3:** This one is the fun part. Student Rights Inc. activists go after the campus administrators!

SRInc activists unleash the coalition of student activists they’ve built on the campus bureaucrats who are restricting their rights. SRInc guides its activists through using the tools of political change such as phone banking, organized protests, media pressure, and much more until the administration removes the restrictions on their rights.

Students desperately need our help on college campuses.

Let’s not leave them to defend themselves against the woke mobs.

However, all that changed when I lawfully defended myself during a BLM riot. My life was thrown upside down. I had Biden using my image in his ads, saying I was a white supremacist. I had the national media lying about me. I had strangers online cursing at me and even sending me death threats. This is all detailed in my new book, Acquitted. I’ve accepted my life is different now. But I will not accept leaving the fate of our country to radical leftists who want to destroy American values of liberty. This is personal for me. We must take back our universities and go on the offensive against the woke mobs who control them. My friend JP Kirby started a youth organization called Student Rights Inc. name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Elon is Paying to Create an Oligarchy
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wd3dp-ut481u-kyd76rh4/)
---
# **Elon is Paying to Create an Oligarchy**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wd3dp-ut481v-kyd76rh5/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, our country needs to ask itself a serious question: **_Why is an unelected billionaire like Elon Musk trying to gain access to millions of Americans' personal financial data—and control over a $6 trillion payment system?_** And if Musk’s so-called _Department of Government Efficiency_ (DOGE) is truly operating in the public interest, then why the secrecy? Why does he refuse to answer basic questions about what his team is doing with your data? Just this week, the Treasury Department reached an agreement to limit the sharing of sensitive financial information with Musk’s DOGE. Thanks to a court order, only a small number of Musk’s allies—Tom Krause and Marko Elez—have “read-only” access to records. But here's the question: **Why are any of Musk's allies involved at all?** This operation is _dangerously opaque_ and raises serious concerns about your privacy. Musk's allies, now working for the Treasury, are in charge of reviewing over a billion payments annually and overseeing trillions of dollars. These are records that hold deeply personal details—your financial history, tax information, Social Security records, and much more. Despite claims that only two of Musk’s allies have access to this data, we still don’t know what’s really happening behind closed doors. Are these records being properly protected, or is this a massive breach of privacy for millions of Americans? **Americans deserve transparency.** Musk is meddling in systems that protect your personal information and shape the future of government efficiency—without _ever_ being elected. Why does he need this power? And why should we trust someone so willing to skirt accountability? [**_It’s time to ask the tough questions and demand the protection of our personal data. Join the fight to hold Musk and his cronies accountable. The future of our financial security and privacy depends on it._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wd3dp-ut481w-kyd76rh6/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team
---

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: School Choice in Mississippi – could it finally happen?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/fakeconservatives-11573840?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **The Mississippi House just passed a bill to allow public to public School Choice (HB1435). Not far behind is a bill that would allow a form of public to private School Choice (HB1433).**

Then the Senate went and passed a bill that has the potential to stamp out Diversity, Equity & Inclusion (DEI) ideology in our public universities (SB2515).
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4fac45a40c&e=5703353baa)
---
_MCPP allies are running this hard hitting TV ad in favor of change ...._
| **A few days before, the House passed a proposal to eliminate the income tax (HB1).** They even passed a bill that would repeal a lot of the red tape that has been restricting the healthcare economy in our state (HB922).

**To be clear, each of these important reforms still need to pass _both_ chambers before heading to the Governor’s desk.**

That said, it is hard to think of a year in the past couple of decades when, at this stage of Mississippi’s legislative session there was a realistic chance of passing this amount of real conservative policy.

**For as long as anyone can remember, Mississippi has been thought of as 50 th out of 50 states. It might be time to think again.**

Governor Tate Reeves keeps pointing out how Mississippi has momentum. Indeed, in two quarters of last year, our state had one of the _fastest growing per person incomes and per person outputs of any US state. _

**Yes, you read that right. Mississippi was one of the fastest growing states in America.**

---
|
---
_‘Mississippi Momentum’ has become a thing ...._
| Mississippi’s new found growth might still be more of a snapshot than a trend. But if our legislature really does pass all of the measures listed above, our state really will be on a new upward trajectory.

**Even as you read this, an army of lobbyists is frantically trying to undo these proposed changes.** The absurdly named “Parent’s Campaign” has gone into overdrive to try to prevent giving actual parents more choice. Scare stories abound. **Those that Tate Reeves calls the “coalition of the status quo” are trying desperately to keep things the way they are.**

There will be no shortage of pundits and commentators making the fatuous argument that the Mississippi state legislature somehow only has the bandwidth for one reform at a time, as though voting through the proposal to eliminate the income tax somehow makes it impossible to approve proposals that improve our education, too.

**Good conservative leaders and lawmakers need to hold their nerve.** Face down the lobbyists and vested interests that don’t want change.

**Ignore the smug, self-satisfied anti school choice activists that sent their own kids to private school. **

Our lawmakers can vote for these changes in the knowledge that we have a President and a primary base behind them all the way!

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fc5a827503&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, The Mississippi House just passed a bill to allow public to public School Choice (HB1435). Not far behind is a bill that would allow a form of public to private School Choice (HB1433). Then the Senate went and passed a bill that has the potential to stamp out Diversity, Equity & Inclusion (DEI) ideology in our public universities (SB2515). | MCPP allies are running this hard hitting TV ad in favor of change .... | A few days before, the House passed a proposal to eliminate the income tax (HB1). They even passed a bill that would repeal a lot of the red tape that has been restricting the healthcare economy in our state (HB922). To be clear, each of these important reforms still need to pass both chambers before heading to the Governor’s desk. That said, it is hard to think of a year in the past couple of decades when, at this stage of Mississippi’s legislative session there was a realistic chance of passing this amount of real conservative policy. For as long as anyone can remember, Mississippi has been thought of as 50 th out of 50 states. It might be time to think again. Governor Tate Reeves keeps pointing out how Mississippi has momentum. Indeed, in two quarters of last year, our state had one of the fastest growing per person incomes and per person outputs of any US state. Yes, you read that right. Mississippi was one of the fastest growing states in America. | ‘Mississippi Momentum’ has become a thing .... | Mississippi’s new found growth might still be more of a snapshot than a trend. But if our legislature really does pass all of the measures listed above, our state really will be on a new upward trajectory. Even as you read this, an army of lobbyists is frantically trying to undo these proposed changes. The absurdly named “Parent’s Campaign” has gone into overdrive to try to prevent giving actual parents more choice. Scare stories abound. Those that Tate Reeves calls the “coalition of the status quo” are trying desperately to keep things the way they are. There will be no shortage of pundits and commentators making the fatuous argument that the Mississippi state legislature somehow only has the bandwidth for one reform at a time, as though voting through the proposal to eliminate the income tax somehow makes it impossible to approve proposals that improve our education, too. Good conservative leaders and lawmakers need to hold their nerve. Face down the lobbyists and vested interests that don’t want change. Ignore the smug, self-satisfied anti school choice activists that sent their own kids to private school. Our lawmakers can vote for these changes in the knowledge that we have a President and a primary base behind them all the way! Have an awesome weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |
