---

In this post:
1. Holding our own accountable -- the worst offenders
2. Confirmations pending/waiting on floor vote
3. Confirmations finished, and full lists of the democrats who voted with the GOP to confirm them

* * *
If we can't hold our own people accountable, how can we ever expect to defeat Trump and MAGA?
Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vQuM2WzhYCYOzOsGiLMUgCyU5DMWVX5gw16-_Mh4Kq0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=156701893)
Democrats complicit in (or worse, cheerleading) the hostile takeover of our country should be adhering to the principals that got them elected.
Less than a dozen Democratic US Senators have refused to vote for Trump's cabinet picks - except Marco Rubio, who was confirmed unanimously.
Your Democrats holding the line and doing what voters elected them to do are:
1. Duckworth (IL)
2. Hirono (HI)
3. Markey (MA)
4. Merkley (OR)
5. Murphy (CT)
6. Murray (WA)
7. Reed (RI)
8. Van Hollen (MD)
9. Warren (MA)
10. Wyden (OR)

While I would argue that we should be pushing back on everything Trump does as a united front, the reality is that our party is truly -- maybe irrevocably-- divided.
Some offenders are much worse than others.
Take Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman, for example.
Fetterman won after running as a progressive -- and with the help of progressives like myself.
Yet, he has voted to confirm Trump nominees more than any other democrat in the Senate. He voted to confirm: Rubio, Bondi, Zeldin, Wright, Noem, Bessent, Collins, Ratcliffe, Burgum and Duffy. That's literally every Trump nominee except two. He was the only Democrat to vote in favor of proceeding to a vote for Pete Hegseth, too.
But he's not the only one.
And no, they don't all come from swing states. And no, they're not just the people you'd expect.
The table below shows how many times each Senator voted for Trump's cabinet picks, among those who voted to confirm five times or more. This excludes the vote to confirm Marco Rubio because _every single Democratic voted to confirm Rubio_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ffde8b03-7998-4364-b8a5-c3ce5728b745?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
## **Confirmations pending:**
**Kash Patel** , FBI Director
Conspiracy theorist who peddled election lies, anti-vax propaganda, and QAnon
**Brooke Rollins,** Secretary of Agriculture
President and CEO of the America First Policy Institute, a group helping lay the groundwork for Trump's second administration. Received a B.S. in agricultural science 30 years ago, and[ testified](https://substack.com/redirect/d0583d85-d89f-4ab6-9b57-3eb2884774b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in her committee hearing that she supports rural development and sustainability.
**Elise Stefanik** , US Ambassador to the United Nations
Pushed pro-Zionist conspiracy theories in Congress, started the attacks that ousted the first Black president at Harvard, and is Trump's most loyal servant in the US House.
**Scott Turner** , HUD
Former NFL player
**Robert F. Kennedy Jr,** Health and HUman Services
The conspiracy theorist who eats roadkill and suffers from chronic bronchitis and brain-eating worms thinks vaccines are bad and Jews engineered COVID. Enough said.
**Tulsi Gabbard** , National Intelligence
Where to even start with this one... Noted Russian asset. That should be disqualifying in and of itself.
**Kelly Loeffler,** Small Business Administration
Top Trump donor; defeated in race for Georgia Senate by Raphael Warnock and brief appointment to the role by GOP Governor Brian Kemp. Another crypto hussler.
**Howard Lutnick** - Commerce Secretary
Crypto-scam pusher and billionaire via brokerage and investment firm Cantor Fitzgerald
**Lori Chavez-DeRemer, Labor
** Former GOP congresswoman from Oregon, narrowly lost in November, yet pro-labor. An odd choice.
**Jamieson Greer,** US Trade Representative
International trade attorney for major Washington law firm
**Linda McMahon** , Education
Ran twice for the US Senate in Connecticut and failed. Supports diverting public funding into private schools. Lists "Billionaire professional wrestling mogul" as her qualification.
* * *
## Candidates Confirmed so Far
**Marco Rubio,** Secretary of State
99-0
All dems for. [Roll call here.](https://substack.com/redirect/82826d45-f3b6-486f-adf4-b654001547c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Russ Vought,** Director of the Office of Management and Budget
53-47
All dems against. [Roll call here.](https://substack.com/redirect/06a64167-7ece-4466-9dc0-0c9cf2bd9b9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Pam Bondi** , Attorney General
52-56
[Roll call here](https://substack.com/redirect/d1526fb7-637f-43b3-b493-817c0eb26659?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democrats voting to confirm:
1. Fetterman (PA)*

* * *
**Pete Hegseth** , Secretary of Defense (proceed)
53-45
[Roll call here](https://substack.com/redirect/f650fb3c-eeb8-41b2-90a8-e25a60b0892e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democrats voting to confirm:
1. Fetterman (PA)

* * *
**Lee Zeldin** , EPA
56-42
[Roll call here](https://substack.com/redirect/96b8f6b0-3e35-476e-9046-44136d1af67c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democrats voting to confirm:
1. Fetterman (PA)
2. Gallego (AZ)
3. Kelly (AZ)

* * *
**Chris Wright,** Energy Secretary
59-38
[Votes here](https://substack.com/redirect/cccef9c8-9c06-4329-b247-0318ba83affa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Democrats voting to confirm:
1. Bennet (CO)
2. Hassan (NH)
3. Hickenlooper (CO)
4. Shaheen (NH)
5. Fetterman (PA)*
6. Gallego (AZ)
7. Heinrich (NM)
8. Lujan (NM)

* * *
**Kristi Noem,** Secretary of Homeland Security
59-34
[Roll call here](https://substack.com/redirect/c5fab919-a11f-4729-a764-3be0ac6b2310?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democrats voting to confirm:

3. Kaine (VA)

* * *
**Scott Bessent** , Secretary of Treasury
68-29
[Roll call here](https://substack.com/redirect/59bc5980-5e50-4a67-9fef-762d72e2b41a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

1. Rochester (DE)

clean_body: In this post: | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Public Post (free!) Feb 8 | | | | | | | | | | | In this post: 1. Holding our own accountable -- the worst offenders 2. Confirmations pending/waiting on floor vote 3. Confirmations finished, and full lists of the democrats who voted with the GOP to confirm them If we can't hold our own people accountable, how can we ever expect to defeat Trump and MAGA? Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Democrats complicit in (or worse, cheerleading) the hostile takeover of our country should be adhering to the principals that got them elected. Less than a dozen Democratic US Senators have refused to vote for Trump's cabinet picks - except Marco Rubio, who was confirmed unanimously. Your Democrats holding the line and doing what voters elected them to do are: 1. Duckworth (IL) 2. Hirono (HI) 3. Markey (MA) 4. Merkley (OR) 5. Murphy (CT) 6. Murray (WA) 7. Reed (RI) 8. Van Hollen (MD) 9. Warren (MA) 10. Wyden (OR) While I would argue that we should be pushing back on everything Trump does as a united front, the reality is that our party is truly -- maybe irrevocably-- divided. Some offenders are much worse than others. Take Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman, for example. Fetterman won after running as a progressive -- and with the help of progressives like myself. Yet, he has voted to confirm Trump nominees more than any other democrat in the Senate. He voted to confirm: Rubio, Bondi, Zeldin, Wright, Noem, Bessent, Collins, Ratcliffe, Burgum and Duffy. That's literally every Trump nominee except two. He was the only Democrat to vote in favor of proceeding to a vote for Pete Hegseth, too. But he's not the only one. And no, they don't all come from swing states. And no, they're not just the people you'd expect. The table below shows how many times each Senator voted for Trump's cabinet picks, among those who voted to confirm five times or more. This excludes the vote to confirm Marco Rubio because every single Democratic voted to confirm Rubio. | | ---|---|--- Confirmations pending: Kash Patel , FBI Director Conspiracy theorist who peddled election lies, anti-vax propaganda, and QAnon Brooke Rollins, Secretary of Agriculture President and CEO of the America First Policy Institute, a group helping lay the groundwork for Trump's second administration. Received a B.S. in agricultural science 30 years ago, and in her committee hearing that she supports rural development and sustainability. Elise Stefanik , US Ambassador to the United Nations Pushed pro-Zionist conspiracy theories in Congress, started the attacks that ousted the first Black president at Harvard, and is Trump's most loyal servant in the US House. Scott Turner , HUD Former NFL player Robert F. Kennedy Jr, Health and HUman Services The conspiracy theorist who eats roadkill and suffers from chronic bronchitis and brain-eating worms thinks vaccines are bad and Jews engineered COVID. Enough said. Tulsi Gabbard , National Intelligence Where to even start with this one... Noted Russian asset. That should be disqualifying in and of itself. Kelly Loeffler, Small Business Administration Top Trump donor; defeated in race for Georgia Senate by Raphael Warnock and brief appointment to the role by GOP Governor Brian Kemp. Another crypto hussler. Howard Lutnick - Commerce Secretary Crypto-scam pusher and billionaire via brokerage and investment firm Cantor Fitzgerald Lori Chavez-DeRemer, Labor Former GOP congresswoman from Oregon, narrowly lost in November, yet pro-labor. An odd choice. Jamieson Greer, US Trade Representative International trade attorney for major Washington law firm Linda McMahon , Education Ran twice for the US Senate in Connecticut and failed. Supports diverting public funding into private schools. Lists "Billionaire professional wrestling mogul" as her qualification. Candidates Confirmed so Far Marco Rubio, Secretary of State 99-0 All dems for. Russ Vought, Director of the Office of Management and Budget 53-47 All dems against. Pam Bondi , Attorney General 52-56 Democrats voting to confirm: 1. Fetterman (PA) Pete Hegseth , Secretary of Defense (proceed) 53-45 Democrats voting to confirm: 1. Fetterman (PA) Lee Zeldin , EPA 56-42 Democrats voting to confirm: 1. Fetterman (PA) 2. Gallego (AZ) 3. Kelly (AZ) Chris Wright, Energy Secretary 59-38 . Democrats voting to confirm: 1. Bennet (CO) 2. Hassan (NH) 3. Hickenlooper (CO) 4. Shaheen (NH) 5. Fetterman (PA) 6. Gallego (AZ) 7. Heinrich (NM) 8. **There are _13 special elections_** **over the next two months**. clean_body: With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. | | | | | ---|--- There are 13 special elections over the next two months. With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. 8 states are holding elections that require our immediate attention. The MAGA movement could easily pour millions of dollars into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way we can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. $7 from youis all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure a VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Minnesota and Pennsylvania. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. | | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5ebb37f3d96945218d1b2d9772cd1648&_e=Q385tUnGBe4cUEaNmfGCXxFlhIti5NT8hc8jZVduq7rPqh_f8nTukAw0R996y4NWCqiCq1XG5t_oq2zdNPqEwEmIsb8oFPHmWOJyJPOhL-9kfii-TojSC7-wIVKRKqLkkzO8zZkB0mtsuFRGBvgT-JBMZDNr6HGPA5ymZOFl-6zeqhs0dKZh50_NP6jhI2MEs2zUKpStidzJzZg6KoSGXRErJBsUWjIxPt4vbLM8ibMx49QfvCGC2Rmrp-F3jG-yLfKEf8eREvplThZHYgRck7DBO06ck8dIzk8AQ7iCnEOVeNEeaubPs_b1drZpgWIbLMn_17lu2TslItm9AGBnSbvhkCbYw8uHQ_53-Qyvrota_mv4Xax-HOmNPFbwU9c-CcgaOYxDpfPukz0mOx8-Whq826HaiqQmZk4TYpztgwk%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5ebb37f3d96945218d1b2d9772cd1648&_e=Q385tUnGBe4cUEaNmfGCXxFlhIti5NT8hc8jZVduq7rPqh_f8nTukAw0R996y4NWCqiCq1XG5t_oq2zdNPqEwEmIsb8oFPHmWOJyJPOhL-9kfii-TojSC7-wIVKRKqLkkzO8zZkB0mtsuFRGBvgT-JBMZDNr6HGPA5ymZOFl-6zeqhs0dKZh50_NP6jhI2MEs2zUKpStidzJzZg6KoSGXRErJBsUWjIxPt4vbLM8ibMx49QfvCGC2Rmrp-F3jG-yLfKEf8eREvplThZHYgRckwF4HMFtakcuRPhuUTlAhf90UdA6LaDcnD73pgWc43k7GEdLBZWR8uTtC685F4dGCSsF9JcagqEG9JuWQMX8zxTfNrhigcIX0sJsJi2tLLc3cLYX3VLQP7f8Pk6KTfQ7u6A7TEQscGcu8joRtMTHBmk%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5ebb37f3d96945218d1b2d9772cd1648&_e=Q385tUnGBe4cUEaNmfGCXxFlhIti5NT8hc8jZVduq7rPqh_f8nTukAw0R996y4NWCqiCq1XG5t_oq2zdNPqEwEmIsb8oFPHmWOJyJPOhL-9kfii-TojSC7-wIVKRKqLkkzO8zZkB0mtsuFRGBvgT-JBMZDNr6HGPA5ymZOFl-6zeqhs0dKZh50_NP6jhI2MEs2zUKpStidzJzZg6KoSGXRErJBsUWjIxPt4vbLM8ibMx49QfvCGC2Rmrp-F3jG-yLfKEf8eREvplThZHYgRckwZ-1sGplx0pUXkIEPhhwnlpo2qFyFut1UpfXaCoRfyDVgUKsnjScpVF58NIfxGWONWSli0gizYxDAsefIQf529GZjpUTy45BC_aWKrI-v4pOUfabhQrEOknLsuN9rI6jG2CYVsSXFF4E1-l3Vkb0NI%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5ebb37f3d96945218d1b2d9772cd1648&_e=Q385tUnGBe4cUEaNmfGCXxFlhIti5NT8hc8jZVduq7rPqh_f8nTukAw0R996y4NWCqiCq1XG5t_oq2zdNPqEwEmIsb8oFPHmWOJyJPOhL-9kfii-TojSC7-wIVKRKqLkkzO8zZkB0mtsuFRGBvgT-JBMZDNr6HGPA5ymZOFl-6zeqhs0dKZh50_NP6jhI2MEs2zUKpStidzJzZg6KoSGXRErJBsUWjIxPt4vbLM8ibMx49QfvCGC2Rmrp-F3jG-yLfKEf8eREvplThZHYgRck9oMHUpM29dG25frPrVbx3959PUw8sM7ocF8MMxoFVpQZLrjxnvaOrq9ySs7zzATv-qj1zJOAV2-qNMFukfR3V1CXUySY9gfnlFeRtlMrmhamGR6wKBQJBqSe7iEf8Y2rWUX12UAsR1guLzEWg7N-X8%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5ebb37f3d96945218d1b2d9772cd1648&_e=Q385tUnGBe4cUEaNmfGCXxFlhIti5NT8hc8jZVduq7rPqh_f8nTukAw0R996y4NWCqiCq1XG5t_oq2zdNPqEwEmIsb8oFPHmWOJyJPOhL-9kfii-TojSC7-wIVKRKqLkkzO8zZkB0mtsuFRGBvgT-JBMZDNr6HGPA5ymZOFl-6zeqhs0dKZh50_NP6jhI2MEs2zUKpStidzJzZg6KoSGXRErJBsUWjIxPt4vbLM8ibMx49QfvCGC2Rmrp-F3jG-yLfKEf8eREvplThZHYgRck3uVFPHuqFQxpb5iK6z2ooc5PAhvb5pLgzX0e7rfFu5TQ8w0Ezwrl46NSyEMbEIK6EXL6reaBTmq3RfSYyRhsCOWySySpj_ES_512aijTGYeL_bnL708Zst_rd7u5f-ii91GEcZHBFSAmLzKA8IpPak%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5ebb37f3d96945218d1b2d9772cd1648&_e=Q385tUnGBe4cUEaNmfGCXxFlhIti5NT8hc8jZVduq7rPqh_f8nTukAw0R996y4NWCqiCq1XG5t_oq2zdNPqEwEmIsb8oFPHmWOJyJPOhL-9kfii-TojSC7-wIVKRKqLkkzO8zZkB0mtsuFRGBvgT-JBMZDNr6HGPA5ymZOFl-6zeqhs0dKZh50_NP6jhI2MEs2zUKpStidzJzZg6KoSGXRErJBsUWjIxPt4vbLM8ibMx49QfvCGC2Rmrp-F3jG-yLfKEf8eREvplThZHYgRck6qnl6oiKqEAFdZrL7FBnAYe_Xk8vuLrUjHVUlCxgg1EuzhPMtAbnNS2finK5uCFAE90fhZrhDI2Dn0R0vRa30UGi5bt6BltuGAcr62iKrriBCrKkevqcn80zoa3b_AtCWj7jLeXzbcBIxVswWwdUeY%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5ebb37f3d96945218d1b2d9772cd1648&_e=Q385tUnGBe4cUEaNmfGCXxFlhIti5NT8hc8jZVduq7rPqh_f8nTukAw0R996y4NWCqiCq1XG5t_oq2zdNPqEwEmIsb8oFPHmWOJyJPOhL-9kfii-TojSC7-wIVKRKqLkkzO8zZkB0mtsuFRGBvgT-JBMZDNr6HGPA5ymZOFl-6zeqhs0dKZh50_NP6jhI2MEs2zUKpStidzJzZg6KoSGXRErJBsUWjIxPt4vbLM8ibMx49QfvCGC2Rmrp-F3jG-yLfKEf8eREvplThZHYgRckxqLZonAF692xToiG5wWcjFN7vzMcMMxENFNb9jM5WqawYFJ1aOJoTw7C69YC6Gs3JaiU1bayDeb2YAlNNXBbp1gp6F_h22JpwIfPPAr6CV_epe5I4m_3K-vy5BJNIpBnA6LLSGCTggr4KsGXswkK2g%3D)
---
| | **David Horowitz**
---
P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “** _On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues_**.” **[**Your survey and your financial support are of the utmost importance in this fight to overcome the illegal, ill-gotten influence of these government unions.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5ebb37f3d96945218d1b2d9772cd1648&_e=Q385tUnGBe4cUEaNmfGCXxFlhIti5NT8hc8jZVduq7rPqh_f8nTukAw0R996y4NWCqiCq1XG5t_oq2zdNPqEwEmIsb8oFPHmWOJyJPOhL-9kfii-TojSC7-wIVKRKqLkkzO8zZkB0mtsuFRGBvgT-JBMZDNr6HGPA5ymZOFl-6zeqhs0dKZh50_NP6jhI2MEs2zUKpStidzJzZg6KoSGXRErJBsUWjIxPt4vbLM8ibMx49QfvCGC2Rmrp-F3jG-yLfKEf8eREvplThZHYgRckwVju35XcQdfL9qLC0Xdb6aNHu_4cawKLIfjKjPuO1AEADBBoaXJOPZ-OtzaQRfGfn57V4lXLhCdzhFCLBjFiuE71sP0oSdYqp7XasldCUPiVAj1-VwwCOE5BEFOQdn5F0nyWCJm-q7hCS6VC0NzmtY%3D)**

But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: JFK Repeat on Trump?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
------------------------------------------------------------

JFK crossed the Deep State once...

And then he was gone.

Now Trump has appointed his descendant RFK Jr. to take on the Big Pharma-FDA collision that's poisoning the American public...

This single move threatens a $2 trillion revenue model based on maintaining high rates of disease.

Did Trump finally cross the red line?

Click here for the full story. (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuebtjIteknop5I0ITm6wlh2wf&s=ADJKEIFMANNMPHGC&req=l%3DD0I2xuebn8Iteknop5I0ITm6wlh2wf%26s%3DJIPLJNDPDPANALCK

To Your Good Health,

Al Sears, MD, CNS

name: Artie Blanco (via Democrats.org)
subject: We must win elections for working people
body:
---
Derek, My name is Artie Blanco, and I’m honored to be one of the new vice chairs of the DNC. We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us, and in a minute, [**I’m going to ask for your support. But first, I wanted to share my story with you and a little bit about why I ran for this role.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD) I'm a proud second-generation union member activist, a lifelong Democrat, and a first-generation Mexican American. When I was in the eighth grade, my father — a machinist — had an accident on the job. He lost his right hand when the machine failed him, but his union contract did not fail me or my brother. That's why I’ve dedicated my life to getting Democrats elected — but not just Democrats: pro-union, pro-labor Democrats. **We must not pass up opportunities to engage _all_ communities in the work ahead. But more importantly, we must win elections for working people like my father. ** [**This is my mission as DNC vice chair, and I’m ready to get to work. If you are too, I hope you’ll consider making a $3 contribution now to help us build a strong Democratic Party focused on helping working people:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD)**
---

| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD)**
---
****
I’ve spent many years working in Nevada, focused on expanding the Latino electorate. We’ve achieved record-breaking voter turnout — and we’ve done it by organizing year-round, building a relationship with working-class voters and their families, and engaging with hard-to-reach voters on the issues that really matter to them, not just the issues we want to talk about.
With your help, we’ll bring this strategy to Democrats nationwide.
Thank you,
Artie
Artie Blanco
Vice Chair
Democratic National Committee
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250208_2726_fr&refcode2=2726_22930333_waQteD&akid=2726%2E22930333%2EwaQteD)

name: COURIER Newsroom
subject: Elon’s hostile takeover is a crisis. Why isn’t the media covering it that way?
body:
This isn’t just another shift from one party controlling the government to another—it’s a coordinated takeover happening in real time. And Elon Musk, the world’s richest man, isn’t just another Trump crony—he’s leading the charge.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101774198/527034950/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM5ZWNhNmQtMmFlNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBIqrwUlqRX3EHdlwM9DtXrGC1Elfk4t4a92S7opG0U=&emci=1dfbb067-2ae6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9c9eca6d-2ae6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Elon Musk, backed by a team of anonymous teenage hackers, now has direct access to the U.S. Treasury payment data. Federal agencies like USAID are being gutted without congressional approval. And Russell Vought, the mastermind behind Project 2025, now controls the federal budget—giving him the power to defund and dismantle the government from within.
**This isn’t just another shift from one party controlling the government to another—it’s a coordinated takeover happening in real time. And Elon Musk, the world’s richest man, isn’t just another Trump crony—he’s leading the charge.**
[**We’ll explain why the media isn’t covering the destruction of the federal government like the five-alarm fire it is, but first—can you chip in****$25****now to help COURIER expose the truth while corporate media looks away?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101774199/527034951/2081197767?refcode=20250208-EM-Elon-Coup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM5ZWNhNmQtMmFlNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBIqrwUlqRX3EHdlwM9DtXrGC1Elfk4t4a92S7opG0U=)
**So why isn’t the media treating this moment like another January 6th, a hurricane, or a national emergency?**
**_Because they’re scared._**
Trump has sued them, threatened them, and used right-wing media to turn half the country against them. Now, instead of doing their job—reporting the truth and defending democracy—they’re playing it safe.
They’re covering the slow coup the same way they cover everything Trump does—as just another spectacle. Like his DEI plane crash lie, his Greenland invasion stunt, his fake trade war.
They’re playing into Bannon’s “flood the zone” strategy, covering the chaos but missing the power grab. Only this time, it’s not incompetence—it’s fear.
Meanwhile, Musk’s DOGE now has direct access to federal IT systems—the same systems that send out Social Security and Medicare payments and keep planes in the sky.
**This is an attack on democracy—not in theory, but in practice. The corporate media must cover it that way—with 24/7 chyrons, blaring headlines, and the urgency this moment demands.**
If they won’t connect the dots, we will. COURIER is here to do what corporate media won’t—expose the truth, hold Musk and Trump accountable, and deliver fearless, fact-based journalism where it’s needed most.
[**We need a press that won’t back down. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101774664/527036162/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250208defend_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEwNzg0Ny0yYmU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sv_A33kzbFQwAKjmpbeR9daDaOmoQ2l3KqEZnigUCd0=) Hi Peter,

Convicted felon Trump has given Elon Musk, who is unelected, unvetted, and unconfirmed by the Senate, unprecedented access to the US Government. He is attempting a mass takeover of federal agencies, going as far as to bar people from entering federal buildings.

Now, DOGE has gained access to Treasury payment systems, sensitive taxpayer personal information, and even installed an outside server at OPM, putting the American people and our government in danger of cybersecurity and hacking problems. To be clear, it is unlawful for Musk and his minions – non-government employees without security clearances – to have this much access. **Meanwhile, my Republican colleagues are blocking any oversight.**

The American people deserve answers.

At best, this is gross negligence and complete incompetence by the Trump administration. At worst, Trump knows full well what he is doing and has signed off on putting citizens at risk of foreign adversaries like China and Russia gaining access to our sensitive data.

[**This much is clear: Republicans don’t want the American people to know what Musk is doing – instead, they want to run cover as an unelected billionaire strips the government for parts. But I am determined to fight back to protect our democracy. Give right now, and you’ll be at the top of the list! Friend: Can I count on you to answer my urgent plea of support before it’s too late? Donate $10 right now to STAND WITH TRUMP! Quit yer bellyachin’ folks! That’s what Republicans are suggesting as unelected billionaire Musk shuts down government agencies, cancels congressionally approved funding, and accesses our government’s sensitive payment systems that we rely on. North Carolina Senator Thom Tillis agreed that Musk’s actions are unconstitutional but “nobody should bellyache about that.” Florida Senator and Medicare fraudster Rick Scott said, “he’s (Musk) is doing exactly what he should be doing.” **Friend, none of Musk’s activities are legal. clean_body: | | | Quit yer bellyachin’ folks! That’s what Republicans are suggesting as unelected billionaire Musk shuts down government agencies, cancels congressionally approved funding, and accesses our government’s sensitive payment systems that we rely on. North Carolina Senator Thom Tillis agreed that Musk’s actions are unconstitutional but “nobody should bellyache about that.” Florida Senator and Medicare fraudster Rick Scott said, “he’s (Musk) is doing exactly what he should be doing.” Friend, none of Musk’s activities are legal. This is a coup, yet Republicans won’t stand up for our Constitution. How unAmerican! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Musk now has access to our personal information, and he is shutting down government agencies he doesn’t like! USAID has been shuttered, and payments to Lutheran Social Services, which provides services to senior living facilities, is next. Republicans don’t care! name: All On The Line
subject: They’re attempting to erase the real story of America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This month, as we honor the courage and sacrifice of Black Americans who fought for justice, we must also carry forward their fight for a truly equitable America.
|
---

Peter, this Black History Month comes as our nation is confronting profound challenges.
From the Trump administration trying to end racial justice work throughout the federal government to the MAGA movement's continued attacks on civil rights movement accomplishments like the Voting Rights Act (VRA), we face a coordinated assault on decades of progress.
**These aren't just attacks on programs and policies — they're attempts to erase the real story of America.**
In state after state, we're seeing efforts to ban books about Black history, eliminate diversity initiatives in schools and workplaces, and make it harder for communities of color to have their voices heard at the ballot box.
The challenges we face today would be painfully familiar to civil rights leaders of the past. But their legacy teaches us that change is possible when we stand together against injustice.
**This month, and every month, as we honor their courage and sacrifice, this movement will continue to carry forward their fight for a truly equitable America.**
That includes working to uphold the VRA — the crown jewel of the Civil Rights Movement.
Right now, anti-democratic forces are trying to dismantle a key piece of the VRA to continue diluting Black voting power and are attacking Black opportunity districts in Alabama and Georgia.
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is pushing back in court to ensure fair representation and protect the VRA.
**Fighting for racial justice includes working to ensure that Black Americans can make their voices heard in our democracy with fair, representative maps. And we are committed to that fight.**
— All On The Line

* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Tommy Tuberville isn’t just a senator — he’s a fighter. Since arriving in Washington, he has been one of the most determined conservatives standing up to Joe Biden’s disastrous policies. **Now, as he prepares for re-election, it’s up to us to make sure he has the support he needs to keep battling for America.**

Before politics, Coach Tuberville built championship teams on the football field. He knows what it takes to win, and he’s brought that same leadership to the Senate. When it comes to standing up for our conservative values, he never backs down from a fight.
---
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4c3557743e08423ba793e3a4e2208511&_e=uy51lgvCle-u2k8b3qbLQe1JAaTYAAl6dkOukprMD3QzGD0_LAOXMo08_-fPe5-TStlBqUUY8yUa_rvMtnNKQmlNkrZnKyLM7Njd8BxSfU1U2YUNDVfekFkpIPdAJpwUrGl89FunfaZCugRKMS0XqDAds4WOetd_0hqYg1otcd3OKcTSjnyDrD2vPAIHstzHQRLf4AFJQZ_DDuaMr3IowoObl57KjBO3pZ0GgFlAuHkR4cvJYPTeIXF_FZfd60Dx)

He proved that when he took on the Pentagon’s outrageous policy of funding abortion travel with taxpayer dollars. While others stayed silent, Coach Tuberville stood firm. His pressure ultimately forced the Pentagon to reverse course — a major victory for life and for American taxpayers. Now Coach Tuberville is leading the charge to protect women’s sports from being undermined by radical gender ideology. His bill to enshrine President Trump's executive action into law is common sense, but Democrats refuse to accept reality. Thankfully, Coach isn’t afraid to call them out and fight for policies that promote truth and fairness. **Sadly, the Left is already gearing up to take him down. They know how effective he is, and they’ll do everything they can to defeat him in 2026. We can’t let that happen.** **[**Will you step up with a contribution to help Coach Tuberville?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4c3557743e08423ba793e3a4e2208511&_e=uy51lgvCle-u2k8b3qbLQe1JAaTYAAl6dkOukprMD3QzGD0_LAOXMo08_-fPe5-TStlBqUUY8yUa_rvMtnNKQmlNkrZnKyLM7Njd8BxSfU3WMvU0klp1QosrEzjMDe21eJuvBmb1Y0hdYcyTY_XdGsMeKuaXPOPG2JBZfDTmuqLfiHrye83udzwphCairIEgTtNFhgAPm2W8Y3VnrE-RfcDCyoM6sfUewEc6hJInORBPoN55w0FKznP8yID8Qe4o)** _The Senate Conservatives Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your contribution directly to his campaign. name: The Long Run PAC
subject: We are running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
On April 1st, Wisconsin voters will head to the polls to elect a new Justice to the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
#
Friend, we’re now less than two months from a hugely consequential election in Wisconsin.
On April 1st, Wisconsin voters will head to the polls to elect a new Justice to the Wisconsin Supreme Court. **That vote will decide whether or not the far-right takes control of this all-important court.**
We’re supporting Judge Susan Crawford in this race, because she is committed to defending abortion rights, protecting workers, blocking the GOP’s undemocratic gerrymandering, and much more.
But with so little time until this election is said and done, we can’t sit on the sidelines and hope it goes well.
If you could chip in today, even just $5 or $10, it would help power Judge Crawford’s campaign as they work to organize at the grassroots level.
And it’s not even about how much you give, as long as everyone steps up and does their part, it will add up to be more than enough to take on the right-wing extremists and win. Trust us, we’ve seen it work time and time again.
So please: [**Give us a hand here in Wisconsin and help us keep a pro-choice, pro-worker, pro-democracy majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. We are running out of time to make our case to voters.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi-sc-25.Q_KG1S&refcode=em250206-1-210&t=1&akid=5483%2E196590%2EmLU4qB)

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Elon Musk’s government takeover
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
An unelected billionaire is raiding our federal government.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250208-1&t=1&akid=1710%2E587540%2E22nld7)
Peter,
Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s fake agency, the Department of Government Efficiency, has been raiding and upending the federal government for days.
When this unelected billionaire was given full access to our taxpayer money and our government, Rep. Maxwell Frost – the first ever Gen Z member of Congress – joined Democrats at the Treasury Department to try and fight back.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250208-1?refcode=em20250208-1710&amount=5&refcode2=1710_587540_22nld7&akid=1710%2E587540%2E22nld7)
Watchdog groups are saying that **Musk’s government takeover might be the biggest privacy and security breach in American history.** An unelected billionaire is engaging in an unconstitutional witch hunt and mining our classified information.
Maxwell and other young leaders like Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez have been sounding the alarm. This is an important step to earning back the trust of young voters. We need to cut through the chaos, tell young folks what’s happening, and give them real ways that they can take action and fight back against this bullsh*t.
**Now more than ever, we need to elect more young progressive leaders who are not afraid to fight back against the lawlessness and chaos from the MAGA GOP.**
That’s exactly what we’re doing at Leaders We Deserve – but we need your help. We don’t have billionaires like Elon behind our efforts. **_We have people power._**
**[Can you contribute $5 or anything you can to support this work right now? No donation is too small – every dollar makes a real impact in the fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250208-1?refcode=em20250208-1710&amount=5&refcode2=1710_587540_22nld7&akid=1710%2E587540%2E22nld7)**

Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *

We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

subject: please, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I’ll be straight with you: I’m about to tell you three critical facts about where things stand — and then I’m going to ask you to chip in $14. Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Mike Johnson are taking a wrecking ball to our government and Democracy — but we have an unprecedented opportunity to stop their schemes in their tracks. Will you rush in $14 before midnight to win three upcoming special elections, flip the House blue, and make sure this is MAGA Republicans’ last months in power for decades to come? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, I need you to know three critical things:

1. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] We just handed Republicans one of the smallest House majorities in history.

2. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] We’re heading into three special elections that could flip critical seats from red to blue.

3. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] If we win them, we’ll render Republicans’ narrow majority useless — and put Trump, Musk, and Johnson on notice that their days in power are numbered.

That’s why we must build an unbeatable foundation of grassroots support, prove to everyone watching that we are a united front against Trump, Musk, and their Republicans, and win historic victories in these special elections. Can I count on you to rush in $14? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, I need you to make a critical choice in this difficult moment:

You can either let Trump and Musk take a wrecking ball to our government, win these special elections, and lock us out of power for good...

...Or you can stand up, do something bold, and help build a historic victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Will you stand with me and help flip these three critical seats? Even a donation of $14 on your part will make a difference. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Thank you,

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

body:

The Senate just confirmed a fossil fuel CEO to serve as the Secretary of Energy.

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: I will not be bullied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, this is too important to miss, so I wanted to bump it back to the top of your inbox.
---
**Right now, the federal DOJ is working to outright _attack_ public servants like me for rightfully holding those in power accountable. **
They think they can evade justice. And they think they can intimidate me.

**Well, Peter, I'm here to tell you that they're _wrong_.**
**I'm prepared to fight back with everything that I have to ensure the rule of law is upheld – but I need fearless fighters like you with me. [Will you help send a powerful message that this grassroots team of fearless fighters will not bow or be bullied by rushing $5 or more to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101779465/527046659/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1819-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzVjNWUyYi0zMGU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6c6kJ0e4xaqwEiq6LO0PPWkvp3PPR4-MwdKpihIqCo=)**
Thank you.

– Letitia James

Through their so-called "Weaponization Working Group," these extremists are now using their powers to not only scrutinize but outright punish public servants like me for simply doing our jobs.
Since the very first day I was elected as New York's attorney general, I have made it my mission to uphold the rule of law, no matter what.

In the years since, I have not backed down from that fight for even a second.
_And I refuse to shrink in response to these threats!_

Because if even just one person is viewed as above the law, our justice system will crumble. **But this fight is bigger than me – it's about protecting the very foundation of our democracy. And I can't do it alone.[Which is why I'm asking you today to join this critical fight to protect our democracy and our justice system by donating $5 or more right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101779472/527046666/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1819-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzVjNWUyYi0zMGU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6c6kJ0e4xaqwEiq6LO0PPWkvp3PPR4-MwdKpihIqCo=)**
Let's show them that we won't back down.
– Letitia James
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. name: GIFFORDS
subject: [BREAKING] Trump’s full-on attack on gun safety progress
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Last night, Donald Trump issued an executive order likely to overturn much of the gun safety progress that President Biden made
#

Team, we hate to come to you with bad news on a Saturday morning. But we need to let you know about this:
**Last night, Donald Trump issued an executive order calling on the attorney general to review every executive gun safety action taken during the Biden Administration—a precursor for undoing them.**
His reasoning for this? He claims the Second Amendment is “under attack.”
[**This is not a moment where we can sit idly by. We need you with us to fight back against this dangerous new executive order. If you’re ready to join the fight, please rush in a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC right now:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250208-1-b&t=1&akid=9962%2E3935704%2EG5dTot)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250208-1-b&t=2&akid=9962%2E3935704%2EG5dTot)**
It comes as no surprise that Trump waited until a Friday night to issue this order. That’s because he knows that overturning commonsense gun safety legislation is incredibly unpopular. The majority of Americans—no matter how they identify politically—support commonsense gun laws.
It is abhorrent that our president is choosing to prioritize gun lobby profits over gun safety when nearly 46,000 people die from gun violence every year in America, and when it is this country’s number one cause of death for children and teens.
[**We will be fighting with everything we’ve got to make sure that all of our hard-earned progress is not overturned by the Trump Administration. Please, chip in to GIFFORDS PAC right now to help us with this critical work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250208-1-b&t=3&akid=9962%2E3935704%2EG5dTot)

subject: Democrats Need to Fight Back!
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101782352/527053504/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMzZmU4YzMtMzVlNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2tGwFvptcYfn-WoMSgJ8DHRe34v1D-_l4KFRMV5MFpc=&emci=73fc238b-d9e5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e33fe8c3-35e6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
So, are you asking when are Democrats going to start fighting back?

Well, we never stopped!

Term Limit the Court is the national campaign working with 75 members of the House and Senate, including Hakeem Jeffries, Dan Goldman, Sheldon Whitehouse, and Adam Schiff, to end lifetime appointments to the Supreme Court and enact 18-year term limits.

SCOTUS and its radical right-wing MAGA majority have become an instrument of Trump, and justices are all too ready to green-light his assault on the Constitution!

But what they don’t account for is us!

We’re already back at work raising what’s needed to back candidates in the mid-term who pledge to support the TERM ACT.

If you want SCOTUS to uphold “Equal justice under law” instead of a court depriving women of the right to choose, then join our effort.

We need majorities in the House and Senate to pass this legislation and send Clarence Thomas into retirement and we need your help to get that done.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101782353/527053578/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMzZmU4YzMtMzVlNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2tGwFvptcYfn-WoMSgJ8DHRe34v1D-_l4KFRMV5MFpc=)

**[>>>Term Limit the Court is on a mission. We’ve built it into a movement. Join us. Save the Supreme Court because in doing so, you’re helping to save our Democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101782354/527053583/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMzZmU4YzMtMzVlNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2tGwFvptcYfn-WoMSgJ8DHRe34v1D-_l4KFRMV5MFpc=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101782355/527053586/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMzZmU4YzMtMzVlNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2tGwFvptcYfn-WoMSgJ8DHRe34v1D-_l4KFRMV5MFpc=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101782356/527053589/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMzZmU4YzMtMzVlNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2tGwFvptcYfn-WoMSgJ8DHRe34v1D-_l4KFRMV5MFpc=)

Minnesota's Democrat leaders are openly defying President Trump's directives on immigration enforcement, jeopardizing the safety of our communities.
Governor Tim Walz has enacted policies that hinder cooperation with federal immigration authorities, effectively turning Minnesota into a sanctuary for illegal immigrants.
This defiance not only undermines federal efforts to secure our borders but also places Minnesotans at increased risk.
We cannot stand idly by as our state's Democrat leaders prioritize political agenda over the well-being of Minnesotans. It's important that we take immediate action to support policies that uphold the rule of law and ensure the safety of our communities. **[So please make a contribution to help hold Minnesota Democrat leaders accountable for their defiance of President Trump’s immigration plan.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQxfMBGIy40AggxKgunxTv6GEM3oCpAsJAFhFYY23LVbdD_BagRCe_6SrpXUs)**********

clean_body: | | | **** The MAGA movement is on a rampage, wielding a wrecking ball to dismantle everything we hold dear—especially when it comes to diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI). A worker at an intelligence agency reported that unidentified outside staffers swooped in to purge the office of anything they deemed “woke.” What did they take? A simple plaque that read, “Be kind to everyone.” Yes, you heard that right. Kindness is now a target! At Able Dems, we believe in electing Democrats with disabilities and allies who champion DEI and kindness for all. We refuse to let the forces of division dictate the narrative.** But to make this vision a reality, we need your help! Together, we can fight back against this purge and ensure our government reflects the values of kindness and acceptance. you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Let’s reclaim our narrative and remind everyone that kindness is not just a plaque—it’s a way of life! -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: Sam W. (Path to Progress)
subject: Fetterman betrayed us
body:
| |

Fetterman cozied up to Trump and voted to confirm Trump’s nominee for Attorney General. | [View in browser](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NzgzOTYwMTA0ODYyOTI2LFwiclwiOjE0NTc4NDAyNzczNjk2NjE3NH0iLCJzIjoiNWM5YjQ3ODI4OWI1NGZhZCJ9)

|

Friend,

In 2022, I was proud to lead an organization that endorsed John Fetterman for Senate. He presented himself as a pro-working class progressive who would bring a new type of leadership to Washington. But I couldn’t have been more wrong.

The organization I lead, _Path to Progress_ , coordinated an endorsement with his campaign and proudly issued a public endorsement. **Today, we’re rescinding it.**

Yesterday, Fetterman reached a new low by voting to confirm Donald Trump’s far-right nominee for Attorney General—who denies the results of the 2020 election—and by expressing support for Trump’s harebrained plan for the United States to _invade and occupy_ the Gaza Strip.
|
---
| [ ](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NzgzOTYwMTE1MzQ4NjkxLFwiclwiOjE0NTc4NDAyNzczNjk2NjE3NH0iLCJzIjoiZTcwMzc0NzFkODQzMThkMCJ9)
---
|
---
We need to elect real progressives and show these “Democrats” that capitulating to Trump is as unpopular as it is wrong.__
|
---
_**[Path to Progress is the key to building a robust opposition to MAGA within Generation Z. To support our movement as we embark on the next four years of Trump, can we count on you to make a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NzgzOTYwMTIxNjQwMTUwLFwiclwiOjE0NTc4NDAyNzczNjk2NjE3NH0iLCJzIjoiZWYyOWE1YmE2YzkxMjBjMCJ9)**_

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

You deserve to know that your personal information is safe, secure, and protected.

Earlier this week, the Trump administration gave Elon Musk access to the Treasury Department’s central payment system and therefore to Americans’ most sensitive personal information—including bank account details and Social Security numbers. With this access, the unelected billionaire and his so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” (DOGE) could block critical funding for health care, childcare, and other vital services.

Giving information like this to unauthorized individuals is not only unprecedented—it’s unlawful. As the richest man in the world, Elon Musk isn’t used to being told ‘no,’ but let’s be clear: No one is above the law.

That’s why I’m taking action, along with 18 other attorneys general. We just filed a lawsuit to defend your right to privacy, our Constitution, and essential funding that millions of people count on.

According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, which means you can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and get a full refund.

Peter, will you make your fully refundable $75 donation right now to help us as we work to safeguard your personal information and the programs many of us depend on?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250208ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250208ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, which means you can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and get a full refund. Peter, will you make your fully refundable $75 donation right now to help us as we work to safeguard your personal information and the programs many of us depend on? Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect. name: VoteVets VA Defense Fund
subject: All hands on deck: DOGE is in the VA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
There’s some unvetted, unaccountable Musk lackey plugged into the VA. Our personal data. Our benefits. Our VA.
#
Peter — we were waiting for this. Now it’s here. All hands on deck.
There’s some unvetted, unaccountable Musk lackey plugged into the VA. Our personal data. Our benefits. Our VA.
**VoteVets needs you NOW.**
We just set up the VoteVets VA Defense Fund, and we’re going to use it to fight any attempt — from the Trump administration, the Republicans in the House and Senate, Elon Musk and his interns, or anybody else — at slashing the benefits and care we earned.
**[MAKE A DONATION RIGHT AWAY TO ENSURE VOTEVETS HAS THE RESOURCES WE NEED TO DEFEND THE VA.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250208-1-f&t=1&akid=34146%2E3013755%2EJLQ9lC)
| [CHIP IN NOW](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250208-1-f&t=2&akid=34146%2E3013755%2EJLQ9lC)
---
They’re looking for “waste.” Sure.
Just like USAID was “waste” — an organization responsible for saving countless lives around the world and staving off conflict to keep American Troops safe.
They’re just checking out the IT systems. Sure.
Just like they were in “read only” at the Treasury — while Musk and the Goonies were rifling through millions of records, accessing Social Security numbers and trillions of dollars in payments.
There’s no chance — **_none**_ — that we’re taking the talking points on this one. We weren’t born yesterday.
We’re going to fight back in honor of the ones who came before us to build the VA, and we’re going to defend it so the VA is still around to serve the ones who come after us.
That’s our pledge. Now, we need you.
**[Chip into the VoteVets VA Defense Fund.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250208-1-f&t=3&akid=34146%2E3013755%2EJLQ9lC)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you take my focus group? -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. I am excited and honored to serve as your Chair of the DSCC.

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to invite you to join my official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable me to work alongside Senator Schumer to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250208-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=19505_9716520_o7uTcx&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=19505_9716520_o7uTcx&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19505%2E9716520%2Eo7uTcx)** to unsubscribe.

body:
This is just a small sample of the criminals the Trump Administration is deporting at record speed.

| |

| | | My fellow Americans:

A lot is being said about President Trump's deportations... The Liberal Propaganda Machine is peddling Fake News, Democrat officials are saying they'll resist the Trump Administration at every turn, and a Hollywood celebrity just went viral for crying about criminals being deported.

_But here 's the truth about who exactly these Radical Democrats want to keep on our streets:_
* A Haitian national with 17 convictions shouting "F*** Trump! Biden forever!"
* A sex offender from El Salvador
* A Venezuelan national convicted of attempted murder
* A Guatemalan man ordered to leave the US a decade ago
* A Tajik national arrested for reckless endangerment
* A Mexican migrant convicted of sexual abuse of a minor
* Members of the deadly MS-13 gang
* A group of Guatemalan nationals charged with crimes including battery and child abuse

This is just a small sample of the criminals the Trump Administration is deporting at record speed. Luckily, Trump and Tom Homan are CHARGING AHEAD no matter what obstruction Democrats put in their way.

**But that shouldn 't let the open-border Democrats off the hook - not for obstructing President Trump, not for suing his Administration, and certainly not for opposing the Laken Riley Act. **

**_[That's why I'm taking it upon myself to raise $500,000 to help unseat and expose these open-border Democrats who want to protect criminals.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/aS581TbieG_Bje1FvY09m3n4nAULWsrB587GP_GHD3IspYTfa6lxwgxdO6BWiwD8nVBQaS-7d3-KNbql5K4bqpfgwOi2nUPHXX9TCkurWX8Krtc4fVVzKr2OqGF6uDxlHw7Gds2zHqPBn8KHv5EH71OV1QX6ALK0echjjVjLDv_XjLqyRmFhI6-dqM6tKdSyCd6s-MUpZhYjVHHE5gU2AOzDudAf4JHiksZ6qyD319wFUTp1BPLLdEWMHZ3JUcD9PoOhKogRoaJaisMDlKaZO3wAgfEY3jzMyvUPRfrGgQZl8GuOQ8kBYigpCJ6xpRPFTL9Osni9JCXMqwwzfcONxeFVu81KpbqhmFNf5VJnufycJbHYSpamx5WObmzJQR490ZF2BfuHmOsA32yq7J8I47V6ksDIHdyINv9GHaDWqcqKia323hyQIXDQ5I2V_4a2LooaeEVKLD1Re95HY8XeT6N6J3F-rv30B_RFmUDNFXQjqHlxv8g8EoxMmgCGYnkpeJAaFqy1apaspsrXCY83KOrdk4TSLMpedUc/5GIAYRZpCFyGm6EQOFvm_-f9EAzxs6j8/5 "That’s why I’m taking it upon myself to raise $500,000 to help unseat and expose these open-border Democrats who want to protect criminals.")_**

A sex offender from El Salvador A Venezuelan national convicted of attempted murder A Guatemalan man ordered to leave the US a decade ago A Tajik national arrested for reckless endangerment A Mexican migrant convicted of sexual abuse of a minor Members of the deadly MS-13 gang A group of Guatemalan nationals charged with crimes including battery and child abuse This is just a small sample of the criminals the Trump Administration is deporting at record speed. Luckily, Trump and Tom Homan are CHARGING AHEAD no matter what obstruction Democrats put in their way. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: The Great Lakes are at risk - we’re fighting back.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's that simple, friend.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101788562/527066448/1039792322?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=250207_mk_lakes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ2Njk3OS0zY2U2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-TK0RDhcjJ_c0uib7M2oSTcL6wJic9m-i_VOT_ZNj4=)

We're known for a lot of things here in Ohio. We work hard, we work together, we build things from the ground up, and we never forget that chip on our shoulder. Wall Street may not get it, but we’re fiercely protective of our way of life. Friend, we're going to have to do that again. The acts of this administration are already putting the Great Lakes at risk. Tariffs will hurt families directly by raising costs, and threaten economic ties with Canada - an ally providing economic markets for our manufacturers. Now, Trump's attacks on the Environmental Protection Agency may disrupt efforts to protect our Great Lakes. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101788563/527066449/1039792322?refcode=250207_mk_lakes_img&ms=250207_mk_lakes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ2Njk3OS0zY2U2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-TK0RDhcjJ_c0uib7M2oSTcL6wJic9m-i_VOT_ZNj4=) No one pushes Ohioans around, friend. Especially not billionaire sellouts like Elon Musk, and this administration. That's why we're hard at work already to take back the House in 2026, lower costs for everyday families, protect our Great Lakes, and help our region grow and prosper. **[We need your support to make that possible. Already this year, we’ve seen unprecedented misinformation being spread:
🚨 **January 6th pardons:** President Trump granted clemency to over 1,500 people convicted of crimes during the attack on our Capitol—including leaders of far-right extremist groups. These aren’t “political prisoners.” These are, in many cases, domestic terrorists and at least two have re-offended since their release.
🚨 **Kristi Noem’s confirmation for Secretary of Homeland Security Secretary:** In her confirmation hearing, she suggested that fighting election disinformation is “mission drift.” Now that she leads DHS, we could lose one of our strongest federal agencies in the fight against election disinformation.
🚨 **Disinformation threats are only growing:** We know that bad actors—from foreign adversaries to election deniers—will continue to spread falsehoods in the months ahead. The only way to combat it is with truth, resources, and a commitment to protecting our democracy.
🚨 **On Day One on the job, Attorney General Pam Bondi** disbanded a critical FBI task force on foreign influence.
[**This decision could make our democracy less safe. I know we can hit this goal together. This is outrageous, friend, and we need grassroots Democrats like you to speak out immediately: | | | Friend: Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Republicans in Congress are trying to interfere with vital programs that hundreds of millions of Americans rely on – including Medicaid, Medicare, SNAP benefits, and Social Security. Any changes to these essential programs would be devastating for people in every corner of our country. And having our social programs cut by an unelected billionaire that Trump installed is not what anybody voted for. That’s why we need to raise our voices NOW to protect these vital lifelines for American families. We’re looking for just 18 more Democrats in your area to sign our urgent petition before midnight – and your name is one of the ones we're still missing. Please, friend: | | | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.
