name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: [POLL] I'd like your feedback
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey

Peter,

President Trump has had a historic and incredible start to his second term – addressing many of his campaign promises right out of the gate.

But now Congress has to get to work to deliver his America First Agenda for the American people.

It won’t be easy. Democrats are already plotting to “blow this place up” as AOC put it, to try and stop us from doing what voters sent us to Congress to do.

No matter how hard the radical Left tries to stop us, I will keep fighting to deliver for you and your family.

And to help me fulfill this promise, I asked my staff to put together an America First Priorities Survey so that I could have you and my other top supporters fill it out and let me know exactly what you think Congress should be working on to fix America.

[So please take a few moments and take my America First Priorities Survey and share your thoughts on the biggest issues we are tackling in Congress.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

[CONTRIBUTE >> $25](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=25)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $50](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=50)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $75](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=75)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $100](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=100)

[CONTRIBUTE >> $250](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=250)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A /&amount=other)

One thing is certain, our Republican majority is going to do every single thing we can to fix the border, stop the flow of fentanyl into America, extend tax cuts, unleash American energy, and put an end to the liberal woke agenda.

The executive orders that we’ve seen from President Trump in his first weeks in office are a major step in the right direction, but until Congress passes legislation to be signed into law, these issues won’t be solved for good.

That is why it is so important that we act quickly and decisively.

Democrats are going to use every trick they have to stop these policies from happening, but with the American people behind us, we won’t fail.

That is why I need you to give your input by taking this survey.

[Please take a few moments and take my America First Priorities Survey and share your thoughts on the biggest issues we are tackling in Congress.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-priorities-survey?/utm_campaign=202500208&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A )

name: AOC
subject: Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Follow the money
#
Something very big is happening this year, and it's part of the structure around which all of this chaos is occurring.
You have to interpret all of this through a very important deadline, because why is _Elon Musk_ raiding the treasury? Why are they freezing federal funding?
**Follow the money.**
In 2017, Trump and the Republican Party forced through one of the largest tax giveaways to the rich in modern American history.
We're talking _grotesque_ levels of tax cuts: CEO’s getting write-offs for yachts and private jets, and some of the most broad-based tax cuts for the 1% that we have ever seen in this country.
Those tax cuts had a sunset period — and **that sunset period occurs in 2025**.
What Elon Musk wants is for these tax cuts to not only be extended, but to apply to him in a larger way than ever before so that he can amass even more money.
But in order to extend them, **they need to find _four trillion dollars_**. So they're going to go after massive programming cuts, and they propose cutting “waste.”**
And the biggest one that they are going after is Medicaid.
**So understand the central motivations here**. This is about preying on working class people in order to suck up what little is left of American public infrastructure and hand it over to Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and all these corporations.
Trump has completely given up his power and handed it over to Elon Musk.
But we do not have to comply with illegal activity — **even if that illegal activity is coming from the President and his billionaire donors**.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250208.m7QlDd&refcode=em20250208-8099-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8099%2E2526796%2EgIExKW)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250208.m7QlDd&refcode=em20250208-8099-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8099%2E2526796%2EgIExKW)**
Do not give up the strategic advantage of our numbers. Do what you can and do not submit, and know that what you can do is enough.
I'm sure there's so much going on that there are things that I may not have addressed. For that, I apologize. We will come back to it.
More soon,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250208?refcode=em20250208-8099-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=8099_2526796_gIExKW&akid=8099%2E2526796%2EgIExKW)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250208-8099-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=22&akid=8099%2E2526796%2EgIExKW)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8099%2E2526796%2EgIExKW) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8099%2E2526796%2EgIExKW) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8099%2E2526796%2EgIExKW)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: I’m seeing early reports that the radical Left is actively mobilizing across the Country to derail and undermine President Trump and his Republican supporters. | Fellow American, I'm seeing early reports that the radical Left is actively mobilizing across the Country to derail and undermine President Trump and his Republican supporters. The level of funding and scale of their operation is ALARMING! The extreme Left knows a Republican Senate Majority is CRITICAL to the success of President Trump's plan to stop the invasion at our Southern Border and rebuild our economy. That's why their top target is my good friend and the architect of the Republican Senate Majority, Senator Steve Daines. Democrats already have activists and money flowing into Montana to defeat Steve in 2026. If we allow the radical Left to outraise and outorganize us at this early stage, we'll be permanently behind, giving Democrats ample ammunition to go on the offensive against President Trump. God Bless America, Mike Pompeo Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, Last night I saw President Trump! It was so great to see him and thank him for everything that he is doing for our country! The golden age of our nation is HERE! President Trump is putting America FIRST! And we are making America GREAT AGAIN each day under his strong leadership! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=01cd96d07009fe74fe5cf2aad7084a40fa902e67d9615e865334b3100d6683ea0be52879579daf8038b02539e248a996ec61f522443a9c9b76dbb5aa78062c12 After seeing the President, I had an idea to put together a HUGE card full of signatures from MAGA patriots nationwide to thank him for everything he has already done for our country and express our support for all that is to come! My team is getting ready to open this card up to all the TOP patriots on our file… But before they do that, I wanted to reach out to YOU - due to your long history of support for both me and President Trump - to ask if you would do me the honor of being the FIRST signature? https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=01cd96d07009fe74fe5cf2aad7084a40fa902e67d9615e865334b3100d6683ea0be52879579daf8038b02539e248a996ec61f522443a9c9b76dbb5aa78062c12 “THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP!” https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=01cd96d07009fe74fe5cf2aad7084a40fa902e67d9615e865334b3100d6683ea0be52879579daf8038b02539e248a996ec61f522443a9c9b76dbb5aa78062c12 >" alias="ADD YOUR SIGNATURE HERE >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">ADD YOUR SIGNATURE HERE >> We are hoping to break a signature record of names on this card, but by signing right here and now, the spot right at the top will be reserved for you! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=01cd96d07009fe74fe5cf2aad7084a40fa902e67d9615e865334b3100d6683ea0be52879579daf8038b02539e248a996ec61f522443a9c9b76dbb5aa78062c12 What do you say? Will you join me in thanking President Trump for everything he is doing for our country and add your name now? Thank you, Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. name: Rachel Rothman
subject: I’m with Jay Jones – are you?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

Hi there! My name is Rachel Rothman, and I’m Jay Jones’ campaign manager.

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself while I’m out helping Jay meet voters in every part of the Commonwealth.

I’ve worked in campaigns here in Virginia and across the country to help strong, pro-family voices – like Jay – get elected at every level of government.

Right now, the Commonwealth is facing its first big test after Donald Trump was elected last November with MAGA ally Attorney General Jason Miyares being up for re-election.

The problem is that Jason Miyares is too aligned with the rich and powerful. Whether it’s attacking a woman’s right to access reproductive care or putting wealthy corporations ahead of hard-working families, Jason Miyares has proven he will not stand up for Virginians’ needs.

But for Jay, it’s all about giving back to his community and making everyone’s voices heard. If you agree he’s the type of leader Virginia deserves, please make a contribution to support our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

SUPPORT JAY JONES TODAY → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

Virginians are all about sticking to our word and getting the job done. During Jay’s time as DC’s Assistant Attorney General and as a Virginia Delegate, he’s fought to expand Medicaid, increased the minimum wage, and taken on slumlords and big corporations – something Miyares won’t do.

With Jay and his family rooted right here in Hampton Roads, he will do anything to make sure that our families, friends, and future generations will have lives free from the dangers of gun violence and climate change. That’s why I’m fired up to help him get across the finish line in November.

Friends – Virginia will help determine how far this Trump administration can go. This is our chance to defend Virginia from even more chaos by defeating Jason Miyares.

So I need to ask: will you chip in $10, $25, or more to our people-powered movement so we can build the momentum we’ll need to win? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=100]
DONATE $200 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=200]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

Thank you for reading,
Rachel
Campaign Manager
Jay Jones for Attorney General

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

name: Rob Bonta
subject: BREAKING: My lawsuit against Trump, Musk, and DOGE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250208&t=1&akid=1628%2E1088799%2E7wCFcB)
Breaking news: I just filed another lawsuit against the Trump administration.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250208?refcode=em20250208-1628&refcode2=1628_1088799_7wCFcB&akid=1628%2E1088799%2E7wCFcB)
**Last night, I joined other Democratic attorneys general in suing to block Elon Musk and his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) from accessing Americans’ sensitive financial data.**
**[Will you fuel our fight? Rush a grassroots contribution now →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250208?refcode=em20250208-1628&refcode2=1628_1088799_7wCFcB&akid=1628%2E1088799%2E7wCFcB)**
Since Trump’s inauguration, Musk and his team of 19 to 24-year-old cronies have infiltrated federal agencies like USAID, the U.S. Treasury, and now the Departments of Labor and Education, accessing the personal information of millions of Americans without proper authorization.
_President Trump does not have the power to give an unelected billionaire your bank account and social security number_ _._
**A federal judge already responded to our lawsuit early this morning and granted a temporary restraining order** to block Musk and DOGE from continuing to access and potentially steal this sensitive information.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250208?refcode=em20250208-1628&refcode2=1628_1088799_7wCFcB&akid=1628%2E1088799%2E7wCFcB)
**[As I keep up the fight to stop yet another one of the Trump administration’s unlawful and dangerous actions, will you support our campaign with a grassroots donation of $5 or more?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250208?refcode=em20250208-1628&amount=5&refcode2=1628_1088799_7wCFcB&akid=1628%2E1088799%2E7wCFcB)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250208?refcode=em20250208-1628&amount=5&refcode2=1628_1088799_7wCFcB&akid=1628%2E1088799%2E7wCFcB)**
I’ll be in touch with more updates on this case when we have them. Thank you for your support along the way.
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250208&t=3&refcode2=1628_1088799_7wCFcB&akid=1628%2E1088799%2E7wCFcB)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1628%2E1088799%2E7wCFcB)

1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

Sign the petition to demand Congress fight back.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101797332/527092116/-647484403?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4%26ms%3Dea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=ea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmZGVhZjY2LTRkZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FI3P9od0czvu79PvvjsEUJ2lEc1XYBzGGfdoOnkAtpY=&emci=d5b4025d-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN ON →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101797333/527092117/-647484403?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4%26ms%3Dea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=ea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmZGVhZjY2LTRkZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FI3P9od0czvu79PvvjsEUJ2lEc1XYBzGGfdoOnkAtpY=&emci=d5b4025d-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)
---
Trump is signing executive orders so fast it feels impossible to track them all.
But here’s one we can’t afford to ignore: **An executive order to ban new offshore wind leases in federal waters and put existing clean energy projects under review.**
If Trump gets his way, offshore wind projects across the East Coast — including in Delaware, Maryland, Massachusetts, New Jersey, and Virginia — could be shut down, taking hundreds of thousands of jobs with them.
Let’s be real: Trump’s _“drill, baby, drill”_ agenda was never about lowering inflation costs for the American people. It’s about sabotaging clean energy to keep us reliant on fossil fuels for decades to come. He’s fast-tracking drilling, boosting oil exports, and making sure his Big Oil donors keep raking in record profits — all while everyday families pay the price.
Don’t let Washington off the hook — Congress has the power to act. Here’s what they must do:
✅ **Fund clean energy.** Lawmakers can direct funding to wind, solar, and other renewable projects that create jobs, lower costs, and move us toward energy independence.
🚨 **Block Trump’s illegal stalling tactics.** His administration is already trying to withhold Congressionally approved funds for renewables. Congress must act legislatively and, if necessary, in the courts to stop this power grab.
🔎 **Hold Trump’s fossil fuel allies accountable.** Urgent oversight is needed to expose and prevent Trump’s handpicked officials from gutting clean energy programs behind closed doors.
If we don’t push back now, Trump will succeed in gutting clean energy when we need it most.
**[Add your name now to demand Congress overturn Trump’s anti-climate attacks and protect our transition to renewable energy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101797334/527092118/-647484403?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4%26ms%3Dea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=ea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmZGVhZjY2LTRkZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FI3P9od0czvu79PvvjsEUJ2lEc1XYBzGGfdoOnkAtpY=&emci=d5b4025d-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=dfdeaf66-4de6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: We’re not backing down. | | | Trump is signing executive orders so fast it feels impossible to track them all. But here’s one we can’t afford to ignore: An executive order to ban new offshore wind leases in federal waters and put existing clean energy projects under review. If Trump gets his way, offshore wind projects across the East Coast — including in Delaware, Maryland, Massachusetts, New Jersey, and Virginia — could be shut down, taking hundreds of thousands of jobs with them. Let’s be real: Trump’s “drill, baby, drill” agenda was never about lowering inflation costs for the American people. It’s about sabotaging clean energy to keep us reliant on fossil fuels for decades to come. He’s fast-tracking drilling, boosting oil exports, and making sure his Big Oil donors keep raking in record profits — all while everyday families pay the price. Don’t let Washington off the hook — Congress has the power to act. Here’s what they must do: ✅ Fund clean energy. Lawmakers can direct funding to wind, solar, and other renewable projects that create jobs, lower costs, and move us toward energy independence. 🚨 Block Trump’s illegal stalling tactics. His administration is already trying to withhold Congressionally approved funds for renewables. Congress must act legislatively and, if necessary, in the courts to stop this power grab. 🔎 Hold Trump’s fossil fuel allies accountable. Urgent oversight is needed to expose and prevent Trump’s handpicked officials from gutting clean energy programs behind closed doors. If we don’t push back now, Trump will succeed in gutting clean energy when we need it most. Thanks for being in it with us. — Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Friend, **Trump’s inner circle is making moves, and we need to pay attention.** His daughter, Ivanka Trump, had stepped into a leadership role at the US Agency for International Development—the very agency that Trump and his allies have attacked and tried to dismantle. Meanwhile, USAID staff have been placed on administrative leave, and critical aid programs hang in the balance. This is Gay Valimont, candidate for FL-1, and **the hypocrisy needs to end NOW. With your help before the April 1st special elections, we can make an impact.**

This isn’t about public service. It’s about power. It’s about Trump’s people taking over institutions just to hollow them out from the inside. And once again, there’s no accountability. We can’t let Trump’s allies seize control of our government without a fight. I’m running because I believe in real leadership—**leadership that serves the people, not political dynasties.**

name: Kim Schrier
subject: Donald Trump should not be treated like a king.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Since taking office, Donald Trump has issued a series of executive orders that completely derail our government as we know it. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101797661/527093448/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTc0MmVlYS00ZWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oyeZbGAg6wDMq_GrI6EDXlU1R1uB181lgYJUEWzgS8A=&emci=15117c42-6de5-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e5742eea-4ee6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter –

**Since taking office, Donald Trump has issued a flood of executive orders that completely derail our government as we know it.**

Instead of working through Congress – _the branch of government elected to represent the people_ – he’s choosing to go around it. And when Americans speak out? Trump’s GOP allies in Congress brush them off.

Just last week, one Republican senator literally told people to _**“tell someone who cares.”**_

But let's get one thing straight...that is not leadership, and it's certainly not what democracy looks like. Republicans in the House and Senate are rolling over like lap dogs, letting Trump override their decisions, and simply ceding power! What happened to three equal branches of government?

Peter, the people of Washington’s 8th District elected me to ensure their voices are heard in Congress. And I take that responsibility seriously. But Trump’s run around Congress and the empowerment of Elon Musk undermine the very foundation of our government.

Simply put: We cannot allow this to become the norm. We must stand up and demand that Trump and Republicans in the House and Senate respect the legislative process and allow Congress to do its job. This is about more than just one president. It’s about protecting our democracy for generations to come. I will always fight to ensure your voice is heard – but I need you with me. clean_body: Since taking office, Donald Trump has issued a series of executive orders that completely derail our government as we know it. Peter – Since taking office, Donald Trump has issued a flood of executive orders that completely derail our government as we know it. Instead of working through Congress – the branch of government elected to represent the people – he’s choosing to go around it. And when Americans speak out? Trump’s GOP allies in Congress brush them off. Just last week, one Republican senator literally told people to “tell someone who cares.” But let's get one thing straight...that is not leadership, and it's certainly not what democracy looks like. Republicans in the House and Senate are rolling over like lap dogs, letting Trump override their decisions, and simply ceding power! What happened to three equal branches of government? Peter, the people of Washington’s 8th District elected me to ensure their voices are heard in Congress. And I take that responsibility seriously. But Trump’s run around Congress and the empowerment of Elon Musk undermine the very foundation of our government. Simply put: We cannot allow this to become the norm. We must stand up and demand that Trump and Republicans in the House and Senate respect the legislative process and allow Congress to do its job. This is about more than just one president. It’s about protecting our democracy for generations to come. I will always fight to ensure your voice is heard – but I need you with me. Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101797673/527093543/-202412641?contactdata=aRS4Fc+SymnPh4WRFFtEnBitGUu9bTrwgO359U9jB8Ufq5zZH52UYIpjO+VDRMfNDaLfUns5BhebFiVok0Xhsh9k50+XQtCqMXVCriHaabUiyJpBihPNUuF8zxvr+izB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzQyZWVhLTRlZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=owzzslRFCRC0j0BX4bNyBVI2fdWRWB_1rYfa93jq7pg=&emci=0aae4686-e9e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e4742eea-4ee6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

Hi Peter, We need your help to stop the harmful “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act, a dangerous piece of legislation designed to make it harder for millions of eligible Americans to register and vote. This bill would enact the most restrictive voter ID requirement this country has ever seen, by requiring strict proof of citizenship, such as a passport or birth certificate, to register or update voter registration. [**Do you have a second to stop voter suppression?**
](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101797675/527093545/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzQyZWVhLTRlZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=owzzslRFCRC0j0BX4bNyBVI2fdWRWB_1rYfa93jq7pg=&emci=0aae4686-e9e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e4742eea-4ee6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230) Requiring every citizen to provide a passport or birth certificate in person to register or update their voter information would impact all of us. It would especially impact working-class Americans, older voters, women who’ve changed their last name, and those who’ve lost essential documents due to natural disasters. Additionally, SAVE Act presents another barrier for low-income voters and voters from marginalized communities to participate in our elections. ** ** We need your support to stop this attempt at voter suppression. [**Email your Member of Congress today and tell them to vote NO on the SAVE Act!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101797677/527093547/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzQyZWVhLTRlZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=owzzslRFCRC0j0BX4bNyBVI2fdWRWB_1rYfa93jq7pg=&emci=0aae4686-e9e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e4742eea-4ee6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
---
[**Tell Congress to vote NO!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101797680/527093550/-202412641?contactdata=aRS4Fc+SymnPh4WRFFtEnBitGUu9bTrwgO359U9jB8Ufq5zZH52UYIpjO+VDRMfNDaLfUns5BhebFiVok0Xhsh9k50+XQtCqMXVCriHaabUiyJpBihPNUuF8zxvr+izB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzQyZWVhLTRlZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=owzzslRFCRC0j0BX4bNyBVI2fdWRWB_1rYfa93jq7pg=&emci=0aae4686-e9e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e4742eea-4ee6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
---
| | The SAVE Act isn’t about protecting elections, it’s about creating unnecessary barriers that silence voters and weaken our democracy. Despite claims to the contrary, there is no evidence of widespread voter fraud. It’s already illegal for non-citizens to cast a ballot in federal elections, and states have secure systems in place to prevent noncitizens from voting. During this unprecedented assault on voting rights, we can’t allow bad actors to subvert our democracy, limit access to the ballot, and undermine faith in our elections.

Our democracy is strongest when everyone has equal access to the ballot box. By speaking up, you can help ensure voting rights are protected for all. [**Will you take a few minutes and email your Member of Congress today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101797684/527093554/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0NzQyZWVhLTRlZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=owzzslRFCRC0j0BX4bNyBVI2fdWRWB_1rYfa93jq7pg=&emci=0aae4686-e9e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e4742eea-4ee6-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

subject: The school voucher scam is back

body:
#
**Greg Abbott and his billionaire megadonors are once again trying to destroy our public schools with his voucher scam.**
****
[**We’ll explain our plan to stop them, but use this link to donate to Powered by People today if you’re ready to join our team.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250208.CLorLi&refcode=ema20250208-239971&t=1&akid=239971%2E444211%2EAipEJ4)
If they are able to pass this bill, it would mean even more money is diverted away from public schools that desperately need funding in favor of handouts for the wealthy to attend private schools.
Far-right billionaires like Jeff Yass, Tim Dunn, and Farris Wilks have continued to spend outrageous amounts to stack the legislature with members who support school vouchers.
Powered by People has a plan to fight back. We know organized people can defeat organized money. Our team is meeting Texans where they are to make sure our elected officials represent the needs of us all, not just a wealthy few.
One thing is for sure: All Texans deserve access to a high quality public education and this plan moves us in the wrong direction. [**If you’re ready to join the fight, chip in $3 or more to Powered by People today. We will put your donation to work turning the tide of extremism in Texas.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250208.CLorLi&refcode=ema20250208-239971&t=2&akid=239971%2E444211%2EAipEJ4)

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: There’s a $100 billion hole in New York.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101797834/527093838/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTc0MmVlYS00ZWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DzxiMYv4Me_KTmV21iHBsTKUYNrMBvNMS__-gTSbGE4=)
---
Peter, did you know that the State of New York receives about $100 billion from the federal government?

Well Peter, **President Donald Trump is claiming that he has the absolute authority to create a $100 billion hole** _not only_ in the budget of New York, but in the lives of New Yorkers who depend on essential government programs for their health and safety.

President Trump’s decision to freeze federal funds for essential public goods like health care, home care, child care, food, and shelter is _WRONG._ This decision disproportionately impacts communities in NY-15, and I won’t stand for it.

**I will always believe in the importance of safeguarding federally funded programs from falling victim to Donald Trump’s unchecked defunding efforts,_but I need to know you’re with me:_**

**[Peter, will you stand with me against Donald Trump’s attempts to freeze federal spending and hurt New Yorkers? body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020825_1&amount=25]
WPRI: Movement seeks to remove Electoral College, elect president by popular vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=020825_1&amount=25]
It’s simple, folks. Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go.
It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. Chip in $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=020825_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020825_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020825_1&amount=25]

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: We can’t risk losing a single seat
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
You already know what happens when extreme Republicans are in control. We have to stop a Republican takeover in states like Pennsylvania to ensure it doesn’t create a ripple effect across the country. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**We have less than seven weeks left before a tie-breaking special election in the Pennsylvania House.** 🔵 State Democrats held their ground in the PA House last fall, securing a one-seat majority.
🔴 Extreme Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take power – if they flip the chamber in next month’s election, they’ll gain _total control_ of the PA legislature. [We can’t risk losing a single seat. name: Team Sharice
subject: Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dark-money donors like Elon Musk have consolidated an unprecedented amount of power within our government

Hi team, I’m Gay Valimont! I’m a mom, a community advocate, and the Democrat running to REPLACE Matt Gaetz and deliver a CRUSHING blow to MAGA Extremism in Congress. [**Before I go any further, can I count on you to help me WIN this special election and flip this seat into Democrat hands by donating $10, or whatever you can afford -- split evenly with Seth Moulton?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101798853/527097463/1131448904?refcode=250208_MFC_Gay_Replacement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI2MDk0YS01MWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19U5eCi1X1QqOEcgyvv_aumjguNk36j6D2skH02lfd8=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101798854/527097464/1131448904?refcode=250208_MFC_Gay_Replacement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI2MDk0YS01MWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19U5eCi1X1QqOEcgyvv_aumjguNk36j6D2skH02lfd8=) For far too long, this district has been at the center of controversy and scandal. Matt Gaetz’s name has become synonymous with everything wrong in Congress. All Gaetz has brought back to the district chaos, extremism, and self-interest, leaving the people of our great district DESPERATE for real change. Together, we have the chance to do something extraordinary. We can turn the page and send a leader to Congress who actually represents you. Someone who believes in listening to the people, not just pandering to the MAGA base. Here’s why I’m running: ▶️To bring integrity back to Congress: I believe public service should mean serving the public – not personal ambition. ▶️ To protect our democracy: Our democracy has been under attack, and it’s time to fight back against extremism. ▶️To deliver for Florida families: Affordable healthcare, good jobs, and safe schools shouldn’t just be campaign promises – they should be reality. I’m not a politician chasing the next headline. And, like you, I’ve had enough of the noise and chaos in Congress. My ONLY focus is to make life better for working-class people. This is a special election, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. With the GOP holding only a slim majority in the House, flipping this seat would send a clear message: MAGA extremism isn’t what America stands for. But here’s the truth: winning this race will be an uphill battle. The GOP is already pouring resources into keeping this seat under their control. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. [**Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or $100 -- split with Seth Moulton -- to become a Founding Donor and help us fight back against MAGA Extremism?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101798855/527097465/1131448904?refcode=250208_MFC_Gay_Replacement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI2MDk0YS01MWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19U5eCi1X1QqOEcgyvv_aumjguNk36j6D2skH02lfd8=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101798856/527097467/1131448904?refcode=250208_MFC_Gay_Replacement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI2MDk0YS01MWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19U5eCi1X1QqOEcgyvv_aumjguNk36j6D2skH02lfd8=) This is our chance to bring new leadership to Northwest Florida and send a message loud and clear: Congress is no place for chaos. It’s time to focus on solutions, not scandals. Whether it’s $10, $100, or whatever you can afford, every single donation gets us closer to victory on April 1st. And trust me, the only April Fools we’ll celebrate are the MAGA extremists who underestimate us. [_**Chip in now -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help replace Matt Gaetz with a leader who will fight for you!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101798857/527097475/1131448904?refcode=250208_MFC_Gay_Replacement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI2MDk0YS01MWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19U5eCi1X1QqOEcgyvv_aumjguNk36j6D2skH02lfd8=) Thank you for believing in this campaign. Together, we’re going to build something amazing – and it starts with you. Let’s get to work. With hope,
Gay Valimont
Democrat for Florida’s 1st Congressional District [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101798858/527097482/1131448904?refcode=250208_MFC_Gay_Replacement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjI2MDk0YS01MWU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=19U5eCi1X1QqOEcgyvv_aumjguNk36j6D2skH02lfd8=)

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8293%2E5257348%2ELBMfay ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — I’ve
spent my career standing up to corruption.

So even when the world’s wealthiest person came after me, I didn’t flinch.
And when he started cozying up to Trump, eventually becoming a close
advisor to the president of the United States? It made it all the more
important that I stand up to call out his lies and hold him accountable.

That’s exactly why Elon Musk has been attacking me for years.

He’s called me a criminal. He’s said my “brain is too small.” He’s used
his platform (whatever it’s called these days) to spread lies and amplify
hate against me.

But here’s the truth: It doesn’t matter. Because I don’t answer to Elon
Musk. I answer to you.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em.OeZ3Kx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250208_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8293%2E5257348%2ELBMfay ]While I stand up to the richest man in the world, will you have my back
and chip in $5, $10, or any amount to my campaign? Any amount goes a long
way in our work to respond to Musk’s lies and hold him accountable.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

MAGA Republicans in Louisiana are now trying to apply their abortion ban nationwide.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250208-4746-footer&t=1&akid=4746%2E420207%2EI7Br68)
Peter, with so much chaos coming out of the Trump administration these last few weeks, we know it can be hard to keep up with everything.
**But there’s an important story out of Louisiana we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250208?refcode=em20250208-4746&amount=3&refcode2=4746_420207_I7Br68&akid=4746%2E420207%2EI7Br68)
Despite Trump’s campaign promise that he _wouldn’t_ further restrict abortion, MAGA Republicans in Louisiana are now trying to apply their ban nationwide.
**As these attacks ramp up, it’s critical that we fight back and make it clear that this is a LOSING issue for Republicans.**
Pramila has always been a staunch advocate for a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions, and in Congress she’s fought to expand access to abortion care. **But she needs your help to keep it up.**
[**Peter, will you pitch in $3 to Pramila’s campaign today and help us build the movement we need to restore and protect abortion access nationwide?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250208?refcode=em20250208-4746&amount=3&refcode2=4746_420207_I7Br68&akid=4746%2E420207%2EI7Br68)

In solidarity,
Team Pramila

body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=mAmBoa8noa9a0wOwvPXME3sPuNcyQ%2BIXQP5hPXTL9RTycZ0AEgfP0ujUxdI8oiGYkG7zMwu0iWiWl7KuTVf5QhDsRTRddfFpmA6KsE0LZ5LyRLqXfHgB3wFG9Z1z%2FxI6XYw19aldSu9wS9r47rnlnDIGcW5X7XP9yDmcu8vCe2OjpGh8uFoHihegNKR2m%2FtWFilx3X6Z2YIS49VaYHY2Q%2FuWTis95uSICJJoC5i76vzlTnjRQ%2BPw9bChWznOgo%2BnY0KPq1DPWkUGCcR3WkMOBS7HXfNxM5V6rs%2B1WMG5RXHYVXA2zCOF6dCP52UJDvjjtAm0PCXbk496ix3giyjC%2B7gQzzQNQQy4yRA1eZF6dxiJL50d5EZSVi9a3Kd3PINrIja%2FA8yFr2450spvxJ83J03eH8AHWvkwJ%2BmBAAKqGDaFcPBWq6T0YCdspv6Cbdp7)

---
Peter,

This week I, along with dozens of my Congressional colleagues, showed up for a meeting at the US Treasury. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101799536/527099653/2092876537?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250208_FR_Treasury_0_1MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2M0Mjc2MS01NGU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8znXZbAdXxKcyrTL2RcCs1TwJX0V4xk39FPuzVCuAng=) We were denied.

But, as we were turned away, something great happened.

Hundreds of people began filling the streets to join us in protest. Musk and Trump got the opportunity to see what I already knew: _Americans are not going to sit quietly by and let Elon steal their money and data._

Enough is enough. Unelected billionaires should not have access to the sensitive information of Americans. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Elon has your personal financial information
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

Let me be direct with you. Right now, Elon Musk and his group of young, inexperienced tech developers are tightening their grip on key parts of our government – especially the systems that manage your money.

We’re talking about infrastructure that handles your Social Security payments, Medicare benefits, tax refunds, and more. This is one of the most secure systems in the world, and now, Musk and his inexperienced tech bros have control over these systems. This is an unprecedented breach of your personal, private data.

STOP MUSK » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/PNV-Pf7CBkqgLv3-EmGWoQ2]

This isn’t about efficiency. It’s about power – power over the very programs that millions of Americans rely on to survive. The unelected billionaire trying to seize that power isn’t interested in protecting your financial security. He’s only interested in advancing their own agenda.

There is no oversight and no accountability for what they are doing with the payment system and your personal, private data.

We can’t afford to sit this out, friend. We can’t give just anyone access to our country’s money, and I’m working in Congress right now to put a stop to this madness. clean_body: Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. [] Friend, Let me be direct with you. Right now, Elon Musk and his group of young, inexperienced tech developers are tightening their grip on key parts of our government – especially the systems that manage your money. We’re talking about infrastructure that handles your Social Security payments, Medicare benefits, tax refunds, and more. This is one of the most secure systems in the world, and now, Musk and his inexperienced tech bros have control over these systems. This is an unprecedented breach of your personal, private data. STOP MUSK » [] This isn’t about efficiency. It’s about power – power over the very programs that millions of Americans rely on to survive. The unelected billionaire trying to seize that power isn’t interested in protecting your financial security. He’s only interested in advancing their own agenda. There is no oversight and no accountability for what they are doing with the payment system and your personal, private data. We can’t afford to sit this out, friend. We can’t give just anyone access to our country’s money, and I’m working in Congress right now to put a stop to this madness. clean_body: There is SO MUCH waste, fraud, and abuse within the federal government. This may be the best idea yet. | | | | This is genius, Friend. The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) will cut down on wasteful government spending and make it MUCH more efficient. Elon Musk has been selected to lead this effort, and he's already off to the races. House GOP has authorized the release of our new DOGE Survey, and you are 1 of 10 patriots from your area given clearance to complete this important survey. There is SO MUCH waste, fraud, and abuse within the federal government. And draining the swamp has been part of our mission since DAY 1. House Republicans are with DOGE every step of the way. We just need to know you are, too. "Will you complete your DOGE Survey today and join us?" | | | | DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY Issued By House GOP HQ PATRIOT: Friend STATUS: "INCOMPLETE" | | | "Generic Button" | | | "Generic Button" This survey closes at 11:59 pm tonight so please do not delay in your submission | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions .

I __hate__ asking people to chip in to my campaign. I dread it.

I know you work hard to earn a living, so I don’t take it lightly when I ask you to share some of that hard-earned money with my campaign.

But here’s the deal: Running a campaign in one of the most competitive districts in the country is expensive — especially when you have billionaires like Elon Musk working to defeat you.

---

**Peter, here’s what happens when you elect pro-democracy justices to state supreme courts:** They stand up to right-wing activists working to strip people of their constitutional freedoms. Late last year, Wisconsin Supreme Court Justices Jill Karofsky, Rebecca Dallet, Janet Protasiewicz, and Ann Walsh Bradley pushed back on efforts to uphold a 175-year-old total ban on abortions:
* Justice Karofsky painted this legal effort as a sign of a “world gone mad.”
* Justice Dallet questioned why a policy enacted by white, property-owning men should take precedent over everything that’s happened since.

In the spring of 2023, the election of Janet Protasiewicz — endorsed by the NDRC — shifted the balance of the court, which could open the door to a common-sense ruling that protects reproductive freedom. This shows just how important our work is to bring attention and resources to often-overlooked state supreme court races. [**Peter, can you help strengthen our work to elect Democracy Defenders in state supreme court races this year, and races in the future? **This is a big year for these races, Peter: On April 1, Wisconsinites will vote** to elect a justice to replace Justice Walsh Bradley, who is retiring after 30 years on the court.
That means the pro-democracy majority on the court could swing the other way, putting power in map manipulators’ hands. This is our chance to protect the pro-democracy majority in the Wisconsin Supreme Court — and it’s a clear reminder that **there is no off year for redistricting. **
The NDRC has endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in this race. Judge Crawford is a Democracy Defender who has fought to protect voting rights and abortion access. Your support for her and for our fair maps work in 2025 will make a meaningful difference as we fight back, state by state, against Trump’s anti-democratic agenda.
**[Pitch in today — your gift of $30 or more will help elect Democracy Defenders in Wisconsin and beyond, push back on gerrymandering, and help fight for fair electoral maps.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101800970/527103911/-622962733?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WISupCourt2_email_20250208-NDRC-Tier1-WISupCourt2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250208-NDRC-Tier1-WISupCourt2_&utm_campaign=WISupCourt2&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkMzE2NjIyLTU4ZTYtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=drxM5N25Ij5NWecG25ZNMSE6HqrfI3i0Ff9ivds4pTs=)**

clean_body: Donate to support Democracy Defenders in 2025 | Peter, here’s what happens when you elect pro-democracy justices to state supreme courts: They stand up to right-wing activists working to strip people of their constitutional freedoms. Late last year, Wisconsin Supreme Court Justices Jill Karofsky, Rebecca Dallet, Janet Protasiewicz, and Ann Walsh Bradley pushed back on efforts to uphold a 175-year-old total ban on abortions: Justice Karofsky painted this legal effort as a sign of a “world gone mad.” Justice Dallet questioned why a policy enacted by white, property-owning men should take precedent over everything that’s happened since. In the spring of 2023, the election of Janet Protasiewicz — endorsed by the NDRC — shifted the balance of the court, which could open the door to a common-sense ruling that protects reproductive freedom. This shows just how important our work is to bring attention and resources to often-overlooked state supreme court races. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This is a big year for these races, Peter: On April 1, Wisconsinites will vote to elect a justice to replace Justice Walsh Bradley, who is retiring after 30 years on the court. That means the pro-democracy majority on the court could swing the other way, putting power in map manipulators’ hands. This is our chance to protect the pro-democracy majority in the Wisconsin Supreme Court — and it’s a clear reminder that there is no off year for redistricting. The NDRC has endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in this race. Judge Crawford is a Democracy Defender who has fought to protect voting rights and abortion access. Your support for her and for our fair maps work in 2025 will make a meaningful difference as we fight back, state by state, against Trump’s anti-democratic agenda. = Thank you, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Becca Balint
subject: A guide to navigating Trump’s chaotic Presidency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
“What should people be doing right now?” | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101801822/527106169/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzZiOThlNi01YmU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EY9dSWWHnP9h3S9AljhWea2mkvyOBNL8GEhfPbT_q7A=)

Hey Peter. Today is a great day to fight for democracy. But a question I’m being asked by so many of you lately is _“What should people be doing _right now_?”_ So today, I want to share a little “survival guide” of sorts for the next four years. Here’s how we’ll navigate Trump’s chaotic presidency: ☎️ Flood the phone lines of Republican representatives and the White House to let them know we won’t accept attacks on our fundamental rights and freedoms. 🪧 Show up at protests to demand change and stand in solidarity with those affected by the Trump administration’s illegal executive actions. 🏳️🌈 Spark joy by attending pride festivals, library gatherings, or any community-centered event in your area. 🔕 Take breaks from the news when you can. It’s important not to let ourselves fall into despair so we don’t lose hope or sight of the progress we’re fighting for. 🤝 Support those on the frontlines of the fight for our democracy. This means donating your money or time to voting rights groups, your local Democratic party, or candidates who help us move toward real progress. If you found this survival guide helpful, I encourage you to forward this email to three people who might need it. (Goodness knows a lot of us need a channel for our frustrations with the Trump administration!) And if you support my work to hold this administration accountable for its non-stop attacks on our democracy and our rights, **[please chip in a donation of any amount today. Anything you can give will help me continue my fight to address our most pressing issues.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101801825/527106172/-634802177?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzZiOThlNi01YmU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EY9dSWWHnP9h3S9AljhWea2mkvyOBNL8GEhfPbT_q7A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101801829/527106174/-634802177?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250208_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzZiOThlNi01YmU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EY9dSWWHnP9h3S9AljhWea2mkvyOBNL8GEhfPbT_q7A=)

name: Team Harder
subject: Updates re: RFK Jr. and Tulsi Gabbard
body:
Yikes...

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101801869/527106361/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTNiZDA2ZTQtNWNlNi1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EwCSivC7H2YqUy6RqHIcQCy3ylvhEBv65ERT07ecHT4=) | Peter, It looks like Senate Republicans are caving to Donald Trump, again. It now appears likely they’ll confirm ALL of Trump’s Cabinet nominees - _even the most dangerous ones._ **Robert Kennedy Jr. is likely to become our next Health Secretary. Tulsi Gabbard is in line to become the National Intelligence Director.** We’ll let you in on a secret: multiple GOP Senators don’t want them to be confirmed. But MAGA and Trump are in control now and Republican members are too scared to cross them. Gone are the days of Senator John McCain that’s for sure. clean_body: Yikes... | = | Peter, It looks like Senate Republicans are caving to Donald Trump, again. It now appears likely they’ll confirm ALL of Trump’s Cabinet nominees - even the most dangerous ones. Robert Kennedy Jr. is likely to become our next Health Secretary. Tulsi Gabbard is in line to become the National Intelligence Director. We’ll let you in on a secret: multiple GOP Senators don’t want them to be confirmed. But MAGA and Trump are in control now and Republican members are too scared to cross them. Gone are the days of Senator John McCain that’s for sure. It’s really scary that even Trump’s most extreme nominees are being given a blanket stamp of approval from Republicans. These Senators clearly don’t want to get on Trump’s bad side and so they are willing to put their morals aside. It’s really sad. Thanks for speaking out, \- Team Harder *

and why it matters

|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101801903/527106476/1040961737?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_USAID_250208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2M2ZmRhOC01ZGU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VyMT4k6MkxqFIopPAZRFdX1iqcnCpxuHsIVVxug3hxk=) Derek,

**You’ve probably heard that over the last week, Donald Trump and DOGE have been putting much of their efforts into trying to shut down USAID.** Here’s what that means, why it’s so bad for both the United States and the world, what I’m doing about it, and [_**why I’m asking for your help.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101801904/527106477/1040961737?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_USAID_250208_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2M2ZmRhOC01ZGU2LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VyMT4k6MkxqFIopPAZRFdX1iqcnCpxuHsIVVxug3hxk=)

Republicans are attacking USAID as part of an effort to end anything they see as “foreign aid.” That includes USAID’s work fighting pandemics, getting food to malnourished kids, and strengthening the growing economy.

But those things aren’t just good for folks overseas – they’re good for us here at home too. USAID contracts help support American farmers who provide food that then keeps kids alive. Pandemics stopped elsewhere don’t reach our shores, keeping us healthy. And USAID helps us counter foreign powers like China and Russia that are seeking to expand their global influence, and that have a habit of popping up in power vacuums.

Gutting USAID will cost thousands of Americans their jobs, weaken our position globally, and give China a massive giveaway. It’s the wrong move. **So all week long I’ve stood with USAID workers, including on Wednesday at a rally against DOGE lawlessly shutting down federal agencies.**

Late yesterday, a federal judge blocked the Trump administration from putting thousands of USAID workers on leave. But this is far from the end of the fight.

[_**I am doing everything I can to stop Donald Trump and his unelected co-president from gutting the federal government, Derek. But I need your help to fight back. Can you rush a donation right | | | **WARNING** \- _“You’ve been lied to about Calcium!”_
Ask anyone how to prevent bone loss and breaks, and they're likely to answer, "Get more calcium."
Bad news...
According to a 2013 Harvard publication... Men who took over 1,000 mg of calcium supplements daily were **20% more likely to develop heart issues** than those who didn't take supplements.
A meta-analysis of clinical trials found that calcium, vitamin D, or both supplements were not associated with a lower risk of bone breaks in older adults!

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | WARNING \- “You’ve been lied to about Calcium!” Ask anyone how to prevent bone loss and breaks, and they're likely to answer, "Get more calcium." Bad news... According to a 2013 Harvard publication... Men who took over 1,000 mg of calcium supplements daily were 20% more likely to develop heart issues than those who didn't take supplements. A meta-analysis of clinical trials found that calcium, vitamin D, or both supplements were not associated with a lower risk of bone breaks in older adults! But there's good news... Because a unique protein seems to act like glue inside your bones — helping to halt age-related bone loss. . So, if you want to STOP bone loss... And blow your doctor away with your next DEXA scan results...

name: Sen. Tom Cotton
subject: Dems are blocking Trump’s nominees for one reason only
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
can you confirm you’re with us on this?
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cd7d12faa6ea4da8b52a927a9f96ef81&_e=XvHUNG8iDcWFgyKsqPKZgmNW5qR9illCi_KjwAxeKQj5ryKB8gkCP3Q3c_3AQt3ZXVpsDuBFiVgVi-ts0mCVhpFaTo4Hh6f-4yWLcwDbk8uhN2YbafHmmBi3ZvrtnIZkh6dv1ypI0abxmq0m_L35QA__KnICR-ePQqA02zPS2AvOqBFgKEoEP7du3a2YjYEwAmxSGPRB8-mJBPYCMmFwuglzxDarVoq4x6ib-8C62v2EQMVQb71mxyRhjBdBZ09OVAdJraazyNNcr7Q6XS1o5ushHhP75hW3oXAXHSKjxFQjIlpukrnsFbCy-Cf3GgrMTq5wZx-itkrKe_spXWqHzCFwzS-evHFh0n17o6sYqYu8_IWTiwVnPs8F6LbIOqabhtqpmkemebeF_7AwMi-dMhiTuR16Eti9aZUaRf6y1N6G4gA0TH5yCV2z9pz6uprUf0SH3lim2A12Hz0Bq88tjEVYM-sgP5wXMfH-Iz8VyE4%3D)

It's as simple as this, Fellow Patriot.

Senate Democrats are blocking President Trump's nominees because they want four more years of Joe Biden's terrible policies.

They're spreading smears in hearings, lies in the liberal media, and slowing down the process in the Senate.

**[I've had _ENOUGH,_ Fellow Patriot. My message to these liberals is simple: We can do this the easy way, or the hard way -- and it looks like it's going to be the hard way.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cd7d12faa6ea4da8b52a927a9f96ef81&_e=XvHUNG8iDcWFgyKsqPKZgmNW5qR9illCi_KjwAxeKQj5ryKB8gkCP3Q3c_3AQt3ZXVpsDuBFiVgVi-ts0mCVhpFaTo4Hh6f-4yWLcwDbk8uhN2YbafHmmBi3ZvrtnIZkh6dv1ypI0abxmq0m_L35QA__KnICR-ePQqA02zPS2AvOqBFgKEoEP7du3a2YjYEwAmxSGPRB8-mJBPYCMmFwuglzxDarVoq4x6ib-8C62v2EQMVQb71mxyRhjBdBZ09OVAdJraazyNNcr7Q6XS1o5ushHhP75hW3oXAXHSKjxFQjIlpukrnsFbCy-Cf3GgrMELgpvWRNCvaavi1Tv_mv-D_cJrAzc0f15Ajr48Q-yxabGcYBoNtv822zyVGVd0ZryKoNfjDfAU6PZaHqggTV4O193rGJkE92-WULwS1RosX7iDdfILanNO237HZXQNMckvK5DeaYnLJCtv0v1b2vGWYYlPtaiERueI6qmHjsdMc%3D)**

**[I'm asking every patriot in your area to help me reinforce the message and flood Senate Democrats with millions of signatures.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cd7d12faa6ea4da8b52a927a9f96ef81&_e=XvHUNG8iDcWFgyKsqPKZgmNW5qR9illCi_KjwAxeKQj5ryKB8gkCP3Q3c_3AQt3ZXVpsDuBFiVgVi-ts0mCVhpFaTo4Hh6f-4yWLcwDbk8uhN2YbafHmmBi3ZvrtnIZkh6dv1ypI0abxmq0m_L35QA__KnICR-ePQqA02zPS2AvOqBFgKEoEP7du3a2YjYEwAmxSGPRB8-mJBPYCMmFwuglzxDarVoq4x6ib-8C62v2EQMVQb71mxyRhjBdBZ09OVAdJraazyNNcr7Q6XS1o5ushHhP75hW3oXAXHSKjxFQjIlpukrnsFbCy-Cf3GgrM_uf37s_NaHMIteRDnwgWdZvQ_X_vDD6oGiwIi4M6Sywra5z9AthE2m5T7k2f9a3j3IBMn0UDFp9RpnjfgZKAGQsFEQd9z4_C8adxPZlCqpZhXpvIeaqg2IbnCJwAsDOLY6C-Y7az1X2qTnRlLOsYM7DFUzue9BBxSXCXmEKmBVE%3D)**

Senate Democrats don't respect the will of the people, and they certainly don't want President Trump to have his team in place.

The only way to stop their games is to mount an unprecedented pressure campaign.

**[So, please, add your name to my petition calling for ALL of President Trump's nominees to be confirmed ASAP. >>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cd7d12faa6ea4da8b52a927a9f96ef81&_e=XvHUNG8iDcWFgyKsqPKZgmNW5qR9illCi_KjwAxeKQj5ryKB8gkCP3Q3c_3AQt3ZXVpsDuBFiVgVi-ts0mCVhpFaTo4Hh6f-4yWLcwDbk8uhN2YbafHmmBi3ZvrtnIZkh6dv1ypI0abxmq0m_L35QA__KnICR-ePQqA02zPS2AvOqBFgKEoEP7du3a2YjYEwAmxSGPRB8-mJBPYCMmFwuglzxDarVoq4x6ib-8C62v2EQMVQb71mxyRhjBdBZ09OVAdJraazyNNcr7Q6XS1o5ushHhP75hW3oXAXHSKjxFQjIlpukrnsFbCy-Cf3GgrMhsA920kEXUjO_WJH3BsNjyFcTstJic_1RKIur6EF-N6RsaOyFujsFMZAXrHfNtsE1w6wueadAU2cFd7BtxffLAMEDDtx0flRY4OWgraCC7xeVfTHZW231TXT6fGCOpehOK5qIVS9246DAiXxHBO_MrQ5ueX9GkcnY3Qm_faCHss%3D)**

| **Peter, I’ll tell you why the GOP is obsessed with “DEI.”**

Racism. Pure and simple.

Crying “DEI” has become a socially acceptable way for them to attack people on the basis of their race, gender, whatever they want. Let’s be real: If MLK were alive today, they’d call him a DEI preacher — they’re _that_ shameless.

Their cries of “DEI hire” are destroying the careers of highly qualified people in Orlando and across the US, and decades of progress in the workforce.

**NEW YORK TIMES: Trump Officials Fire Jan. 6 Prosecutors and Plan Possible F.B.I. Purge**
* * *
**RAPID-RESPONSE POLL:
****Do you support the PURGING of FBI officials who investigated the Jan. 6 insurrection?**

| **[NO](https://valuethevote.us/l/0zUdp7iaXgxK)**
---
**[YES](https://valuethevote.us/l/d54hDgSj7dRh)**
---
**[UNSURE](https://valuethevote.us/l/ICNX1MhWanjw)**
---
* * *
**Donald Trump’s administration is now looking to PURGE the FBI:** Thousands of FBI agents are now on the brink of being fired, all for delivering justice to those who stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6. Let us be clear: this will endanger Americans. This is a developing story, and we have no data from your area, so we’re asking:
---
**Do you support the PURGING of FBI officials who investigated the Jan. 6 insurrection?**
---
| **[NO](https://valuethevote.us/l/LBuRw0jtuXBO)**
---
**[YES](https://valuethevote.us/l/X8Pxv2DDfUK4)**
---
**[UNSURE](https://valuethevote.us/l/0DHL8vgdI2ON)**
---
Thank you for your response, Every Eligible American

name: David Horowitz
subject: It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially
body:
I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before. | | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b4b0e2a5e8914607a0f400efb9a19542&_e=eY4Eyt3OPyIC3jQPClHAFXwndY14hvtq0Vg80kgRN3JIv2zdFTFeQNulTxlt-VF1POcs5mEOSxIMEYhQLmCd32JgKDxqBKz5hu1wxIC2cVVAp8nLcCEQ2XQRVUpg6flpyEnP81DXpoMcT9vyALZRgWaAMTzPAX57NvPI4IOL5mTRArCF4KyD_Mr9nK0VLcMOaDNubB6g4_vb6yx0ELL6y1piD9IGtze1WIC25YWlDfJ1ZCgKF8bmmTqxiKpzplfspc4sHOzbVEu036F0jb6M8RUh48rWAjpGiyka9SHESkP_BSHSkfj3oVK3BcGFtBm69gt3sVvh-aey-orreJbcOSTSRTwXEK8Fa1Q2fOLk6ts2aWLpNZv_nk3d6Wf_pCWMDksn9UMCHQwcusG0NSBXfH3EqF-Zt7a9iSehK_0sCdo%3D)**

| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b4b0e2a5e8914607a0f400efb9a19542&_e=eY4Eyt3OPyIC3jQPClHAFXwndY14hvtq0Vg80kgRN3JIv2zdFTFeQNulTxlt-VF1POcs5mEOSxIMEYhQLmCd32JgKDxqBKz5hu1wxIC2cVVAp8nLcCEQ2XQRVUpg6flpyEnP81DXpoMcT9vyALZRgWaAMTzPAX57NvPI4IOL5mTRArCF4KyD_Mr9nK0VLcMOaDNubB6g4_vb6yx0ELL6y1piD9IGtze1WIC25YWlDfJ1ZCgKF8bmmTqxiKpzplfspc4sHOzbVEu036F0jb6M8YKPRdPicLNawG93TwZPXHL4H80YKNvFBzvuV06VqZhHrdgP4n64U4u_UQyD90bnxiO-aLD7CBHAQofxcsfXDr1lj8Su55Jv88sCZ88xTHA5VQetbPsnIiX18Xg4o8-4wTn0eGDGuDMmHeeJThPzttM%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b4b0e2a5e8914607a0f400efb9a19542&_e=eY4Eyt3OPyIC3jQPClHAFXwndY14hvtq0Vg80kgRN3JIv2zdFTFeQNulTxlt-VF1POcs5mEOSxIMEYhQLmCd32JgKDxqBKz5hu1wxIC2cVVAp8nLcCEQ2XQRVUpg6flpyEnP81DXpoMcT9vyALZRgWaAMTzPAX57NvPI4IOL5mTRArCF4KyD_Mr9nK0VLcMOaDNubB6g4_vb6yx0ELL6y1piD9IGtze1WIC25YWlDfJ1ZCgKF8bmmTqxiKpzplfspc4sHOzbVEu036F0jb6M8dBiTyEo_6b25jY2mRYSnEpJK-aYORHY0qDJa3DbuzHrb8fC1R2-q2XYoKCcRV1G_SJklyYO1pSnxCFtvavJS6fGPTHOTZhURlb1z4U5yOOtX0tu8Mf47UfgyhLH4NiglDW5nDix5Db9_ZDBwJpLd9E%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.

* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._

---

You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. * _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_

* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. name: Jason C. Johnson
subject: I have good news and bad news
body:
| | | Good news, bad news
---
| |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=447896a75c364c79ba4aecac8656d14e&_e=xDCED3glKskFD-ET1Lm0fGjNCNOVZb_CcyV4S8zmWd7oaDl9eiqXn-KCaEhpvxfGJp1f1lEKIeMReUXSsL5kdMPhTjisS9Vyu2xe_Ie_p9m6kCPVfJr6ZiHP2q8izHbjlS1NdcU5cnK-A1tw528TrE0FlaFvQxq1f9DSpqpy_AAikm7hXY6JaohLl4NOaVibxlpVjd3b4V7xNb2u12fQDNoI6mdulLtDOOJBKVSTHNJo8zfrZqQVuLayRb-tEEVONMRbG73-754zqY4M-GBJLAcdYcY5gClSe8Q7a3bIWw9HVmtnAVGfWd1YvY_Hk4Zu1Qf7-pEovJiZ96k4j7-cqe_0lvIxxTevj_0ztbF1fVCYJF9cSzuTeTuX-_Xu83ulCpMQWhI-qBncao7nHUp0oA%3D%3D)
---
Patriot, I have good news and bad news. The good news is the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford began on Monday, February 3rd.That means as I’m writing this email this brave officer is finally getting his chance to clear his name in court. The bad news is we must come up with $10,000 to ensure we have the funds to cover the trial expenses. **[**As a patriot who backs the blue, I'm asking you to donate $35 or more in the next 24 hours.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=447896a75c364c79ba4aecac8656d14e&_e=xDCED3glKskFD-ET1Lm0fGjNCNOVZb_CcyV4S8zmWd7oaDl9eiqXn-KCaEhpvxfGJp1f1lEKIeMReUXSsL5kdMPhTjisS9Vyu2xe_Ie_p9m6kCPVfJr6ZiHP2q8izHbjlS1NdcU5cnK-A1tw528TrE0FlaFvQxq1f9DSpqpy_AAikm7hXY6JaohLl4NOaVibxlpVjd3b4V7xNb2u12fQDNoI6mdulLtDOOJBKVSTHNIRa2OUr4cnMYyg682HGadJMKGMQPbmVwxU-VRjnlHVSKiQcWQrmrZnrtNoju-ufWM_rN_xZQLDGCGqiEWJYPi_MXRqX6WlvQrv21Nm916laP3z5bMoK9xKIkr-PmzplLkyfnTBzc8TwjdQ89qGnD9hlaNe2-Z_YrLMm57XkEno4Q%3D%3D)** It's outrageous that Brad has even been charged in this case. He faces a charge of voluntary manslaughter for saving his partner's life from a suspect armed with a knife who was resisting being detained and violently threatened their lives.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. Brad had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's life. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.It was an act of heroism -- but because the cop was white, and the suspect was black...it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor. Now Brad Lunsford is facing 11 years prison. Let that sink in. 11 years in prison -- locked away from his wife and young children -- for following his police training and saving his partner's life.**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to donate $35 or more right away to help fund Brad's case.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=447896a75c364c79ba4aecac8656d14e&_e=xDCED3glKskFD-ET1Lm0fGjNCNOVZb_CcyV4S8zmWd7oaDl9eiqXn-KCaEhpvxfGJp1f1lEKIeMReUXSsL5kdMPhTjisS9Vyu2xe_Ie_p9m6kCPVfJr6ZiHP2q8izHbjlS1NdcU5cnK-A1tw528TrE0FlaFvQxq1f9DSpqpy_AAikm7hXY6JaohLl4NOaVibxlpVjd3b4V7xNb2u12fQDNoI6mdulLtDOOJBKVSTHNKwdQVaA00WHVUa5hD02rPPfV5L3RT-XcMBlEfQwmRUXZfZ50bNLPab98_c61DDcJM-gUUaeJUdxfImonv8rPVLic75msmUwbM9cCQLlUUhEh5C-pdxRp-SALUHQox9KCsY7QBJEhfWR6sEWraGbZbKrD26xO11OzN5y9gZ7f4L3g%3D%3D)** You see, trials are expensive.
---
* Those attorneys we've been paying hourly are suddenly on the case 8+ hours a day for as long as the trial takes.
* The expert witnesses required to put on a solid defense come with hefty price tags.
* And of course, there's travel and lodgings for our officers and their families -- who want to be there to support their loved one.

---
It's no small undertaking to pay for someone's legal defense. Here at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund we're blessed to be able to do this for wrongly accused officers because of the generosity of folks like you. But trials put a huge stress on our budget -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help.**[**Can I count on you to donate $35 or more right away?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=447896a75c364c79ba4aecac8656d14e&_e=xDCED3glKskFD-ET1Lm0fGjNCNOVZb_CcyV4S8zmWd7oaDl9eiqXn-KCaEhpvxfGJp1f1lEKIeMReUXSsL5kdMPhTjisS9Vyu2xe_Ie_p9m6kCPVfJr6ZiHP2q8izHbjlS1NdcU5cnK-A1tw528TrE0FlaFvQxq1f9DSpqpy_AAikm7hXY6JaohLl4NOaVibxlpVjd3b4V7xNb2u12fQDNoI6mdulLtDOOJBKVSTHNLOaOBoDZsQ8DlvmUmjyTNgyGumTBvBqEA8ettByyQE3Ni2ioeknfJWrJY6HfsqiPGzcXJ95pvqx2CH6_5cWQw4Q9sfDECYnA6zJZ7SihPV2w2Jr89PJ-nUJVHp0xVsN5qYTiwl6PK02VfjXnDGFWVC-Ti9Lei7ZTD6oJNyZPDQvw%3D%3D)** Knowing we can count on folks like you makes it possible for LELDF to say YES to wrongly accused officers, like Brad, who need our help.Thank you for helping us provide top-notch legal defenses to all our wrongly accused officers.
---
Sincerely,
