clean_body: | | | Good news, bad news | | Patriot, I have good news and bad news. The good news is the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford began on Monday, February 3rd.That means as I’m writing this email this brave officer is finally getting his chance to clear his name in court. The bad news is we must come up with $10,000 to ensure we have the funds to cover the trial expenses. It's outrageous that Brad has even been charged in this case. He faces a charge of voluntary manslaughter for saving his partner's life from a suspect armed with a knife who was resisting being detained and violently threatened their lives.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. Brad had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's life. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.It was an act of heroism -- but because the cop was white, and the suspect was black...it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor. Now Brad Lunsford is facing 11 years prison. Let that sink in. 11 years in prison -- locked away from his wife and young children -- for following his police training and saving his partner's life. You see, trials are expensive. Those attorneys we've been paying hourly are suddenly on the case 8+ hours a day for as long as the trial takes. The expert witnesses required to put on a solid defense come with hefty price tags. And of course, there's travel and lodgings for our officers and their families -- who want to be there to support their loved one. It's no small undertaking to pay for someone's legal defense. Here at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund we're blessed to be able to do this for wrongly accused officers because of the generosity of folks like you. But trials put a huge stress on our budget -- which is why I'm urgently turning to you for help. Knowing we can count on folks like you makes it possible for LELDF to say YES to wrongly accused officers, like Brad, who need our help.Thank you for helping us provide top-notch legal defenses to all our wrongly accused officers. Sincerely, Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. We must raise $10,000 to ensure the trial for Officer Brad Lunsford is fully funded. Thank you in advance for helping us provide the best possible legal defenses for all our officers. | | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! ** | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Special Election Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: upcoming special elections
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
These special elections represent critical opportunities to build our Democratic power and elect more Democrats who will fight back against Trumpism in their state legislatures. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**It’s only the beginning of the year, but already there are over a dozen special elections on the calendar in state legislatures. Take a look at some of our upcoming races:** | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**
---|---|---
2/15
| Delaware | SD-1

2/15
| Delaware | SD-5

2/25
| Maine | HD-24

3/11
| Minnesota | H-40B

3/25
| Pennsylvania | SD-36

3/25
| Pennsylvania | HD-35

Last month, our team helped Democrats secure two majority-making special election wins in the Virginia House and Senate – victories that prevented Republican governor Glenn Youngkin from gaining a trifecta in the state.
Now, we’re facing even more specials that will determine chamber control in key legislatures.

# The USAID Scandal: A Disgraceful Waste of American Tax Dollars
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Folks, I've seen corruption in my time, but what's been exposed at the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) under Elon Musk's oversight is beyond the pale. **[The White House has laid it all out](https://substack.com/redirect/878437f8-dec8-4516-b50e-7c2ed96d07b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and it's time we talk about this squandering of your hard-earned money.
First off, let's address the $1.5 million sent to Serbia for "diversity, equity, and inclusion." Right at the top of the White House's list, that's right, we're funding DEI workshops overseas while American businesses are begging for help. How does this help America, I ask you?
Then there's the $70,000 for a "DEI musical" in Ireland. Your tax dollars are being spent on a musical about diversity. Meanwhile, our schools are underfunded, our infrastructure is crumbling, but sure, let's fund Irish theater. And $2.5 million for electric vehicles in Vietnam? When was the last time you saw an American city benefit from such a lavish gift? Vietnam's environmental policies are suddenly more important than ours?
But wait, there's more. USAID decided to spend $47,000 on a "transgender opera" in Colombia. An opera, folks. Because nothing screams American priority like funding arts in South America while our own cultural institutions struggle. And don't forget the $32,000 for a "transgender comic book" in Peru. Comics? Really? How about funding literacy programs at home or supporting our struggling local comic book shops?
_**(Op ed continues below)**_
* * *
**[Presented By 4PAtriots](https://substack.com/redirect/ec3e5876-b6da-4a91-82a9-9225240d56b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ec3e5876-b6da-4a91-82a9-9225240d56b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.
Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent. And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn:
"Food shortages are coming."
**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.**
If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis.
**Well, no need to worry anymore.**
Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies.
That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling **[Survival Food Kits](https://substack.com/redirect/ec3e5876-b6da-4a91-82a9-9225240d56b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.
**[Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.](https://substack.com/redirect/ec3e5876-b6da-4a91-82a9-9225240d56b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out.It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late.
**[Stock up now](https://substack.com/redirect/ec3e5876-b6da-4a91-82a9-9225240d56b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on these survival food kits while you can.
[Stock Up Now](https://substack.com/redirect/ec3e5876-b6da-4a91-82a9-9225240d56b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
The absurdity peaks at $2 million for sex changes and "LGBT activism" in Guatemala. I ask you, is this what the American taxpayer voted for? Is this how we should be spending our money abroad, on promoting specific social agendas rather than tangible, beneficial aid?
Let's not overlook the hundreds of thousands of dollars given to non-profits linked to designated terrorist organizations. Even after an inspector general's investigation, the money kept flowing. This isn't just mismanagement; it's a betrayal of public trust.
Each of these line items shows a pattern of waste, a pattern where USAID has chosen to push an ideological agenda over real, effective aid. This isn't about being against aid; it's about demanding accountability, demanding that every single penny of your tax dollars is used wisely, in America's interests.
Under President Trump's administration, with Musk's help, we're trying to bring some sanity back to government spending. These expenditures are not just frivolous; they're an insult to every American who works hard to pay their taxes, expecting their government to act responsibly.
The leadership at USAID has failed, and failed spectacularly. They've shown a complete disregard for fiscal responsibility and for the American people. They all deserve to be fired. It's not just about cutting costs; it's about cutting out corruption, waste, and the promotion of ideologies that don't reflect the values or needs of our nation.
We need leaders who understand that America's resources should be used to support American interests and allies, not to fund a global woke agenda. It's time for a change, time for accountability. The days of wasting American tax dollars on nonsense must end. Now!

Meanwhile, our schools are underfunded, our infrastructure is crumbling... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? There's $70,000 for a "DEI musical" in Ireland. Your tax dollars are being spent on a musical about diversity. Meanwhile, our schools are underfunded, our infrastructure is crumbling... Feb 8 | | | | | | | | | | | Free column presented by | | ---|---|--- The USAID Scandal: A Disgraceful Waste of American Tax Dollars By Rudy W. Giuliani Folks, I've seen corruption in my time, but what's been exposed at the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) under Elon Musk's oversight is beyond the pale. and it's time we talk about this squandering of your hard-earned money. First off, let's address the $1.5 million sent to Serbia for "diversity, equity, and inclusion." Right at the top of the White House's list, that's right, we're funding DEI workshops overseas while American businesses are begging for help. How does this help America, I ask you? Then there's the $70,000 for a "DEI musical" in Ireland. Your tax dollars are being spent on a musical about diversity. Meanwhile, our schools are underfunded, our infrastructure is crumbling, but sure, let's fund Irish theater. And $2.5 million for electric vehicles in Vietnam? When was the last time you saw an American city benefit from such a lavish gift? Vietnam's environmental policies are suddenly more important than ours? But wait, there's more. USAID decided to spend $47,000 on a "transgender opera" in Colombia. An opera, folks. Because nothing screams American priority like funding arts in South America while our own cultural institutions struggle. And don't forget the $32,000 for a "transgender comic book" in Peru. Comics? Really? How about funding literacy programs at home or supporting our struggling local comic book shops? (Op ed continues below) The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis | | ---|---|--- This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent. And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: "Food shortages are coming." As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out.It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. The absurdity peaks at $2 million for sex changes and "LGBT activism" in Guatemala. I ask you, is this what the American taxpayer voted for? Is this how we should be spending our money abroad, on promoting specific social agendas rather than tangible, beneficial aid? Let's not overlook the hundreds of thousands of dollars given to non-profits linked to designated terrorist organizations. Even after an inspector general's investigation, the money kept flowing. This isn't just mismanagement; it's a betrayal of public trust. Each of these line items shows a pattern of waste, a pattern where USAID has chosen to push an ideological agenda over real, effective aid. This isn't about being against aid; it's about demanding accountability, demanding that every single penny of your tax dollars is used wisely, in America's interests. Under President Trump's administration, with Musk's help, we're trying to bring some sanity back to government spending. These expenditures are not just frivolous; they're an insult to every American who works hard to pay their taxes, expecting their government to act responsibly. The leadership at USAID has failed, and failed spectacularly. They've shown a complete disregard for fiscal responsibility and for the American people. They all deserve to be fired. It's not just about cutting costs; it's about cutting out corruption, waste, and the promotion of ideologies that don't reflect the values or needs of our nation. We need leaders who understand that America's resources should be used to support American interests and allies, not to fund a global woke agenda. It's time for a change, time for accountability. The days of wasting American tax dollars on nonsense must end. Now! Support Mayor Giuliani with your PolitiBrawl paid subscription today: You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Politibrawl 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: (Ken Martin Introduction:)
body:
---
Hi Derek, It’s Ken Martin, the new chair of the DNC. As chair, my job is to make sure we are not just fighting the extremes of Donald Trump, but also making the case to families in both red and blue states about why they should trust us with their votes. To do that, we’ll need resources to compete everywhere and build long-lasting Democratic infrastructure nationwide. That’s why I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. $3, that's the ask. $3 to help mobilize and organize against Trump and his allies’ disastrous policies. $3 to help elect Democrats at every level of government, in every community — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states and deliver for the American people. $3 to help Democrats take back the House and the Senate, and ultimately, the White House. No donation is too small. After winning every single statewide election in Minnesota during my time as chairman of the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party, I know that better than anyone. Any amount helps us build the foundation we’ll need. The number of donations we'll receive from Democrats like you will take care of the rest. [**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 (or whatever you can afford) directly to the Democratic National Committee to help us build the strongest possible Party?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250208_2727_fr&refcode2=2727_22930333_F7qMz1&akid=2727%2E22930333%2EF7qMz1) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250208_2727_fr&refcode2=2727_22930333_F7qMz1&akid=2727%2E22930333%2EF7qMz1)**
